name: 3/4 sit-up
instructions: Deite-se no chão and secure Seus/Suas pés. Seus/Suas pernas should be bent at the knees.
Coloque suas mãos behind or to the side of Seus/Suas head. You will begin with Seus/Suas costas no/na ground. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Flex Seus/Suas hips and spine to raise Seus/Suas torso toward Seus/Suas knees.
At the top of the contraction Seus/Suas torso should be perpendicular to the ground. Reverse the motion, going only ¾ of the way down.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: 90/90 hamstring
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas, with one leg extended straight out.
com o/a other leg, bend the hip and knee to 90 degrees. You may brace Seus/Suas leg with Seus/Suas mãos if necessary. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Extend Seus/Suas leg straight into the air, pausing briefly at the top. Return the leg to the starting position.
Repeat for 10-20 repetitions, and then switch to the other leg.

name: Ab crunch machine
instructions: Selecione uma resistência leve e sente-se no/na máquina de abdominal Posicionando seus pés sob as almofadas provided and Segurando as alças superiores. Seus/Suas braços should be dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus as you Apoie os tríceps nas almofadas provided. Esta será sua posição inicial.

At the same time, Comece a elevar as pernas as you Flexione o tronco superior. Expire ao realizar este movimento. Tip: Be sure to use a slow and controlled motion. Concentrate on using Seus/Suas abdômen to move the peso while relaxing Seus/Suas pernas and pés.
After a second pause, slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Ab roller
instructions: Hold the Ab Roller with both mãos and kneel no/na floor.
Now place the ab roller no/na floor in front of you so that you are on all Seus/Suas mãos and knees (as in a kneeling push up position). Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly roll the ab roller straight forward, stretching Seus/Suas body into a straight position. Tip: Go down as far as you can without touching the floor with Seus/Suas body. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
After a pause at the stretched position, start pulling yourself costas to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Go slowly and keep Seus/Suas abdômen tight at all times.

name: Adductor
instructions: Lie face down with one leg on a foam roll.
Rotate the leg so that the foam roll contacts against Seus/Suas inner thigh. Shift as much peso onto the foam roll as can be tolerated.
While trying to relax the muscles if the inner thigh, roll over the foam between Seus/Suas hip and knee, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat com o/a other leg.

name: Adductor/groin
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pés raised towards the ceiling.
Have Seus/Suas partner hold Seus/Suas pés or ankles. Abduct Seus/Suas pernas as far as you can. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to squeeze Seus/Suas pernas together for 10 or more seconds, while Seus/Suas partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in Seus/Suas pernas as Seus/Suas partner pushes Seus/Suas pés apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let Seus/Suas partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

name: Advanced kettlebell windmill
instructions: Clean and press a kettlebell overhead with one arm.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push Seus/Suas butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Keep the non-working arm behind Seus/Suas costas and turn Seus/Suas pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm com o/a kettlebell.
Lower yourself as far as possible.
Pause for a second and reverse the motion costas to the starting position.

name: Air bike
instructions: Lie flat no/na floor with Seus/Suas lower costas pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put Seus/Suas mãos beside Seus/Suas head. Be careful however to not strain com o/a neck as you perform it. Now lift Seus/Suas ombros into the crunch position.
Bring knees up to where they are perpendicular to the floor, with Seus/Suas lower pernas parallel to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now simultaneously, slowly go through a cycle pedal motion kicking forward com o/a right leg and bringing in the knee of the left leg. Bring Seus/Suas right elbow close to Seus/Suas left knee by crunching to the side, as you breathe out.
Go costas to the initial position as you breathe in.
Crunch to the opposite side as you cycle Seus/Suas pernas and bring closer Seus/Suas left elbow to Seus/Suas right knee and exhale.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.

name: All fours quad stretch
instructions: Start off on Seus/Suas mãos and knees, then lift Seus/Suas leg off the floor and hold the foot with Seus/Suas hand.
Use Seus/Suas hand to hold the foot or ankle, keeping the knee fully flexed, stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
Focus on extending Seus/Suas hips, thrusting them towards the floor. Hold for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.

name: Alternate hammer curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright and a dumbbell in each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the mãos should be facing Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repeat the movement com o/a left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Alternate heel touchers
instructions: Lie no/na floor com o/a knees bent and the pés no/na floor around 18-24 inches apart. Seus/Suas braços should be extended by Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Crunch over Seus/Suas torso forward and up about 3-4 inches to the right side and touch Seus/Suas right heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movement.
Now go costas slowly to the starting position as you inhale.

Now crunch over Seus/Suas torso forward and up around 3-4 inches to the left side and touch Seus/Suas left heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movement and then go costas to the starting position as you inhale. Now that both heels have been touched, that is considered 1 repetition.
Continue alternating sides in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.

name: Alternate incline dumbbell curl
instructions: Sit down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand being held at braços length. Tip: Keep the elbows close to the torso.Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. As you do so, rotate the hand so that the palm is facing up. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repeat the movement com o/a left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Alternate leg diagonal bound
instructions: Assume a comfortable stance with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Begin by pushing off com o/a front leg, driving the opposite knee forward and as high as possible before landing. Attempt to cover as much distance to each side with each bound.
It may help to use a line no/na ground to guage distance from side to side.
Repeat the sequence com o/a other leg.

name: Alternating cable desenvolvimento
instructions: Move the cables to the bottom of the tower and select an appropriate peso.
Grasp the cables and hold them at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas head and peito up, extend through the elbow to press one side directly over head.
After pausing at the top, Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat no/na opposite side.

name: Alternating deltoid raise
instructions: In a standing position, hold a pair of dumbbells at Seus/Suas side.
Keeping Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent, raise the peso directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
Return the peso to Seus/Suas side.
no/na next repetition, raise the peso laterally, raising them out to Seus/Suas side to about shoulder height.
Return the peso to the starting position and continue alternating to the front and side.

name: Alternating floor press
instructions: Lie no/na floor with two kettlebells next to Seus/Suas ombros.
Position one in place on Seus/Suas peito and then the other, gripping the kettlebells no/na handle com o/a palms facing forward.

Extend both braços, so that the kettlebells are being held above Seus/Suas peito. Lower one kettlebell, bringing it to Seus/Suas peito and turn the wrist in the direction of the locked out kettlebell.
Raise the kettlebell and repeat no/na opposite side.

name: Alternating hang clean
instructions: Place two kettlebells between Seus/Suas pés. To get in the starting position, push Seus/Suas butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean one kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell in a hanging position. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so.
Lower the cleaned kettlebell to a hanging position and clean the alternate kettlebell. Repeat.

name: Alternating kettlebell press
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros. Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so.
Press one directly overhead by extending through the elbow, turning it so the palm faces forward while holding the other kettlebell stationary .
Lower the pressed kettlebell to the starting position and immediately press with Seus/Suas other arm.

name: Alternating kettlebell row
instructions: Place two kettlebells in front of Seus/Suas pés. Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and push Seus/Suas butt out as much as possible. As you bend over to get into the starting position grab both kettlebells by the handles.

Pull one kettlebell off of the floor while holding on to the other kettlebell. Retract the shoulder blade of the working side, as you flex the elbow, drawing the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas stomach or rib cage.
Lower the kettlebell in the working arm and repeat with Seus/Suas other arm.

name: Alternating renegade row
instructions: Place two kettlebells no/na floor about shoulder width apart. Position yourself on Seus/Suas toes and Seus/Suas mãos as though you were doing a flexão, com o/a body straight and extended. Use the handles of the kettlebells to support Seus/Suas upper body. You may need to position Seus/Suas pés wide for support.
Push one kettlebell into the floor and row the other kettlebell, retracting the shoulder blade of the working side as you flex the elbow, pulling it to Seus/Suas side.
Then lower the kettlebell to the floor and begin the kettlebell in the opposite hand. Repeat for several reps.

name: Ankle circles
instructions: Use a sturdy object like a agachamento rack to hold yourself.

Lift the right leg in the air (just around 2 inches from the floor) and perform a circular motion com o/a big toe. Pretend that you are drawing a big circle with it. Tip: One circle equals 1 repetition. Breathe normally as you perform the movement.
When you are done com o/a right foot, then repeat com o/a left leg.

name: Ankle on the knee
instructions: From a lying position, bend Seus/Suas knees and keep Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.
Place Seus/Suas ankle of one foot on Seus/Suas opposite knee.
Grasp the thigh or knee of the bottom leg and pull both of Seus/Suas pernas into the peito. Relax Seus/Suas neck and ombros. Hold for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.

name: Anterior tibialis-smr
instructions: Begin seated no/na ground with Seus/Suas pernas bent and Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.

Using a Muscle Roller or a rolling pin, apply pressure to the muscles no/na outside of Seus/Suas shins. Work from just below the knee to above the ankle, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat no/na other leg.

name: Anti-gravity press
instructions: Place a bar no/na ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay no/na bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barbell up from the floor. Flex the elbows, performing a reverse curl to bring the bar near Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To begin, press the barbell out in front of Seus/Suas head by extending Seus/Suas elbows. Keep Seus/Suas braços parallel to the ground throughout the movement.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat to complete the set.

name: Arm circles
instructions: Stand up and extend Seus/Suas braços straight out by the sides. The braços should be parallel to the floor and perpendicular (90-degree angle) to Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Slowly start to make circles of about 1 foot in diameter with each outstretched arm. Breathe normally as you perform the movement.
Continue the circular motion of the outstretched braços for about ten seconds. Then reverse the movement, going the opposite direction.

name: Arnold dumbbell press
instructions: Sit on an exercise bench with costas support and hold two dumbbells in front of you at about upper peito level with Seus/Suas palms facing Seus/Suas body and Seus/Suas elbows bent. Tip: Seus/Suas braços should be next to Seus/Suas torso. The starting position should look like the contracted portion of a dumbbell curl.
Now to perform the movement, raise the dumbbells as you rotate the palms of Seus/Suas mãos until they are facing forward.
Continue lifting the dumbbells until Seus/Suas braços are extended above you in straight arm position. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement.

After a second pause at the top, begin to lower the dumbbells to the original position by rotating the palms of Seus/Suas mãos towards you. Tip: The left arm will be rotated in a counter clockwise manner while the right one will be rotated clockwise. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Around the worlds
instructions: Lay down on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand com o/a palms of the mãos facing towards the ceiling. Tip: Seus/Suas braços should be parallel to the floor and next to Seus/Suas thighs. To avoid injury, make sure that you keep Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now move the dumbbells by creating a semi-circle as you displace them from the initial position to over the head. All of the movement should happen com o/a braços parallel to the floor at all times. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Reverse the movement to return the peso to the starting position as you exhale.

name: Atlas stone trainer
instructions: This trainer is effective for developing Atlas Stone strength for those who don't have access to stones, and are typically made from bar ends or heavy pipe.
Begin by loading the desired peso onto the bar. Straddle the peso, wrapping Seus/Suas braços around the implement, bending at the hips.

Begin by pulling the peso up past the knees, extending through the hips. As the peso clears the knees, it can be lapped by resting it on Seus/Suas thighs and sitting costas, hugging it tightly to Seus/Suas peito.
Finish the movement by extending through Seus/Suas hips and knees to raise the peso as high as possible. The peso can be returned to the lap or to the ground for successive repetitions.

name: Atlas stones
instructions: Begin com o/a atlas stone between Seus/Suas pés. Bend at the hips to wrap Seus/Suas braços vertically around the Atlas Stone, attempting to get Seus/Suas fingers underneath the stone. Many stones will have a small flat portion no/na bottom, which will make the stone easier to hold.
Pulling the stone into Seus/Suas torso, drive through the costas half of Seus/Suas pés to pull the stone from the ground.
As the stone passes the knees, lap it by sitting backward, pulling the stone on top of Seus/Suas thighs.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto Seus/Suas peito as you change Seus/Suas grip to reach over the stone. Stand, driving through with Seus/Suas hips. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean costas, extending the hips to get the stone as high as possible.

name: Axle levantamento terra
instructions: Approach the bar so that it is centered over Seus/Suas pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing Seus/Suas shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an over/under grip.

With Seus/Suas pés and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and flex the knees until Seus/Suas shins contact the bar. Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Costas flyes - with bands
instructions: Run a band around a stationary post like that of a agachamento rack.
Grab the band by the handles and stand costas so that the tension in the band rises.

Extend and lift the braços straight in front of you. Tip: Seus/Suas braços should be straight and parallel to the floor while perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso. Seus/Suas pés should be firmly planted no/na floor spread at shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you exhale, move Seus/Suas braços to the sides and costas. Keep Seus/Suas braços extended and parallel to the floor. Continue the movement until the braços are extended to Seus/Suas sides.
After a pause, go costas to the original position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Backward drag
instructions: Load a sled com o/a desired peso, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning costas, extend through the pernas for short steps to move as quickly as possible.

name: Backward medicine ball throw
instructions: This exercise is best done with a partner. If you lack a partner, the ball can be thrown and retrieved or thrown against a wall.
Begin standing a few meters in front of Seus/Suas partner, both facing the same direction. Begin holding the ball between Seus/Suas pernas.
agachamento down and then forcefully reverse direction, coming to full extension and you toss the ball over Seus/Suas head to Seus/Suas partner.
Seus/Suas partner can then roll the ball costas to you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Balance board
instructions: Place a balance board in front of you.
Stand up on it and try to balance yourself.
Hold the balance for as long as desired.

name: Ball leg curl
instructions: Begin no/na floor laying on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pés on top of the ball.
Position the ball so that when Seus/Suas pernas are extended Seus/Suas ankles are on top of the ball. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas hips off of the ground, keeping Seus/Suas peso no/na shoulder blades and Seus/Suas pés.
Flex the knees, pulling the ball as close to you as you can, contracting the hamstrings.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Band assisted pull-up
instructions: Choke the band around the center of the barra fixa bar. You can use different bands to provide varying levels of assistance.
Pull the end of the band down, and place one bent knee into the loop, ensuring it won't slip out. Take a medium to wide grip no/na bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull yourself upward by contracting the lats as you flex the elbow. The elbow should be driven to Seus/Suas side. Pull to the front, attempting to get Seus/Suas chin over the bar. Avoid swinging or jerking movements.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Band good morning
instructions: Using a 41 inch band, stand on one end, spreading Seus/Suas pés a small amount. Bend at the hips to loop the end of the band behind Seus/Suas neck. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas pernas straight, extend through the hips to come to a near vertical position.
Ensure that you do not round Seus/Suas costas as you go down costas to the starting position.

name: Band good morning (pull through)
instructions: Loop the band around a post. Standing a little ways away, loop the opposite end around the neck. Seus/Suas mãos can help hold the band in position.
Begin by bending at the hips, getting Seus/Suas butt costas as far as possible. Keep Seus/Suas costas flat and bend forward to about 90 degrees. Seus/Suas knees should be only slightly bent.
Retorne para a posição inicial be driving through com o/a hips to come costas to a standing position.

name: Band hip adductions
instructions: Anchor a band around a solid post or other object.
Stand with Seus/Suas left side to the post, and put Seus/Suas right foot through the band, getting it around the ankle.
Stand up straight and hold onto the post if needed. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the knee straight, raise Seus/Suas right pernas out to the side as far as you can.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat for the desired rep count.
Switch sides.

name: Band pull apart
instructions: Begin with Seus/Suas braços extended straight out in front of you, holding the band with both mãos.
Initiate the movement by performing a reverse fly motion, moving Seus/Suas mãos out laterally to Seus/Suas sides.
Keep Seus/Suas elbows extended as you perform the movement, bringing the band to Seus/Suas peito. Ensure that you keep Seus/Suas ombros costas during the exercise.
Pause as you complete the movement, returning to the starting position under control.

name: Band skull crusher
instructions: Secure a band to the base of a rack or the bench. Lay no/na bench so that the band is lined up with Seus/Suas head.
Take hold of the band, raising Seus/Suas elbows so that the upper arm is perpendicular to the floor. com o/a elbow flexed, the band should be above Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Extend through the elbow to straighten Seus/Suas arm, keeping Seus/Suas upper arm in place. Pause at the top of the motion, and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Barbell ab rollout
instructions: For this exercise you will need to get into a flexão position, but instead of having Seus/Suas mãos of the floor, you will be grabbing on to an Olympic barbell (loaded with 5-10 lbs on each side) instead. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping a slight arch on Seus/Suas costas, lift Seus/Suas hips and roll the barbell towards Seus/Suas pés as you exhale. Tip: As you perform the movement, Seus/Suas glúteos should be coming up, you should be keeping the abdômen tight and should maintain Seus/Suas costas posture at all times. Also Seus/Suas braços should be staying perpendicular to the floor throughout the movement. If you don't, you will work out Seus/Suas ombros and costas more than the abdômen.
After a second contraction at the top, start to roll the barbell costas forward to the starting position slowly as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell ab rollout - on knees
instructions: Hold an Olympic barbell loaded with 5-10lbs on each side and kneel no/na floor.
Now place the barbell no/na floor in front of you so that you are on all Seus/Suas mãos and knees (as in a kneeling push up position). Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly roll the barbell straight forward, stretching Seus/Suas body into a straight position. Tip: Go down as far as you can without touching the floor with Seus/Suas body. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
After a second pause at the stretched position, start pulling yourself costas to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Go slowly and keep Seus/Suas abdômen tight at all times.

name: Barbell supino - medium grip
instructions: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
From the starting position, breathe in and begin coming down slowly until the bar touches Seus/Suas middle peito.

After a brief pause, push the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out. Focus on pushing the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position at the top of the motion, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: Ideally, lowering the peso should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Barbell curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding a barbell at a shoulder-width grip. The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward and the elbows should be close to the torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the bíceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell curls lying against an incline
instructions: Lie against an incline bench, with Seus/Suas braços holding a barbell and hanging down in a horizontal line. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping the upper braços stationary, curl the peso up as high as you can while squeezing the bíceps. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Only the forearms should move. Do not swing the braços.
After a second contraction, slowly go costas to the starting position as you inhale. Tip: Make sure that you go all of the way down.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell levantamento terra
instructions: Stand in front of a loaded barbell.

While keeping the costas as straight as possible, bend Seus/Suas knees, bend forward and grasp the bar using a medium (shoulder width) overhand grip. This will be the starting position of the exercise. Tip: If it is difficult to hold on to the bar with this grip, alternate Seus/Suas grip or use wrist straps.

While holding the bar, start the lift by pushing with Seus/Suas pernas while simultaneously getting Seus/Suas torso to the upright position as you breathe out. In the upright position, stick Seus/Suas peito out and contract the costas by bringing the shoulder blades costas. Think of how the soldiers in the military look when they are in standing in attention.

Go costas to the starting position by bending at the knees while simultaneously leaning the torso forward at the waist while keeping the costas straight. When the peso no/na bar touch the floor you are costas at the starting position and ready to perform another repetition.
Perform the amount of repetitions prescribed in the program.

name: Barbell full agachamento
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just above shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder-width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and sitting costas with Seus/Suas hips as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until Seus/Suas hamstrings are on Seus/Suas calves. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel or middle of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas and extend the hips to go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell glute bridge
instructions: Begin seated no/na ground with a loaded barbell over Seus/Suas pernas. Using a fat bar or having a pad no/na bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise. Roll the bar so that it is directly above Seus/Suas hips, and lay down flat no/na floor.

Begin the movement by driving through with Seus/Suas heels, extending Seus/Suas hips vertically through the bar. Seus/Suas peso should be supported by Seus/Suas upper costas and the heels of Seus/Suas pés.
Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Barbell guillotine supino
instructions: Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over Seus/Suas neck with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, bring the bar down slowly until it is about 1 inch from Seus/Suas neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Barbell hack agachamento
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a barbell behind you at braços length and Seus/Suas pés at shoulder width. Tip: A shoulder width grip is best com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing costas. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping Seus/Suas head and eyes up and costas straight, agachamento until Seus/Suas upper thighs are parallel to the floor. Breathe in as you slowly go down.
Pressing mainly com o/a heel of the foot and squeezing the thighs, go costas up as you breathe out.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell hip thrust
instructions: Begin seated no/na ground with a bench directly behind you. Have a loaded barbell over Seus/Suas pernas. Using a fat bar or having a pad no/na bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise.
Roll the bar so that it is directly above Seus/Suas hips, and lean costas against the bench so that Seus/Suas shoulder blades are near the top of it.

Begin the movement by driving through Seus/Suas pés, extending Seus/Suas hips vertically through the bar. Seus/Suas peso should be supported by Seus/Suas shoulder blades and Seus/Suas pés. Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Barbell incline supino - medium grip
instructions: Lie costas on an incline bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on you upper peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, squeeze Seus/Suas peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: it should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Barbell incline shoulder raise
instructions: Lie costas on an Incline Bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that is slightly wider than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the braços straight, lift the bar by protracting Seus/Suas shoulder blades, raising the ombros from the bench as you breathe out.
Bring costas the bar to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell lunge
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and step forward with Seus/Suas right leg and agachamento down through Seus/Suas hips, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow Seus/Suas knee to go forward beyond Seus/Suas toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress no/na knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of Seus/Suas foot, push up and go costas to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform com o/a left leg.

name: Barbell rear delt row
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a barbell using a wide (higher than shoulder width) and overhand (palms facing Seus/Suas body) grip.

Bend knees slightly and bend over as you keep the natural arch of Seus/Suas costas. Let the braços hang in front of you as they hold the bar. Once Seus/Suas torso is parallel to the floor, flare the elbows out and away from Seus/Suas body. Tip: Seus/Suas torso and Seus/Suas braços should resemble the letter "T". Now you are ready to begin the exercise.

While keeping the upper braços perpendicular to the torso, pull the barbell up towards Seus/Suas upper peito as you squeeze the rear delts and you breathe out. Tip: When performed correctly, this exercise should resemble a supino in reverse. Also, refrain from using Seus/Suas bíceps to do the work. Focus on targeting the rear delts; the braços should only act as hooks.
Slowly go costas to the initial position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell rollout from bench
instructions: Place a loaded barbell no/na ground, near the end of a bench. Kneel with both pernas no/na bench, and take a medium to narrow grip no/na barbell. Esta será sua posição inicial.

To begin, extend through the hips to slowly roll the bar forward. As you roll out, flex the shoulder to roll the bar above Seus/Suas head. Ensure that Seus/Suas braços remain extended throughout the movement.
When the bar has been moved as far forward as possible, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Barbell seated calf raise
instructions: Place a block about 12 inches in front of a flat bench.
Sit no/na bench and place the ball of Seus/Suas pés no/na block.
Have someone place a barbell over Seus/Suas upper thighs about 3 inches above Seus/Suas knees and hold it there. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise up on Seus/Suas toes as high as possible as you squeeze the calves and as you breathe out.
After a second contraction, slowly go costas to the starting position. Tip: To get maximum benefit stretch Seus/Suas calves as far as you can.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell desenvolvimento
instructions: Sit on a bench with costas support in a agachamento rack. Position a barbell at a height that is just above Seus/Suas head. Grab the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing forward).

Once you pick up the barbell com o/a correct grip width, lift the bar up over Seus/Suas head by locking Seus/Suas braços. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of Seus/Suas head. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Lower the bar down to the ombros slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar costas up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell shrug
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés at shoulder width as you hold a barbell with both mãos in front of you using a pronated grip (palms facing the thighs). Tip: Seus/Suas mãos should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas ombros up as far as you can go as you breathe out and hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Refrain from trying to lift the barbell by using Seus/Suas bíceps.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell shrug behind the costas
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés at shoulder width as you hold a barbell with both mãos behind Seus/Suas costas using a pronated grip (palms facing costas). Tip: Seus/Suas mãos should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for better grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas ombros up as far as you can go as you breathe out and hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Refrain from trying to lift the barbell by using Seus/Suas bíceps. The braços should remain stretched out at all times.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell side bend
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck). Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come costas up to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Keep the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movement but bending to the left instead. Hold for a second and come costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell side split agachamento
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck). Seus/Suas pés should be placed wide apart com o/a foot of the lead leg angled out to the side. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Lower Seus/Suas body towards the side of Seus/Suas angled foot by bending the knee and hip of Seus/Suas lead leg and while keeping the opposite leg only slightly bent. Breathe in as you lower Seus/Suas body.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the hip and knee of the lead leg. Expire ao realizar este movimento.
After performing the recommended amount of reps, repeat the movement com o/a opposite leg.

name: Barbell agachamento
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell agachamento to a bench
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first place a flat bench or a box behind you. The flat bench is used to teach you to set Seus/Suas hips costas and to hit depth.

Then, set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and sitting Seus/Suas hips costas as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas and extend the hips to go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Barbell step ups
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) and stand upright behind an elevated platform (such as the one used for spotting behind a flat bench). This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Place the right foot no/na elevated platform. Step no/na platform by extending the hip and the knee of Seus/Suas right leg. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of Seus/Suas body up and place the foot of the left leg no/na platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down com o/a left leg by flexing the hip and knee of the right leg as you inhale. Return to the original standing position by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot no/na initial position.
Repeat com o/a right leg for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform com o/a left leg.

name: Barbell walking lunge
instructions: Begin standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart and a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop Seus/Suas hips. Descend until Seus/Suas rear knee nearly touches the ground. Seus/Suas posture should remain upright, and Seus/Suas front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of Seus/Suas lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself costas up.
Step forward with Seus/Suas rear foot, repeating the lunge no/na opposite leg.

name: Battling ropes
instructions: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 pés away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with Seus/Suas braços extended at Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating Seus/Suas left and right braços, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

name: Bear crawl sled drags
instructions: Wearing either a harness or a loose peso belt, attach the chain to the costas so that you will be facing away from the sled. Bend down so that Seus/Suas mãos are no/na ground. Seus/Suas costas should be flat and knees bent. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Begin by driving with pernas, alternating left and right. Use Seus/Suas mãos to maintain balance and to help pull. Try to keep Seus/Suas costas flat as you move over a given distance.

name: Behind head peito stretch
instructions: Sit upright no/na floor with Seus/Suas partner behind you.
Coloque suas mãos behind Seus/Suas hand, and push Seus/Suas elbows costas as far as you can. Seus/Suas partner should hold Seus/Suas elbows. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Gently attempt to pull Seus/Suas elbows forward with Seus/Suas mãos still behind Seus/Suas head for 10 or more seconds. Seus/Suas partner should prevent Seus/Suas elbows from moving.

Now, relax Seus/Suas muscles and have Seus/Suas partner gently pull the elbows costas as far as it comfortable for you. Be sure to let Seus/Suas partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

name: Bench dips
instructions: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind Seus/Suas costas. com o/a bench perpendicular to Seus/Suas body, and while looking away from it, hold on to the bench on its edge com o/a mãos fully extended, separated at shoulder width. The pernas will be extended forward, bent at the waist and perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly lower Seus/Suas body as you inhale by bending at the elbows until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the elbows as close as possible throughout the movement. Forearms should always be pointing down.
Using Seus/Suas tríceps to bring Seus/Suas torso up again, lift yourself costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bench jump
instructions: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 pés in front of you. Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform a short agachamento in preparation for the jump; swing Seus/Suas braços behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing Seus/Suas braços forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing com o/a knees bent, absorbing the impact through the pernas.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump costas over the bench.

name: Supino - powerlifting
instructions: Begin by lying no/na bench, getting Seus/Suas head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck Seus/Suas pés underneath you and arch Seus/Suas costas. Using the bar to help support Seus/Suas peso, lift Seus/Suas shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use Seus/Suas pés to drive Seus/Suas traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.
However wide Seus/Suas grip, it should cover the ring no/na bar. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting Seus/Suas ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to Seus/Suas lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches Seus/Suas torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

name: Supino - with bands
instructions: Using a flat bench secure a band sob o/a leg of the bench that is nearest to Seus/Suas head.
Once the band is secure, grab it by both handles and lie down no/na bench.
Extend Seus/Suas braços so that you are holding the band handles in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate Seus/Suas wrists forward so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing away from you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Bring down the handles slowly until Seus/Suas elbow forms a 90 degree angle. Keep full control at all times.

As you breathe out, bring the handles up using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, squeeze Seus/Suas peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.

name: Supino with chains
instructions: Adjust the leader chain, shortening it to the desired length.Place the chains no/na sleeves of the bar.

Lying no/na bench, get Seus/Suas head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck Seus/Suas pés underneath you and arch Seus/Suas costas. Using the bar to help support Seus/Suas peso, lift Seus/Suas shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use Seus/Suas pés to drive Seus/Suas traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide Seus/Suas grip, it should cover the ring no/na bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting Seus/Suas ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to Seus/Suas lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches Seus/Suas torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

name: Bench sprint
instructions: Stand no/na ground with one foot resting on a bench or box with Seus/Suas heel close to the edge.
Push off with Seus/Suas foot on top of the bench, extending through the hip and knee.
Land com o/a opposite foot on top of the box, returning Seus/Suas other foot costas to the start position.
Continue alternating from one foot to another to complete the set.

name: Bent-arm barbell pullover
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with a barbell using a shoulder grip width.
Hold the bar straight over Seus/Suas peito with a bend in Seus/Suas braços. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping Seus/Suas braços in the bent arm position, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind Seus/Suas head while breathing in until you feel a stretch no/na peito.
At that point, bring the barbell costas to the starting position using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the peso no/na initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Bent-arm dumbbell pullover
instructions: Place a dumbbell standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the dumbbell stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (torso across it as in forming a cross) with only Seus/Suas ombros lying no/na surface. Hips should be below the bench and pernas bent with pés firmly no/na floor. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the dumbbell with both mãos and hold it straight over Seus/Suas peito with a bend in Seus/Suas braços. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the dumbbell. Esta será sua posição inicial. Caution: Always ensure that the dumbbell used for this exercise is secure. Using a dumbbell with loose plates can result in the dumbbell falling apart and falling on Seus/Suas face.
While keeping Seus/Suas braços locked in the bent arm position, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind Seus/Suas head while breathing in until you feel a stretch no/na peito.
At that point, bring the dumbbell costas to the starting position using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the peso no/na initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Bent-knee hip raise
instructions: Lay flat no/na floor with Seus/Suas braços next to Seus/Suas sides.
Now bend Seus/Suas knees at around a 75 degree angle and lift Seus/Suas pés off the floor by around 2 inches.

Using Seus/Suas lower abdômen, bring Seus/Suas knees in towards you as you maintain the 75 degree angle bend in Seus/Suas pernas. Continue this movement until you raise Seus/Suas hips off of the floor by rolling Seus/Suas pelvis backward. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: At the end of the movement Seus/Suas knees will be over Seus/Suas peito.
Squeeze Seus/Suas abdômen at the top of the movement for a second and then Retorne para a posição inicial slowly as you breathe in. Tip: Maintain a controlled motion at all times.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bent over barbell row
instructions: Holding a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing down), bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barbell should hang directly in front of you as Seus/Suas braços hang perpendicular to the floor and Seus/Suas torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Now, while keeping the torso stationary, breathe out and lift the barbell to you. Keep the elbows close to the body and only use the forearms to hold the peso. At the top contracted position, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bent over dumbbell rear delt raise with head on bench
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell in each hand and with an incline bench in front of you.

While keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and maintaining the natural arch of Seus/Suas costas, lean forward until Seus/Suas forehead touches the bench in front of you. Let the braços hang in front of you perpendicular to the ground. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing each other and Seus/Suas torso should be parallel to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas torso forward and stationary, and the braços straight with a slight bend at the elbows, lift the dumbbells straight to the side until both braços are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the peso. Caution: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the braços costas as opposed to the side.
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells costas to the starting position.
Repeat the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Bent over low-pulley side lateral
instructions: Select a peso and hold the handle of the low pulley with Seus/Suas right hand.

Bend at the waist until Seus/Suas torso is nearly parallel to the floor. Seus/Suas pernas should be slightly bent with Seus/Suas left hand placed on Seus/Suas lower left thigh. Seus/Suas right arm should be hanging from Seus/Suas shoulder in front of you and with a slight bend at the elbow. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas right arm, elbow slightly bent, to the side until the arm is parallel to the floor and in line with Seus/Suas right ear. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Baixe o peso lentamente costas to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and repeat the movement com o/a other arm.

name: Bent over one-arm long bar row
instructions: Put peso on one of the ends of an Olympic barbell. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barbell in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object no/na ground so the barbell cannot slide backward.
Bend forward until Seus/Suas torso is as close to parallel com o/a floor as you can and keep Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with one arm just behind the plates no/na side where the peso was placed and put Seus/Suas other hand on Seus/Suas knee. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull the bar straight up with Seus/Suas elbow in (to maximize costas stimulation) until the plates touch Seus/Suas lower peito. Squeeze the costas muscles as you lift the peso up and hold for a second at the top of the movement. Breathe out as you lift the peso. Tip: Do not allow for any swinging of the torso. Only the arm should move.

Slowly lower the bar to the starting position getting a nice stretch no/na lats. Tip: Do not let the plates touch the floor. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.

name: Bent over two-arm long bar row
instructions: Put peso on one of the ends of an Olympic barbell. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barbell in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object no/na ground so the barbell cannot slide backward.
Bend forward until Seus/Suas torso is as close to parallel com o/a floor as you can and keep Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with both braços just behind the plates no/na side where the peso was placed and put Seus/Suas other hand on Seus/Suas knee. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull the bar straight up with Seus/Suas elbows in (to maximize costas stimulation) until the plates touch Seus/Suas lower peito. Squeeze the costas muscles as you lift the peso up and hold for a second at the top of the movement. Breathe out as you lift the peso. Tip: Use a stirrup or double handle cable attachment by hooking it sob o/a end of the bar.

Slowly lower the bar to the starting position getting a nice stretch no/na lats. Tip: Do not let the plates touch the floor. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bent over two-dumbbell row
instructions: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing Seus/Suas torso), bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward by bending at the waist; as you bend make sure to keep Seus/Suas costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The peso should hang directly in front of you as Seus/Suas braços hang perpendicular to the floor and Seus/Suas torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to Seus/Suas side (as you breathe out), keeping the elbows close to the body (do not exert any force com o/a forearm other than holding the peso). no/na top contracted position, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Baixe o peso lentamente again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bent over two-dumbbell row with palms in
instructions: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The peso should hang directly in front of you as Seus/Suas braços hang perpendicular to the floor and Seus/Suas torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to Seus/Suas side as you breathe out, squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together. no/na top contracted position, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Baixe o peso lentamente again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Bent press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin my leaning to the side opposite the kettlebell, continuing until you are able to touch the ground with Seus/Suas free hand, keeping Seus/Suas eyes no/na kettlebell. As you do so, press the peso vertically be extending through the elbow, keeping Seus/Suas arm perpendicular to the ground.
Return to an upright position, com o/a kettlebell above Seus/Suas head. Return the kettlebell to the shoulder and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Bicycling
instructions: To begin, seat yourself no/na bike and adjust the seat to Seus/Suas height.

name: Bicycling, stationary
instructions: To begin, seat yourself no/na bike and adjust the seat to Seus/Suas height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistência can be changed throughout the workout. The handles can be used to monitor Seus/Suas heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

name: Board press
instructions: Begin by lying no/na bench, getting Seus/Suas head beyond the bar if possible. One to five boards, made out of 2x6's, can be screwed together and held in place by a training partner, bands, or just tucked under Seus/Suas shirt.

Tuck Seus/Suas pés underneath you and arch Seus/Suas costas. Using the bar to help support Seus/Suas peso, lift Seus/Suas shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use Seus/Suas pés to drive Seus/Suas traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.

You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus no/na tríceps. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting Seus/Suas ombros. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to the boards, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

name: Body-up
instructions: Assume a plank position no/na ground. You should be supporting Seus/Suas bodyweight on Seus/Suas toes and forearms, keeping Seus/Suas torso straight. Seus/Suas forearms should be shoulder-width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pressing Seus/Suas palms firmly into the ground, extend through the elbows to raise Seus/Suas body from the ground. Keep Seus/Suas torso rigid as you perform the movement.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas forearms costas to the ground by allowing the elbows to flex.
Repeat.

name: Body tricep press
instructions: Position a bar in a rack at peito height.
Standing, take a shoulder width grip no/na bar and step a yard or two costas, pés together and braços extended so that you are leaning no/na bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering yourself towards the bar.
Pause, and then reverse the motion by extending the elbows.
Progress from bodyweight by adding chains over Seus/Suas ombros.

name: Bodyweight flyes
instructions: Position two equally loaded EZ bars no/na ground next to each other. Ensure they are able to roll.
Assume a push-up position over the bars, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas toes and mãos with Seus/Suas braços extended and body straight.
Coloque suas mãos no/na bars. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Using a slow and controlled motion, move Seus/Suas mãos away from the midline of Seus/Suas body, rolling the bars apart. Inhale during this portion of the motion.
After moving the bars as far apart as you can, Retorne para a posição inicial by pulling them costas together. Exhale as you perform this movement.

name: Bodyweight mid row
instructions: Begin by taking a medium to wide grip on a pull-up apparatus with Seus/Suas palms facing away from you. From a hanging position, tuck Seus/Suas knees to Seus/Suas peito, leaning costas and getting Seus/Suas pernas over Seus/Suas side of the pull-up apparatus. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Beginning with Seus/Suas braços straight, flex the elbows and retract the shoulder blades to raise Seus/Suas body up until Seus/Suas pernas contact the pull-up apparatus.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Bodyweight agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. You can Coloque suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing Seus/Suas knees and hips, sitting costas with Seus/Suas hips.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you Retorne para a posição inicial. As you agachamento, keep Seus/Suas head and peito up and push Seus/Suas knees out.

name: Bodyweight walking lunge
instructions: Begin standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart and Seus/Suas mãos on Seus/Suas hips.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop Seus/Suas hips. Descend until Seus/Suas rear knee nearly touches the ground. Seus/Suas posture should remain upright, and Seus/Suas front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of Seus/Suas lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself costas up.
Step forward with Seus/Suas rear foot, repeating the lunge no/na opposite leg.

name: Bosu ball cable crunch with side bends
instructions: Connect a standard handle to each arm of a cable machine, and position them in the most downward position.
Grab a Bosu Ball and position it in front and center of the cable machine.
Lie down no/na Bosu Ball com o/a small of Seus/Suas costas arched around the ball. Seus/Suas rear end should be close to the floor without touching it.
With both mãos, reach costas and grab the handle of each cable.
With Seus/Suas pés positioned in a wide stance, extend Seus/Suas braços straight out in front of you and in between Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas mãos should be at knee level.
Keep Seus/Suas braços straight and in-line com o/a upward angle of the cable. Elevate Seus/Suas torso in a crunching motion without dropping or bending Seus/Suas braços.
Maintain the rigid position with Seus/Suas braços. Slowly descend costas to the starting position with Seus/Suas costas arched around the Bosu Ball and Seus/Suas abdominals elongated.
Repeat the same series of movements to failure.
Once you reach failure, keep Seus/Suas abdômen tight and raise Seus/Suas torso into plank position so Seus/Suas costas is elevated off the Bosu Ball.
Lower Seus/Suas braços down to Seus/Suas side; keep them straight. Start doing alternating side bends; reach for Seus/Suas heels! This finishing movement will focus on Seus/Suas obliques.

name: Bottoms-up clean from the hang position
instructions: Initiate the exercise by standing upright with a kettlebell in one hand.
Swing the kettlebell costas forcefully and then reverse the motion forcefully. Crush the kettlebell handle as hard as possible and raise the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder.

name: Bottoms up
instructions: Begin by lying on Seus/Suas costas no/na ground. Seus/Suas pernas should be straight and Seus/Suas braços at Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.

To perform the movement, tuck the knees toward Seus/Suas peito by flexing the hips and knees. Following this, extend Seus/Suas pernas directly above you so that they are perpendicular to the ground. Rotate and elevate Seus/Suas pelvis to raise Seus/Suas glúteos from the floor.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Box jump (multiple response)
instructions: Assume a relaxed stance facing the box or platform approximately an arm's length away. braços should be down at the sides and pernas slightly bent.
Using the braços to aid in the initial burst, jump upward and forward, landing with pés simultaneously on top of the box or platform.
Immediately drop or jump costas down to the original starting place; then repeat the sequence.

name: Box skip
instructions: You will need several boxes lined up about 8 pés apart.
Begin facing the first box with one leg slightly behind the other.
Drive off the costas leg, attempting to gain as much height com o/a hips as possible.

Immediately upon landing no/na box, drive the other leg forward and upward to gain height and distance, leaping from the box. Land between the first two boxes com o/a same leg that landed no/na first box.
Then, step to the next box and repeat.

name: Box agachamento
instructions: The box agachamento allows you to agachamento to desired depth and develop explosive strength in the agachamento movement. Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel agachamento, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wider for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.

name: Box agachamento with bands
instructions: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands no/na sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or dumbbells so that there is appropriate tension. If dumbbells are used, secure them so that they don't move. Also, ensure that the dumbbells you are using are heavy enough for the bands that you are using. Additional plates can be used to hold the dumbbells down. If more tension is needed, you can either widen the base no/na floor or choke the bands. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel agachamento, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wider for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.

name: Box agachamento with chains
instructions: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel agachamento, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still no/na floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wider for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.

name: Brachialis-smr
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas side, with Seus/Suas upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with Seus/Suas body, com o/a outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise Seus/Suas hips off of the floor, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas arm and on Seus/Suas pés. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Bradford/rocky presses
instructions: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar at shoulder level with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Tip: Seus/Suas grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm as the barbell goes down. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Once you pick up the barbell com o/a correct grip, lift the bar up over Seus/Suas head by locking Seus/Suas braços.
Now lower the bar down to the costas of the head slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar costas up to the starting position as you exhale.
Lower the bar down to the starting position slowly as you inhale. This is one repetition.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Butt-ups
instructions: Begin a flexão position but with Seus/Suas elbows no/na ground and resting on Seus/Suas forearms. Seus/Suas braços should be dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus.
Arch Seus/Suas costas slightly out rather than keeping Seus/Suas costas completely straight.

Raise Seus/Suas glúteos toward the ceiling, squeezing Seus/Suas abdômen tightly to close the distance between Seus/Suas ribcage and hips. The end result will be that you'll end up in a high bridge position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lower costas down slowly to Seus/Suas starting position as you breathe in. Tip: Don't let Seus/Suas costas sag downwards.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Butt lift (bridge)
instructions: Lie flat no/na floor on Seus/Suas costas com o/a mãos by Seus/Suas side and Seus/Suas knees bent. Seus/Suas pés should be placed around shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pushing mainly with Seus/Suas heels, lift Seus/Suas hips off the floor while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight. Breathe out as you perform this part of the motion and hold at the top for a second.
Slowly go costas to the starting position as you breathe in.

name: Butterfly
instructions: Sit no/na machine with Seus/Suas costas flat no/na pad.
Take hold of the handles. Tip: Seus/Suas upper braços should be positioned parallel to the floor; adjust the machine accordingly. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Push the handles together slowly as you squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the middle. Breathe out during this part of the motion and hold the contraction for a second.
Return costas to the starting position slowly as you inhale until Seus/Suas peito muscles are fully stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable peito press
instructions: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Seus/Suas upper braços should be about 45 degrees to the body, with Seus/Suas head and peito up. The elbows should be bent to about 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together straight in front of you. Keep Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movement.
After pausing at full extension, return to th starting position, keeping tension no/na cables.
You can also execute this movement with Seus/Suas costas off the pad, at an incline or decline, or alternate mãos.

name: Cable crossover
instructions: To get yourself into the starting position, place the pulleys on a high position (above Seus/Suas head), select the resistência to be used and hold the pulleys in each hand.

Step forward in front of an imaginary straight line between both pulleys while pulling Seus/Suas braços together in front of you. Seus/Suas torso should have a small forward bend from the waist. Esta será sua posição inicial.

With a slight bend on Seus/Suas elbows in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon, extend Seus/Suas braços to the side (straight out at both sides) in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on Seus/Suas peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the braços and torso should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position as you breathe out. Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the peso.
Hold for a second at the starting position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Cable crunch
instructions: Kneel below a high pulley that contains a rope attachment.
Grasp cable rope attachment and lower the rope until Seus/Suas mãos are placed next to Seus/Suas face.
Flex Seus/Suas hips slightly and allow the peso to hyperextend the lower costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.

com o/a hips stationary, flex the waist as you contract the abdômen so that the elbows travel towards the middle of the thighs. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.

Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you inhale. Tip: Make sure that you keep constant tension no/na abdômen throughout the movement. Also, do not choose a peso so heavy that the lower costas handles the brunt of the work.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable deadlifts
instructions: Move the cables to the bottom of the towers and select an appropriate peso. Stand directly in between the uprights.
