To begin, agachamento down be flexing Seus/Suas hips and knees until you can reach the handles.

After grasping them, begin Seus/Suas ascent. Driving through Seus/Suas heels extend Seus/Suas hips and knees keeping Seus/Suas mãos hanging at Seus/Suas side. Keep Seus/Suas head and peito up throughout the movement.
After reaching a full standing position, Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat.

name: Cable hammer curls - rope attachment
instructions: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley and stand facing the machine about 12 inches away from it.
Grasp the rope with a neutral (palms-in) grip and stand straight up keeping the natural arch of the costas and Seus/Suas torso stationary.
Put Seus/Suas elbows in by Seus/Suas side and keep them there stationary during the entire movement. Tip: Only the forearms should move; not Seus/Suas upper braços. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Using Seus/Suas bíceps, pull Seus/Suas braços up as you exhale until Seus/Suas bíceps touch Seus/Suas forearms. Tip: Remember to keep the elbows in and Seus/Suas upper braços stationary.
After a 1 second contraction where you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps, slowly start to bring the peso costas to the original position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable hip adduction
instructions: Stand in front of a low pulley facing forward with one leg next to the pulley and the other one away.
Attach the ankle cuff to the cable and also to the ankle of the leg that is next to the pulley.
Now step out and away from the stack with a wide stance and grasp the bar of the pulley system.
Stand no/na foot that does not have the ankle cuff (the far foot) and allow the leg com o/a cuff to be pulled towards the low pulley. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now perform the movement by moving the leg com o/a ankle cuff in front of the far leg by using the inner thighs to abduct the hip. Breathe out during this portion of the movement.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then repeat the same movement com o/a opposite leg.

name: Cable incline pushdown
instructions: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overhand; palms down) shoulder width grip and extend Seus/Suas braços in front of you. The bar should be around 2 inches away from Seus/Suas upper thighs. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the upper braços stationary, lift Seus/Suas braços costas in a semi circle until the bar is straight over Seus/Suas head. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
Slowly go costas to the starting position using Seus/Suas lats and hold the contraction once you reach the starting position. Breathe out during the execution of this movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable incline tríceps extension
instructions: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overhand; palms down) narrow grip (less than shoulder width) and keep Seus/Suas elbows tucked in to Seus/Suas sides. Seus/Suas upper braços should create around a 25 degree angle when measured from the floor.
Keeping the upper braços stationary, extend the braços as you flex the tríceps. Breathe out during this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable internal rotation
instructions: Sit next to a low pulley sideways (with pernas stretched in front of you or crossed) and grasp the single hand cable attachment com o/a arm nearest to the cable. Tip: If you can adjust the pulley's height, you can use a flat bench to sit on instead.
Position the elbow against Seus/Suas side com o/a elbow bent at 90° and the arm pointing towards the pulley. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull the single hand cable attachment toward Seus/Suas body by internally rotating Seus/Suas shoulder until Seus/Suas forearm is across Seus/Suas abdômen. You will be creating an imaginary semi-circle. Tip: The forearm should be perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso at all times.
Slowly go costas to the initial position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then repeat the movement com o/a next arm.

name: Cable iron cross
instructions: Begin by moving the pulleys to the high position, select the resistência to be used, and take a handle in each hand.
Stand directly between both pulleys with Seus/Suas braços extended out to Seus/Suas sides. Seus/Suas head and peito should be up while Seus/Suas braços form a "T". Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the elbows extended, pull Seus/Suas braços straight to Seus/Suas sides.
Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position after a pause at the peak contraction.
Continue the movement for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Cable judo flip
instructions: Connect a rope attachment to a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley position. Stand with Seus/Suas side to the cable with a wide stance, and grab the rope with both mãos.
Twist Seus/Suas body away from the pulley as you bring the rope over Seus/Suas shoulder like you're performing a judo flip.
Shift Seus/Suas peso between Seus/Suas pés as you twist and crunch forward, pulling the cable downward.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat until failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: Cable lying tríceps extension
instructions: Lie on a flat bench and grasp the straight bar attachment of a low pulley with a narrow overhand grip. Tip: The easiest way to do this is to have someone hand you the bar as you lay down.
With Seus/Suas braços extended, position the bar over Seus/Suas torso. Seus/Suas braços and Seus/Suas torso should create a 90-degree angle. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Lower the bar by bending at the elbow while keeping the upper braços stationary and elbows in. Go down until the bar lightly touches Seus/Suas forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Flex the tríceps as you lift the bar costas to its starting position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable one arm tricep extension
instructions: With Seus/Suas right hand, grasp a single handle attached to the high-cable pulley using a supinated (underhand; palms facing up) grip. You should be standing directly in front of the peso stack.

Now pull the handle down so that Seus/Suas upper arm and elbow are locked in to the side of Seus/Suas body. Seus/Suas upper arm and forearm should form an acute angle (less than 90-degrees). You can keep the other arm by the waist and you can have one leg in front of you and the other one costas for better balance. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you contract the tríceps, move the single handle attachment down to Seus/Suas side until Seus/Suas arm is straight. Expire ao realizar este movimento. Tip: Only the forearms should move. Seus/Suas upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Squeeze the tríceps and hold for a second in this contracted position.
Slowly return the handle to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then perform the same movement com o/a other arm.

name: Cable preacher curl
instructions: Place a preacher bench about 2 pés in front of a pulley machine.
Attach a straight bar to the low pulley.
Sit at the preacher bench with Seus/Suas elbow and upper braços firmly on top of the bench pad and have someone hand you the bar from the low pulley.
Grab the bar and fully extend Seus/Suas braços on top of the preacher bench pad. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now start pilling the peso up towards Seus/Suas ombros and squeeze the bíceps hard at the top of the movement. Exhale as you perform this motion. Also, hold for a second at the top.
Now Baixe o peso lentamente to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable rear delt fly
instructions: Adjust the pulleys to the appropriate height and adjust the peso. The pulleys should be above Seus/Suas head.
Grab the left pulley with Seus/Suas right hand and the right pulley with Seus/Suas left hand, crossing them in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by moving Seus/Suas braços costas and outward, keeping Seus/Suas braços straight as you execute the movement.
Pause at the end of the motion before returning the handles to the start position.

name: Cable reverse crunch
instructions: Connect an ankle strap attachment to a low pulley cable and position a mat no/na floor in front of it.
Sit down with Seus/Suas pés toward the pulley and attach the cable to Seus/Suas ankles.
Lie down, elevate Seus/Suas pernas and bend Seus/Suas knees at a 90-degree angle. Seus/Suas pernas and the cable should be aligned. If not, adjust the pulley up or down until they are.
With Seus/Suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head, bring Seus/Suas knees inward to Seus/Suas torso and elevate Seus/Suas hips off the floor.

Pause for a moment and in a slow and controlled manner drop Seus/Suas hips and bring Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting 90-degree angle. You should still have tension on Seus/Suas abdômen in the resting position.
Repeat the same movement to failure.

name: Cable rope overhead tríceps extension
instructions: Attach a rope to the bottom pulley of the pulley machine.

Grasping the rope with both mãos, extend Seus/Suas braços with Seus/Suas mãos directly above Seus/Suas head using a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Seus/Suas elbows should be in close to Seus/Suas head and the braços should be perpendicular to the floor com o/a knuckles aimed at the ceiling. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Slowly lower the rope behind Seus/Suas head as you hold the upper braços stationary. Inhale as you perform this movement and pause when Seus/Suas tríceps are fully stretched.
Retorne para a posição inicial by flexing Seus/Suas tríceps as you breathe out.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable rope rear-delt rows
instructions: Sit in the same position on a low pulley row station as you would if you were doing seated cable rows for the costas.
Attach a rope to the pulley and grasp it with an overhand grip. Seus/Suas braços should be extended and parallel to the floor com o/a elbows flared out.
Keep Seus/Suas lower costas upright and slide Seus/Suas hips costas so that Seus/Suas knees are slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull the cable attachment towards Seus/Suas upper peito, just below the neck, as you keep Seus/Suas elbows up and out to the sides. Continue this motion as you exhale until the elbows travel slightly behind the costas. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas upper braços horizontal, perpendicular to the torso and parallel to the floor throughout the motion.
Go costas to the initial position where the braços are extended and the ombros are stretched forward. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable russian twists
instructions: Connect a standard handle attachment, and position the cable to a middle pulley position.
Lie on a stability ball perpendicular to the cable and grab the handle with one hand. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, com o/a tension of the peso no/na cable.
Grab the handle with both mãos and fully extend Seus/Suas braços above Seus/Suas peito. You mãos should be directly in-line com o/a pulley. If not, adjust the pulley up or down until they are.
Keep Seus/Suas hips elevated and abdômen engaged. Rotate Seus/Suas torso away from the pulley for a full-quarter rotation. Seus/Suas body should be flat from head to knees.
Pause for a moment and in a slow and controlled manner reset to the starting position. You should still have side tension no/na cable in the resting position.
Repeat the same movement to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: Cable seated crunch
instructions: Seat on a flat bench with Seus/Suas costas facing a high pulley.

Grasp the cable rope attachment with both mãos (com o/a palms of the mãos facing each other) and Coloque suas mãos securely over both ombros. Tip: Allow the peso to hyperextend the lower costas slightly. Esta será sua posição inicial.
com o/a hips stationary, flex the waist so the elbows travel toward the hips. Breathe out as you perform this step.
As you inhale, go costas to the initial position slowly.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable seated lateral raise
instructions: Stand in the middle of two low pulleys that are opposite to each other and place a flat bench right behind you (in perpendicular fashion to you; the narrow edge of the bench should be the one behind you). Select the peso to be used on each pulley.
Now sit at the edge of the flat bench behind you with Seus/Suas pés placed in front of Seus/Suas knees.
Bend forward while keeping Seus/Suas costas flat and rest Seus/Suas torso no/na thighs.

Have someone give you the single handles attached to the pulleys. Grasp the left pulley com o/a right hand and the right pulley com o/a left after you select Seus/Suas peso. The pulleys should run under Seus/Suas knees and Seus/Suas braços will be extended with palms facing each other and a slight bend at the elbows. This will be the starting position.

While keeping the braços stationary, raise the upper braços to the sides until they are parallel to the floor and at shoulder height. Exhale during the execution of this movement and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas braços to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições. Tip: Maintain upper braços perpendicular to torso and a fixed elbow position (10 degree to 30 degree angle) throughout exercise.

name: Cable desenvolvimento
instructions: Move the cables to the bottom of the towers and select an appropriate peso.
Stand directly in between the uprights. Grasp the cables and hold them at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas head and peito up, extend through the elbow to press the handles directly over head.
After pausing at the top, Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat.

name: Cable shrugs
instructions: Grasp a cable bar attachment that is attached to a low pulley with a shoulder width or slightly wider overhand (palms facing down) grip.
Stand erect close to the pulley with Seus/Suas braços extended in front of you holding the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Lift the bar by elevating the ombros as high as possible as you exhale. Hold the contraction at the top for a second. Tip: The braços should remain extended at all times. Refrain from using the bíceps to help lift the bar. Only the ombros should be moving up and down.
Lower the bar costas to the original position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cable wrist curl
instructions: Start out by placing a flat bench in front of a low pulley cable that has a straight bar attachment.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab the cable bar with a narrow to shoulder width supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against the top of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging just beyond Seus/Suas knees.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling. Keep the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Calf-machine shoulder shrug
instructions: Position yourself no/na calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above Seus/Suas ombros. Seus/Suas torso should be straight com o/a braços extended normally by Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas ombros up towards Seus/Suas ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Calf press
instructions: Adjust the seat so that Seus/Suas pernas are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of Seus/Suas pés should be firmly no/na platform.
Select an appropriate peso, and grasp the handles. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Straighten the pernas by extending the knees, just barely lifting the peso from the stack. Seus/Suas ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of Seus/Suas pés as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.

name: Calf press on the leg press machine
instructions: Using a leg press machine, sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pernas no/na platform directly in front of you at a medium (shoulder width) foot stance.

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until Seus/Suas pernas are fully extended in front of you without locking Seus/Suas knees. (Note: In some leg press units you can leave the safety bars on for increased safety. If Seus/Suas leg press unit allows for this, then this is the preferred method of performing the exercise.) Seus/Suas torso and the pernas should make perfect 90-degree angle. Now carefully place Seus/Suas toes and balls of Seus/Suas pés no/na lower portion of the platform com o/a heels extending off. Toes should be facing forward, outwards or inwards as described at the beginning of the chapter. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Press no/na platform by raising Seus/Suas heels as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas ankles as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering Seus/Suas heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Calf raise on a dumbbell
instructions: Hang on to a sturdy object for balance and stand on a dumbbell handle, preferably one with round plates so that it rolls as in this manner you have to work harder to stabilize yourself; thus increasing the effectiveness of the exercise.
Now roll Seus/Suas foot slightly forward so that you can get a nice stretch of the calf. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Lift the calf as you roll Seus/Suas foot over the top of the handle so that you get a full extension. Exhale during the execution of this movement. Contract the calf hard at the top and hold for a second. Tip: As you come up, roll the dumbbell slightly backward.
Now inhale as you roll the dumbbell slightly forward as you come down to get a better stretch.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Calf raises - with bands
instructions: Grab an exercise band and stand on it with Seus/Suas toes making sure that the length of the band between the foot and the braços is the same for both sides.

While holding the handles of the band, raise the braços to the side of Seus/Suas head as if you were getting ready to perform a desenvolvimento. The palms should be facing forward com o/a elbows bent and to the sides. This movement will create tension no/na band. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the mãos by Seus/Suas shoulder, stand up on Seus/Suas toes as you exhale and contract the calves hard at the top of the movement.
After a one second contraction, slowly go costas down to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Calf stretch elbows against wall
instructions: Stand facing a wall from a couple pés away.
Lean against the wall, placing Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas forearms.
Attempt to keep Seus/Suas heels no/na ground. Hold for 10-20 seconds. You may move further or closer the wall, making it more or less difficult, respectively.

name: Calf stretch mãos against wall
instructions: Stand facing a wall from several pés away. Stagger Seus/Suas stance, placing one foot forward.
Lean forward and rest Seus/Suas mãos no/na wall, keeping Seus/Suas heel, hip and head in a straight line.
Attempt to keep Seus/Suas heel no/na ground. Hold for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.

name: Calves-smr
instructions: Begin seated no/na floor. Place a foam roller underneath Seus/Suas lower leg. Seus/Suas other leg can either be crossed over the opposite or be placed no/na floor, supporting some of Seus/Suas peso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Coloque suas mãos to Seus/Suas side or just behind you, and press down to raise Seus/Suas hips off of the floor, placing much of Seus/Suas peso against Seus/Suas calf muscle. Roll from below the knee to above the ankle, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat for the other leg.

name: Car levantamento terra
instructions: This event apparatus typically has neutral grip handles, however some have a straight bar that you can approach like a normal levantamento terra. The apparatus can be loaded with a vehicle or other heavy objects such as tractor tires or kegs.

Center yourself between the handles if you are a strong squatter, or costas a couple inches if you are a strong deadlifter. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the handles. With Seus/Suas pés and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and flex the knees.

Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. As the peso comes up, pull Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward.
Lower the peso by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Car drivers
instructions: While standing upright, hold a barbell plate in both mãos at the 3 and 9 o'clock positions. Seus/Suas palms should be facing each other and Seus/Suas braços should be extended straight out in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by rotating the plate as far to one side as possible. Use the same type of movement you would use to turn a steering wheel to one side.
Reverse the motion, turning it all the way to the opposite side.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Carioca quick step
instructions: Begin with Seus/Suas pés a few inches apart and Seus/Suas left arm up in a relaxed, athletic position.
With Seus/Suas right foot, quick step behind and pull the knee up.

Fire Seus/Suas braços costas up when you pull the right knee, being sure that Seus/Suas knee goes straight up and down. Avoid turning Seus/Suas pés as you move and continue to look forward as you move to the side.

name: Cat stretch
instructions: Position yourself no/na floor on Seus/Suas mãos and knees.
Pull Seus/Suas belly in and round Seus/Suas spine, lower costas, ombros, and neck, letting Seus/Suas head drop.
Hold for 15 seconds.

name: Catch and overhead throw
instructions: Begin standing while facing a wall or a partner.
Using both mãos, position the ball behind Seus/Suas head, stretching as much as possible, and forcefully throw the ball forward.

Ensure that you follow Seus/Suas throw through, being prepared to receive Seus/Suas rebound from Seus/Suas throw. If you are throwing against the wall, make sure that you stand close enough to the wall to receive the rebound, and aim a little higher than you would with a partner.

name: Chain handle extension
instructions: You will need two cable handle attachments and a flat bench, as well as chains, for this exercise. Clip the middle of the chains to the handles, and position yourself no/na flat bench. Seus/Suas elbows should be pointing straight up.
Begin by extending through the elbow, keeping Seus/Suas upper arm still, with Seus/Suas wrists pronated.
Pause at the lockout, and reverse the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Chain press
instructions: Begin by connecting the chains to the cable handle attachments. Position yourself no/na flat bench in the same position as for a dumbbell press. Seus/Suas wrists should be pronated and braços perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the chains by flexing the elbows, unloading some of the chain onto the floor.
Continue until Seus/Suas elbow forms a 90 degree angle, and then reverse the motion by extending through the elbow to lockout.

name: Chair leg extended stretch
instructions: Sit upright in a chair and grip the seat no/na sides.
Raise one leg, extending the knee, flexing the ankle as you do so.
Slowly move that leg outward as far as you can, and then costas to the center and down.
Repeat for Seus/Suas other leg.

name: Chair lower costas stretch
instructions: Sit upright on a chair.
Bend to one side with Seus/Suas arm over Seus/Suas head. You can hold onto the chair with Seus/Suas free hand.
Hold for 10 seconds, and repeat for Seus/Suas other side.

name: Chair agachamento
instructions: To begin, first set the bar to a position that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the bar is loaded, step under it and position it across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros.
Take the bar with Seus/Suas mãos facing forward, unlock it and lift it off the rack by extending Seus/Suas pernas.

Move Seus/Suas pés forward about 18 inches in front of the bar. Position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Look forward at all times and maintain a neutral or slightly arched spine. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper and lower leg breaks 90 degrees.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés, extending the knees and returning to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Chair upper body stretch
instructions: Sit no/na edge of a chair, gripping the costas of it.
Straighten Seus/Suas braços, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight, and pull Seus/Suas upper body forward so you feel a stretch. Hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Peito and front of shoulder stretch
instructions: Start off by standing with Seus/Suas pernas together, holding a bodybar or a broomstick.
Take a slightly wider than shoulder width grip no/na pole and hold it in front of you with Seus/Suas palms facing down.
Carefully lift the pole up and behind Seus/Suas head.

name: Peito push from 3 point stance
instructions: Begin in a three point stance, squatted down with Seus/Suas costas flat and one hand no/na ground. Place the medicine ball directly in front of you.
To begin, take Seus/Suas first step as you pull the ball to Seus/Suas peito, positioning both mãos to prepare for the throw.
As you execute the second step, explosively release the ball forward as hard as possible.

name: Peito push (multiple response)
instructions: Begin in a kneeling position facing a wall or utilize a partner. Hold the ball with both mãos tight into the peito.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward com o/a hips while pushing the ball as hard as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with Seus/Suas mãos.
Immediately return to an upright position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Peito push (single response)
instructions: Begin in a kneeling position holding the medicine ball with both mãos tightly into the peito.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward com o/a hips while pushing the ball as far as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with Seus/Suas mãos.

name: Peito push with run release
instructions: Begin in an athletic stance com o/a knees bent, hips costas, and costas flat. Hold the medicine ball near Seus/Suas pernas. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While taking Seus/Suas first step draw the medicine ball into Seus/Suas peito.
As you take the second step, explosively push the ball forward, immediately sprinting for 10 yards after the release. If you are really fast, you can catch Seus/Suas own pass!

name: Peito stretch on stability ball
instructions: Get on Seus/Suas mãos and knees next to an exercise ball.
Place Seus/Suas elbows on top of the ball, keeping Seus/Suas arm out to Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower Seus/Suas torso towards the floor, keeping Seus/Suas elbow on top of the ball. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, and repeat com o/a other arm.

name: Child's pose
instructions: Get on Seus/Suas mãos and knees, walk Seus/Suas mãos in front of you.
Lower Seus/Suas buttocks down to sit on Seus/Suas heels. Let Seus/Suas braços drag along the floor as you sit costas to stretch Seus/Suas entire spine.

Once you settle onto Seus/Suas heels, bring Seus/Suas mãos next to Seus/Suas pés and relax. "breathe" into Seus/Suas costas. Rest Seus/Suas forehead no/na floor. Avoid this position if you have knee problems.

name: Chin-up
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms facing Seus/Suas torso and a grip closer than the shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, keep Seus/Suas torso as straight as possible while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position. Tip: Keeping the torso as straight as possible maximizes bíceps stimulation while minimizing costas involvement.

As you breathe out, pull Seus/Suas torso up until Seus/Suas head is around the level of the pull-up bar. Concentrate on using the bíceps muscles in order to perform the movement. Keep the elbows close to Seus/Suas body. Tip: The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.

After a second of squeezing the bíceps in the contracted position, slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position; when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Chin to peito stretch
instructions: Get into a seated position no/na floor.

Place both mãos at the rear of Seus/Suas head, fingers interlocked, thumbs pointing down and elbows pointing straight ahead. Slowly pull Seus/Suas head down to Seus/Suas peito. Hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Circus bell
instructions: The circus bell is an oversized dumbbell with a thick handle. Begin com o/a dumbbell between Seus/Suas pés, and grip the handle with both mãos.
Clean the dumbbell by extending through Seus/Suas hips and knees to deliver the implement to the desired shoulder, letting go com o/a extra hand.

Ensure that you get one of the dumbbell heads behind the shoulder to keep from being thrown off balance. To raise it overhead, dip by flexing the knees, and the drive upwards as you extend the dumbbell overhead, leaning slightly away from it as you do so.
Carefully guide the bell costas to the floor, keeping it under control as much as possible. It is best to perform this event on a thick rubber mat to prevent damage to the floor.

name: Clean
instructions: With a barbell no/na floor close to the shins, take an overhand (or hook) grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, com o/a braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front agachamento position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom agachamento position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

name: Clean levantamento terra
instructions: Begin standing with a barbell close to Seus/Suas shins. Seus/Suas pés should be directly under Seus/Suas hips with Seus/Suas pés turned out slightly. Grip the bar with a double overhand grip or hook grip, about shoulder width apart. agachamento down to the bar. Seus/Suas spine should be in full extension, with a costas angle that places Seus/Suas ombros in front of the bar and Seus/Suas costas as vertical as possible.

Begin by driving through the floor through the front of Seus/Suas heels. As the bar travels upward, maintain a constant costas angle. Flare Seus/Suas knees out to the side to help keep them out of the bar's path.
After the bar crosses the knees, complete the lift by driving the hips into the bar until Seus/Suas hips and knees are extended.

name: Clean pull
instructions: With a barbell no/na floor close to the shins, take an overhand or hook grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight and elbows out. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, com o/a braços still extended. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.

name: Clean shrug
instructions: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, com o/a bar hanging at the mid thigh position. Seus/Suas costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug Seus/Suas ombros towards Seus/Suas ears. While this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier peso than a clean, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.

name: Clean and jerk
instructions: With a barbell no/na floor close to the shins, take an overhand or hook grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, com o/a braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front agachamento position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom agachamento position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

The second phase is the jerk, which raises the peso overhead. Standing com o/a peso racked no/na front of the ombros, begin com o/a dip. With Seus/Suas pés directly under Seus/Suas hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move Seus/Suas head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros.

At this moment as the pés leave the floor, the pés must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should be split, with one foot forward, and one foot costas. Receive the bar com o/a braços locked out overhead. Return to a standing position.

name: Clean and press
instructions: Assume a shoulder-width stance, with knees inside the braços. Now while keeping the costas flat, bend at the knees and hips so that you can grab the bar com o/a braços fully extended and a pronated grip that is slightly wider than shoulder width. Point the elbows out to sides. The bar should be close to the shins. Position the ombros over or slightly ahead of the bar. Establish a flat costas posture. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin to pull the bar by extending the knees. Move Seus/Suas hips forward and raise the ombros at the same rate while keeping the angle of the costas constant; continue to lift the bar straight up while keeping it close to Seus/Suas body.

As the bar passes the knee, extend at the ankles, knees, and hips forcefully, similar to a jumping motion. As you do so, continue to guide the bar with Seus/Suas mãos, shrugging Seus/Suas ombros and using the momentum from Seus/Suas movement to pull the bar as high as possible. The bar should travel close to Seus/Suas body, and you should keep Seus/Suas elbows out.

At maximum elevation, Seus/Suas pés should clear the floor and you should start to pull yourself sob o/a bar. The mechanics of this could change slightly, depending no/na peso used. You should descend into a squatting position as you pull yourself sob o/a bar.

As the bar hits terminal height, rotate Seus/Suas elbows around and sob o/a bar. Rack the bar across the front of the ombros while keeping the torso erect and flexing the hips and knees to absorb the peso of the bar.
Stand to full height, holding the bar in the clean position.
Without moving Seus/Suas pés, press the bar overhead as you exhale. Lower the bar under control .

name: Clean from blocks
instructions: With a barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height, take an overhand or hook grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight com o/a elbows pointed out.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the receiving position by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out. Aggressively pull yourself down, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front agachamento position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom agachamento position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position. Return the peso to the boxes for the next rep.

name: Clock push-up
instructions: Move into a prone position no/na floor, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas mãos and toes.
Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended com o/a mãos around shoulder width. Keep Seus/Suas body straight throughout the movement. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering Seus/Suas peito toward the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible until you are air borne. Aim to "jump" 12-18 inches to one side.
As you accelerate up, move Seus/Suas outside foot away from Seus/Suas direction of travel. Leaving the ground, shift Seus/Suas body about 30 degrees for the next repetition.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat the exercise, working all the way around until you are costas where you started.

name: Close-grip barbell supino
instructions: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a close grip (around shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas middle peito. Tip: Make sure that - as opposed to a regular supino - you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize tríceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas tríceps muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Close-grip dumbbell press
instructions: Place a dumbbell standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the dumbbell stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench with only Seus/Suas ombros lying no/na surface. Hips should be below the bench and Seus/Suas pernas bent with Seus/Suas pés firmly no/na floor.

Grasp the dumbbell with both mãos and hold it straight over Seus/Suas peito at arm's length. Both palms should be pressing against the underside of the sides of the dumbbell. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by lowering the dumbbell to Seus/Suas peito.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the elbows.

name: Close-grip ez-bar curl with band
instructions: Attach a band to each end of the bar. Take the bar, placing a foot no/na middle of the band. Stand upright with a narrow, supinated grip no/na EZ bar. The elbows should be close to the torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the upper braços in place, flex the elbows to execute the curl. Exhale as the peso is lifted.
Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the bíceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Close-grip ez-bar press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with an EZ bar loaded to an appropriate peso.
Using a narrow grip lift the bar and hold it straight over Seus/Suas torso with Seus/Suas elbows in. The braços should be perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now lower the bar down to Seus/Suas lower peito as you breathe in. Keep the elbows in as you perform this movement.
Using the tríceps to push the bar costas up, press it costas to the starting position by extending the elbows as you exhale.
Repeat.

name: Close-grip ez bar curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding an E-Z Curl Bar at the closer inner handle. The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward and they should be slightly tilted inwards due to the shape of the bar. The elbows should be close to the torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the bíceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Close-grip front lat pulldown
instructions: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit Seus/Suas height. These pads will prevent Seus/Suas body from being raised by the resistência attached to the bar.

Grab the bar com o/a palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than Seus/Suas shoulder width. For a medium grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to Seus/Suas shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than Seus/Suas shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you - while holding the bar at the chosen grip width - bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

As you breathe out, bring the bar down until it touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary (only the braços should move). The forearms should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull the bar down using the forearms.

After a second in the contracted position, while squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movement.
6. Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Close-grip push-up off of a dumbbell
instructions: Lie no/na floor and Coloque suas mãos on an upright dumbbell. Supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas toes and mãos, keep Seus/Suas torso rigid and Seus/Suas elbows in with Seus/Suas braços straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower Seus/Suas body, allowing the elbows to flex while you inhale. Keep Seus/Suas body straight, not allowing Seus/Suas hips to rise or sag.
Press yourself costas up to the starting position by extending the elbows. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Close-grip standing barbell curl
instructions: Hold a barbell with both mãos, palms up and a few inches apart.

Stand with Seus/Suas torso straight and Seus/Suas head up. Seus/Suas pés should be about shoulder width and Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: You will keep Seus/Suas upper braços and elbows stationary throughout the movement.

Curl the bar up in a semicircular motion until the forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and contract Seus/Suas bíceps hard for a second at the top. Tip: Avoid bending the costas or using swinging motions as you lift the peso. Only the forearms should move.
Slowly go costas down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cocoons
instructions: Begin by lying on Seus/Suas costas no/na ground. Seus/Suas pernas should be straight and Seus/Suas braços extended behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.

To perform the movement, tuck the knees toward Seus/Suas peito, rotating Seus/Suas pelvis to lift Seus/Suas glúteos from the floor. As you do so, flex the spine, bringing Seus/Suas braços costas over Seus/Suas head to perform a simultaneous crunch motion.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Conan's wheel
instructions: com o/a peso loaded, take a zurcher hold no/na end of the implement. Place the bar in the crook of the elbow and hold onto Seus/Suas wrist. Try to keep the peso off of the forearms.

Begin by lifting the peso from the ground. Keep a tight, upright posture as you being to walk, taking short, fast steps. Look up and away as you turn in a circle. Do not hold Seus/Suas breath during the event. Continue walking until you complete one or more complete turns.

name: Concentration curls
instructions: Sit down on a flat bench with one dumbbell in front of you between Seus/Suas pernas. Seus/Suas pernas should be spread with Seus/Suas knees bent and pés no/na floor.

Use Seus/Suas right arm to pick the dumbbell up. Place the costas of Seus/Suas right upper arm no/na top of Seus/Suas inner right thigh. Rotate the palm of Seus/Suas hand until it is facing forward away from Seus/Suas thigh. Tip: Seus/Suas arm should be extended and the dumbbell should be above the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Tip: At the top of the movement make sure that the little finger of Seus/Suas arm is higher than Seus/Suas thumb. This guarantees a good contraction. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. Caution: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições. Then repeat the movement com o/a left arm.

name: Cross-body crunch
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas and bend Seus/Suas knees about 60 degrees.
Keep Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor and Coloque suas mãos loosely behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now curl up and bring Seus/Suas right elbow and shoulder across Seus/Suas body while bring Seus/Suas left knee in toward Seus/Suas left shoulder at the same time. Reach with Seus/Suas elbow and try to touch Seus/Suas knee. Exhale as you perform this movement. Tip: Try to bring Seus/Suas shoulder up towards Seus/Suas knee rather than just Seus/Suas elbow and remember that the key is to contract the abdômen as you perform the movement; not just to move the elbow.
Now go costas down to the starting position as you inhale and repeat com o/a left elbow and the right knee.
Continue alternating in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.

name: Cross body hammer curl
instructions: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand. Seus/Suas mãos should be down at Seus/Suas side with Seus/Suas palms facing in.

While keeping Seus/Suas palms facing in and without twisting Seus/Suas arm, curl the dumbbell of the right arm up towards Seus/Suas left shoulder as you exhale. Touch the top of the dumbbell to Seus/Suas shoulder and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path as you inhale and then repeat the same movement for the left arm.
Continue alternating in this fashion until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed for each arm.

name: Cross over - with bands
instructions: Secure an exercise band around a stationary post.
While facing away from the post, grab the handles on both ends of the band and step forward enough to create tension no/na band.

Raise Seus/Suas braços to the sides, parallel to the floor, perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso (Seus/Suas torso and the braços should resemble the letter "T") and com o/a palms facing forward. Have them extended with a slight bend at the elbows. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, bring them across Seus/Suas peito in a semicircular motion to the front as you exhale and flex Seus/Suas pecs. Hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you inhale.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Crossover reverse lunge
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping costas with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate Seus/Suas torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat no/na other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.

name: Crucifix
instructions: In the crucifix, you statically hold peso out to the side for time. While the event can be practiced using dumbbells, it is best to practice with one of the various implements used, such as axes and hammers, as it feels different.

Begin standing, and raise Seus/Suas braços out to the side holding the implements. Seus/Suas braços should be parallel to the ground. In competition, judges or sensors are used to let you know when you break parallel. Hold for as long as you can. Typically, the peso should be heavy enough that you fail in 30-60 seconds.

name: Crunch - mãos overhead
instructions: Lie no/na floor with Seus/Suas costas flat and knees bent with around a 60-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves.
Keep Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor and stretch Seus/Suas braços overhead with Seus/Suas palms crossed. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Curl Seus/Suas upper body forward and bring Seus/Suas shoulder blades just off the floor. At all times, keep Seus/Suas braços aligned with Seus/Suas head, neck and shoulder. Don't move them forward from that position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Crunch - pernas on exercise ball
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pés resting on an exercise ball and Seus/Suas knees dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus.
Place Seus/Suas pés three to four inches apart and point Seus/Suas toes inward so they touch.
Coloque suas mãos lightly on either side of Seus/Suas head keeping Seus/Suas elbows in. Tip: Don't lock Seus/Suas fingers behind Seus/Suas head.
Push the small of Seus/Suas costas down in the floor in order to better isolate Seus/Suas abdominal muscles. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin to roll Seus/Suas ombros off the floor and continue to push down as hard as you can with Seus/Suas lower costas. Seus/Suas ombros should come up off the floor only about four inches, and Seus/Suas lower costas should remain no/na floor. Breathe out as you execute this portion of the movement. Squeeze Seus/Suas abdominals hard at the top of the contraction and hold for a second. Tip: Focus on a slow, controlled movement. Refrain from using momentum at any time.
Slowly go costas down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Crunches
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground, or resting on a bench with Seus/Suas knees dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus. If you are resting Seus/Suas pés on a bench, place them three to four inches apart and point Seus/Suas toes inward so they touch.
Now Coloque suas mãos lightly on either side of Seus/Suas head keeping Seus/Suas elbows in. Tip: Don't lock Seus/Suas fingers behind Seus/Suas head.
While pushing the small of Seus/Suas costas down in the floor to better isolate Seus/Suas abdominal muscles, begin to roll Seus/Suas ombros off the floor.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with Seus/Suas lower costas as you contract Seus/Suas abdominals and exhale. Seus/Suas ombros should come up off the floor only about four inches, and Seus/Suas lower costas should remain no/na floor. At the top of the movement, contract Seus/Suas abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Tip: Focus on slow, controlled movement - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Cuban press
instructions: Take a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated grip in a standing position. Raise Seus/Suas upper braços so that they are parallel to the floor, allowing Seus/Suas lower braços to hang in the "scarecrow" position. Esta será sua posição inicial.

To initiate the movement, externally rotate the ombros to move the upper arm 180 degrees. Keep the upper braços in place, rotating the upper braços until the wrists are directly above the elbows, the forearms perpendicular to the floor.
Now press the dumbbells by extending at the elbows, straightening Seus/Suas braços overhead.
Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in by reversing the steps.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dancer's stretch
instructions: Sit up no/na floor.
Cross Seus/Suas right leg over Seus/Suas left, keeping the knee bent. Seus/Suas left leg is straight and down no/na floor.
Place Seus/Suas left arm on Seus/Suas right leg and Seus/Suas right hand no/na floor.
Rotate Seus/Suas upper body to the right, and hold for 10-20 seconds. Switch sides.

name: Dead bug
instructions: Begin lying on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas mãos extended above you toward the ceiling.
Bring Seus/Suas pés, knees, and hips up to 90 degrees.

Exhale hard to bring Seus/Suas ribcage down and flatten Seus/Suas costas onto the floor, rotating Seus/Suas pelvis up and squeezing Seus/Suas glúteos. Hold this position throughout the movement. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the exercise by extending one leg, straightening the knee and hip to bring the leg just above the ground.
Maintain the position of Seus/Suas lumbar and pelvis as you perform the movement, as Seus/Suas costas is going to want to arch.
Stay tight and return the working leg to the starting position.
Repeat no/na opposite side, alternating until the set is complete.

name: Levantamento terra with bands
instructions: To levantamento terra with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. For long bands, they will need to be anchored to a secure base, such as heavy dumbbells or a rack.

With Seus/Suas pés, and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and bend the knees until Seus/Suas shins contact the bar. Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Levantamento terra with chains
instructions: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater peso increase as you lift.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over Seus/Suas pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing Seus/Suas shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets. With Seus/Suas pés, and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and bend the knees until Seus/Suas shins contact the bar.

Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Decline barbell supino
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down no/na bench.

Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. The braços should be perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: In order to protect Seus/Suas rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas lower peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Decline close-grip bench to skull crusher
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down no/na bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked and elbows in. The braços should be perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: In order to protect Seus/Suas rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.
Now lower the bar down to Seus/Suas lower peito as you breathe in. Keep the elbows in as you perform this movement.
Using the tríceps to push the bar costas up, press it costas to the starting position as you exhale.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper braços stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving Seus/Suas forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch Seus/Suas forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the bar costas to the starting position by contracting the tríceps and exhaling.
Repeat steps 3-6 until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed.

name: Decline crunch
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down.
Now Coloque suas mãos lightly on either side of Seus/Suas head keeping Seus/Suas elbows in. Tip: Don't lock Seus/Suas fingers behind Seus/Suas head.
While pushing the small of Seus/Suas costas down in the bench to better isolate Seus/Suas abdominal muscles, begin to roll Seus/Suas ombros off it.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with Seus/Suas lower costas as you contract Seus/Suas abdominals and exhale. Seus/Suas ombros should come up off the bench only about four inches, and Seus/Suas lower costas should remain no/na bench. At the top of the movement, contract Seus/Suas abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Tip: Focus on slow, controlled movement - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Decline dumbbell supino
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.
Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate Seus/Suas wrists forward so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing away from you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Bring down the peso slowly to Seus/Suas side as you breathe out. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, squeeze Seus/Suas peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up..
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.

name: Decline dumbbell flyes
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the mãos should be facing each other and the braços should be perpendicular to the floor and fully extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.

With a slight bend on Seus/Suas elbows in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon, lower Seus/Suas braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on Seus/Suas peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the braços should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position as you squeeze Seus/Suas peito muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the peso.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Decline dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the mãos should be facing each other and the braços should be perpendicular to the floor and fully extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper braços stationary (and elbows in), bring the dumbbells down slowly by moving Seus/Suas forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until Seus/Suas thumbs are next to Seus/Suas ears. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the dumbbells costas to the starting position by contracting the tríceps and exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Decline ez bar tríceps extension
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down no/na bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the EZ bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked and elbows in. The braços should be perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: In order to protect Seus/Suas rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper braços stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving Seus/Suas forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch Seus/Suas forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the bar costas to the starting position by contracting the tríceps and exhaling.
Repeat until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed.

name: Decline oblique crunch
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down no/na bench.
Raise Seus/Suas upper body off the bench until Seus/Suas torso is about 35-45 degrees if measured from the floor.
Put one hand beside Seus/Suas head and the other on Seus/Suas thigh. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas upper body slowly from the starting position while turning Seus/Suas torso to the left. Continue crunching up as you exhale until Seus/Suas right elbow touches Seus/Suas left knee. Hold this contracted position for a second. Tip: Focus on keeping Seus/Suas abdômen tight and keeping the movement slow and controlled.
Lower Seus/Suas body costas down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.

After completing one set no/na right for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch to Seus/Suas left side. Tip: Focus on really twisting Seus/Suas torso and feeling the contraction when you are in the up position.

name: Decline push-up
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and Coloque suas mãos about 36 inches apart while holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços length. Move Seus/Suas pés up to a box or bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Next, lower yourself downward until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Now breathe out and press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position while squeezing Seus/Suas peito.
After a brief pause at the top contracted position, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.

name: Decline reverse crunch
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas on a decline bench and hold on to the top of the bench with both mãos. Don't let Seus/Suas body slip down from this position.

Hold Seus/Suas pernas parallel to the floor using Seus/Suas abdômen to hold them there while keeping Seus/Suas knees and pés together. Tip: Seus/Suas pernas should be fully extended with a slight bend no/na knee. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While exhaling, move Seus/Suas pernas towards the torso as you roll Seus/Suas pelvis backwards and you raise Seus/Suas hips off the bench. At the end of this movement Seus/Suas knees will be touching Seus/Suas peito.
Hold the contraction for a second and move Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Decline smith press
instructions: Place a decline bench underneath the Smith machine. Now place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and Seus/Suas braços are almost fully extended. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you inhale, lower the bar under control by allowing the elbows to flex, lightly contacting the torso.
After a brief pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position by extending the elbows, exhaling as you do so.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When the set is complete, lock the bar costas in the rack.

name: Deficit levantamento terra
instructions: Begin by having a platform or peso plates that you can stand on, usually 1-3 inches in height. Approach the bar so that it is centered over Seus/Suas pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing Seus/Suas shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With Seus/Suas pés, and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and bend the knees until Seus/Suas shins contact the bar. Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Depth jump leap
instructions: For this drill you will need two boxes or benches, one 12 to 16 inches high and the other 22 to 26 inches high.

Stand on one of the two boxes with braços at the sides; pés should be together and slightly off the edge as in the depth jump. Place the other box approximately two or three pés in front of and facing the performer.
Begin by dropping off the initial box, landing and simultaneously taking off with both pés.
Rebound by driving upward and outward as intensely as possible, using the braços and full extension of the body to jump onto the higher box. Again, allow the pernas to absorb the impact.

name: Dip machine
instructions: Sit securely in a dip machine, select the peso and firmly grasp the handles.
Now keep Seus/Suas elbows in at Seus/Suas sides in order to place emphasis no/na tríceps. The elbows should be dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus.

As you contract the tríceps, extend Seus/Suas braços downwards as you exhale. Tip: At the bottom of the movement, focus on keeping a little bend in Seus/Suas braços to keep tension no/na tríceps muscle.
Now slowly let Seus/Suas braços come costas up to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dips - peito version
instructions: For this exercise you will need access to parallel bars. To get yourself into the starting position, hold Seus/Suas body at braços length (braços locked) above the bars.
While breathing in, lower yourself slowly with Seus/Suas torso leaning forward around 30 degrees or so and Seus/Suas elbows flared out slightly until you feel a slight stretch in the peito.
Once you feel the stretch, use Seus/Suas peito to bring Seus/Suas body costas to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Remember to squeeze the peito at the top of the movement for a second.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Dips - tríceps version
instructions: To get into the starting position, hold Seus/Suas body at arm's length with Seus/Suas braços nearly locked above the bars.

Now, inhale and slowly lower yourself downward. Seus/Suas torso should remain upright and Seus/Suas elbows should stay close to Seus/Suas body. This helps to better focus on tricep involvement. Lower yourself until there is a 90 degree angle formed between the upper arm and forearm.
Then, exhale and push Seus/Suas torso costas up using Seus/Suas tríceps to bring Seus/Suas body costas to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Donkey calf raises
instructions: For this exercise you will need access to a donkey calf raise machine. Start by positioning Seus/Suas lower costas and hips sob o/a padded lever provided. The tailbone area should be the one making contact com o/a pad.

Place both of Seus/Suas braços no/na side handles and place the balls of Seus/Suas pés no/na calf block com o/a heels extending off. Align the toes forward, inward or outward, depending no/na area you wish to target, and straighten the knees without locking them. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas heels as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas ankles as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering Seus/Suas heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Double kettlebell alternating hang clean
instructions: Place two kettlebells between Seus/Suas pés. To get in the starting position, push Seus/Suas butt costas and look straight ahead.
Clean one kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell.
With a fluid motion, lower the top kettlebell while driving the bottom kettlebell up.

name: Double kettlebell jerk
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle in each hand.

Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Dip Seus/Suas body by bending the knees, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.
Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum.
As you do so, press the kettlebells overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using Seus/Suas body's momentum to move the peso.
Return Seus/Suas pés to the ground in a split fashion, with one foot forward and one foot costas.
Keeping the peso overhead, return to a standing position, bringing Seus/Suas pés together. Lower the peso to perform the next repetition.

name: Double kettlebell push press
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros.
agachamento down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly. Use the momentum from the pernas to drive the kettlebells overhead.
Once the kettlebells are locked out, lower the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros and repeat.

name: Double kettlebell snatch
instructions: Place two kettlebells behind Seus/Suas pés. Bend Seus/Suas knees and sit costas to pick up the kettlebells.
Swing the kettlebells between Seus/Suas pernas forcefully and reverse the direction.
Drive through with Seus/Suas hips and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.

name: Double kettlebell windmill
instructions: Place a kettlebell in front of Seus/Suas front foot and clean and press a kettlebell overhead with Seus/Suas opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push Seus/Suas butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn Seus/Suas pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm com o/a locked out kettlebell.

Bending at the hip to one side, sticking Seus/Suas butt out, slowly lean until you can retrieve the kettlebell from the floor. Keep Seus/Suas eyes no/na kettlebell that you hold over Seus/Suas head at all times.
Pause for a second after retrieving the kettlebell from the ground and reverse the motion costas to the starting position.

name: Double leg butt kick
instructions: Begin standing with Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Quickly agachamento a short distance, flexing the hips and knees, and immediately extend to jump for maximum vertical height.
As you go up, tuck Seus/Suas heels by flexing the knees, attempting to touch the buttocks.
Finish the motion by landing com o/a knees only partially bent, using Seus/Suas pernas to absorb the impact.

name: Downward facing balance
instructions: Lie facedown on top of an exercise ball.
While resting on Seus/Suas stomach no/na ball, walk Seus/Suas mãos forward along the floor and lift Seus/Suas pernas, extending Seus/Suas elbows and knees.

name: Drag curl
instructions: Grab a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing forward) and get Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso and costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, curl the bar up while keeping the elbows to the costas as you "Drag" the bar up by keeping it in contact with Seus/Suas torso. Tip: As you can see, you will not be keeping the elbows pinned to Seus/Suas sides, but instead you will be bringing them costas. Also, do not lift Seus/Suas ombros.
Slowly go costas to the starting position as you keep the bar in contact com o/a torso at all times.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Drop push
instructions: Position low boxes or other platforms 2-3 pés apart.
