Move to a flexão position between them, supporting yourself by placing Seus/Suas mãos no/na boxes.
With good posture, drop from the platforms by pressing up and moving Seus/Suas mãos to shoulder width, cushioning Seus/Suas landing by absorbing the impact through the arm.

name: Dumbbell alternate rosca bíceps
instructions: Stand (torso upright) with a dumbbell in each hand held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso and the palms of Seus/Suas hand should be facing Seus/Suas thighs.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right peso as you rotate the palm of the mãos until they are facing forward. At this point continue contracting the bíceps as you breathe out until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.

Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell costas to the starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. Tip: Remember to twist the palms costas to the starting position (facing Seus/Suas thighs) as you come down.
Repeat the movement com o/a left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell supino
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand resting on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos will be facing each other.
Then, using Seus/Suas thighs to help raise the dumbbells up, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, rotate Seus/Suas wrists forward so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing away from you. The dumbbells should be just to the sides of Seus/Suas peito, with Seus/Suas upper arm and forearm creating a 90 degree angle. Be sure to maintain full control of the dumbbells at all times. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Then, as you breathe out, use Seus/Suas peito to push the dumbbells up. Lock Seus/Suas braços at the top of the lift and squeeze Seus/Suas peito, hold for a second and then begin coming down slowly. Tip: Ideally, lowering the peso should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.

name: Dumbbell supino with neutral grip
instructions: Take a dumbbell in each hand and lay costas onto a flat bench. Seus/Suas pés should be flat no/na floor and Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted.
Maintaining a neutral grip, palms facing each other, begin with Seus/Suas braços extended directly above you, perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing the elbow, lowering the upper braços to the side. Descend until the dumbbells are to Seus/Suas torso.
Pause, then extend the elbow and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Dumbbell rosca bíceps
instructions: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand at arm's length. Keep Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso and rotate the palms of Seus/Suas mãos until they are facing forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now, keeping the upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the peso while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps. Continue to raise the peso until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell clean
instructions: Begin standing with a dumbbell in each hand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart.
Lower the peso to the floor by flexing at the hips and knees, pushing Seus/Suas hips costas until the dumbbells reach the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

To initiate the movement, violently jump upward by extending the hips, knees, and ankles to acclerate the peso upward. Maintaining a neutral grip no/na dumbbells, keep the braços straight until full extension is reached.
After full extension, rebend the hips and knees to receive the peso in a agachamento position. Allow the braços to bend, guiding the dumbbells to Seus/Suas ombros.
Upon receiving the peso in the agachamento position, extend the hips and knees to finish in a standing position com o/a peso on Seus/Suas ombros.

name: Dumbbell floor press
instructions: Lay no/na floor holding dumbbells in Seus/Suas mãos. Seus/Suas knees can be bent. Begin com o/a peso fully extended above you.

Lower the peso until Seus/Suas upper arm comes in contact com o/a floor. You can tuck Seus/Suas elbows to emphasize tríceps size and strength, or to focus on Seus/Suas peito angle Seus/Suas braços to the side.
Pause at the bottom, and then bring the peso together at the top by extending through the elbows.

name: Dumbbell flyes
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell on each hand resting on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.

Then using Seus/Suas thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing each other. Raise the dumbbells up like you're pressing them, but stop and hold just before you lock out. Esta será sua posição inicial.

With a slight bend on Seus/Suas elbows in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon, lower Seus/Suas braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on Seus/Suas peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the braços should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position as you squeeze Seus/Suas peito muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the peso.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Dumbbell incline row
instructions: Using a neutral grip, lean into an incline bench.
Take a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip, beginning com o/a braços straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Retract the shoulder blades and flex the elbows to row the dumbbells to Seus/Suas side.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Dumbbell incline shoulder raise
instructions: Sit on an Incline Bench while holding a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs.

Lift Seus/Suas pernas up to kick the peso to Seus/Suas ombros and lean costas. Position the dumbbells above Seus/Suas ombros with Seus/Suas braços extended. The braços should be perpendicular to the floor with Seus/Suas palms facing forward and knuckles pointing towards the ceiling. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the braços straight and locked, lift the dumbbells by raising the ombros from the bench as you breathe out.
Bring costas the dumbbells to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell lunges
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas torso upright holding two dumbbells in Seus/Suas mãos by Seus/Suas sides. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Step forward with Seus/Suas right leg around 2 pés or so from the foot being left stationary behind and lower Seus/Suas upper body down, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: As in the other exercises, do not allow Seus/Suas knee to go forward beyond Seus/Suas toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress no/na knee joint. Make sure that you keep Seus/Suas front shin perpendicular to the ground.
Using mainly the heel of Seus/Suas foot, push up and go costas to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform com o/a left leg.

name: Dumbbell lying one-arm rear lateral raise
instructions: While holding a dumbbell in one hand, lay with Seus/Suas peito down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the floor) adjustable bench. The other hand can be used to hold to the leg of the bench for stability.
Position the palm of the hand that is holding the dumbbell in a neutral manner (palms facing Seus/Suas torso) as you keep the arm extended com o/a elbow slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now raise the arm com o/a dumbbell to the side until Seus/Suas elbow is at shoulder height and Seus/Suas arm is roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain Seus/Suas arm perpendicular to the torso while keeping Seus/Suas arm extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell lying pronation
instructions: Lie on a flat bench face down with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest Seus/Suas head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.

Now raise the upper arm so that the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the upper arm is perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso. Tip: The upper arm should be parallel to the floor and also creating a 90-degree angle with Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, externally rotate Seus/Suas forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted forward as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is parallel to the floor. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell lying rear lateral raise
instructions: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, lay with Seus/Suas peito down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the floor) adjustable bench.
Position the palms of the mãos in a neutral manner (palms facing Seus/Suas torso) as you keep the braços extended com o/a elbows slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now raise the braços to the side until Seus/Suas elbows are at shoulder height and Seus/Suas braços are roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain Seus/Suas braços perpendicular to the torso while keeping them extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other arm.

name: Dumbbell lying supination
instructions: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest Seus/Suas head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.

Now raise the upper arm so that the forearm is parallel to the floor and perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you). The upper arm will be stationary by Seus/Suas torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with Seus/Suas torso at all times). Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, externally rotate Seus/Suas forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other arm.

name: Dumbbell one-arm desenvolvimento
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of Seus/Suas thighs or stand up straight.
Clean the dumbbell up to bring it to shoulder height. The other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of Seus/Suas hand is facing forward. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
As you exhale, push the dumbbell up until Seus/Suas arm is fully extended.
After a second pause, slowly come down costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then switch braços.

name: Dumbbell one-arm tríceps extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of Seus/Suas thighs or stand up straight.

Clean the dumbbell up to bring it to shoulder height and then extend the arm over Seus/Suas head so that the whole arm is perpendicular to the floor and next to Seus/Suas head. The dumbbell should be on top of you. The other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist, supporting the upper arm that has the dumbbell or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of Seus/Suas hand is facing forward and the pinkie is facing the ceiling. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind Seus/Suas head as you hold the upper arm stationary. Inhale as you perform this movement and pause when Seus/Suas tríceps are fully stretched.

Retorne para a posição inicial by flexing Seus/Suas tríceps as you breathe out. Tip: It is imperative that only the forearm moves. The upper arm should remain at all times stationary next to Seus/Suas head.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.

name: Dumbbell one-arm upright row
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and stand up straight with Seus/Suas arm extended in front of you with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas straight. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: The dumbbell should be resting on top of Seus/Suas thigh com o/a palm of Seus/Suas mãos facing Seus/Suas thighs.
Keep the other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the dumbbell as you exhale. The dumbbell should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until the dumbbell is nearly in line with Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbell, Seus/Suas elbow should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearm. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbell costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.

name: Dumbbell prone incline curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell on each hand and lie face down on an incline bench with Seus/Suas ombros near top of the incline. Seus/Suas knees can rest no/na seat or Seus/Suas pernas can be straddled to the sides (my preferred way).
Let Seus/Suas braços extend and hang naturally in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the floor.
Now keep Seus/Suas elbows in by Seus/Suas side and face the palms forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise the dumbbells by contracting the bíceps until Seus/Suas braços are fully flexed. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and ensure that only the forearms move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Lower the dumbbells until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

name: Dumbbell raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each arm and stand up straight with Seus/Suas braços extended by Seus/Suas sides with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas straight. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: The dumbbell should be next to Seus/Suas thighs com o/a palm of Seus/Suas mãos facing costas.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the dumbbells as you exhale. The dumbbells should be to the side of the body as you move them up. Continue to lift it until the dumbbells are nearly in line with Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbell, Seus/Suas elbow should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearm. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbells costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell rear lunge
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas torso upright holding two dumbbells in Seus/Suas mãos by Seus/Suas sides. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Step backward with Seus/Suas right leg around two pés or so from the left foot and lower Seus/Suas upper body down, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Tip: As in the other exercises, do not allow Seus/Suas knee to go forward beyond Seus/Suas toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress no/na knee joint. Make sure that you keep Seus/Suas front shin perpendicular to the ground. Keep the torso upright during the lunge; flexible hip flexors are important. A long lunge emphasizes the Gluteus Maximus; a short lunge emphasizes Quadriceps.
Push up and go costas to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Use the ball of Seus/Suas pés to push in order to accentuate the quadriceps. To focus no/na glúteos, press with Seus/Suas heels.
Now repeat com o/a opposite leg.

name: Dumbbell scaption
instructions: This corrective exercise strengthens the muscles that stabilize Seus/Suas shoulder blade. Hold a light peso in each hand, hanging at Seus/Suas sides. Seus/Suas thumbs should pointing up.
Begin the movement raising Seus/Suas braços out in front of you, about 30 degrees off center. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended as you perform the movement.
Continue until Seus/Suas braços are parallel to the ground, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Dumbbell seated box jump
instructions: Position a box a couple pés to the side of a bench. Hold a dumbbell to Seus/Suas peito with both mãos and seat yourself no/na bench facing the box. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Plant Seus/Suas pés firmly no/na ground as you lean forward, extending through the hips and knees to jump up and forward.
Land no/na box with both pés, absorbing the impact by allowing the hips and knees to bend.
Step down and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Dumbbell seated one-leg calf raise
instructions: Place a block no/na floor about 12 inches from a flat bench.
Sit on a flat bench and place a dumbbell on Seus/Suas upper left thigh about 3 inches above Seus/Suas knee.
Now place the ball of Seus/Suas left foot no/na block. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas toes up as high as possible as you exhale and you contract Seus/Suas calf muscle. Hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial, stretching as far down as possible.
Repeat for Seus/Suas prescribed number of repetitions and then repeat com o/a right leg.

name: Dumbbell desenvolvimento
instructions: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, sit on a military press bench or utility bench that has costas support. Place the dumbbells upright on top of Seus/Suas thighs.
Now raise the dumbbells to shoulder height one at a time using Seus/Suas thighs to help propel them up into position.
Make sure to rotate Seus/Suas wrists so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing forward. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Now, exhale and push the dumbbells upward until they touch at the top.
Then, after a brief pause at the top contracted position, slowly lower the peso costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell shrug
instructions: Stand erect with a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing Seus/Suas torso), braços extended no/na sides.

Lift the dumbbells by elevating the ombros as high as possible while you exhale. Hold the contraction at the top for a second. Tip: The braços should remain extended at all times. Refrain from using the bíceps to help lift the dumbbells. Only the ombros should be moving up and down.
Lower the dumbbells costas to the original position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell side bend
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell no/na left hand (palms facing the torso) as you have the right hand holding Seus/Suas waist. Seus/Suas pés should be placed at shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come costas up to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Keep the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movement but bending to the left instead. Hold for a second and come costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then change mãos.

name: Dumbbell agachamento
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of Seus/Suas pernas).

Position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Begin to slowly lower Seus/Suas torso by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the floor. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise Seus/Suas torso as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell agachamento to a bench
instructions: Stand up straight with a flat bench behind you while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of Seus/Suas pernas).

Position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Begin to slowly lower Seus/Suas torso by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Dumbbell step ups
instructions: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of Seus/Suas pernas).

Place the right foot no/na elevated platform. Step no/na platform by extending the hip and the knee of Seus/Suas right leg. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of Seus/Suas body up and place the foot of the left leg no/na platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down com o/a left leg by flexing the hip and knee of the right leg as you inhale. Return to the original standing position by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot no/na initial position.
Repeat com o/a right leg for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform com o/a left leg.

name: Dumbbell tricep extension -pronated grip
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench holding two dumbbells directly above Seus/Suas ombros. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended and form a 90 degree angle from Seus/Suas torso and the floor.
The palms of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward, and Seus/Suas elbows should be tucked in. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells until they are near Seus/Suas ears. Be sure to keep Seus/Suas upper braços stationary and Seus/Suas elbows tucked in.
Then, exhale and use Seus/Suas tríceps to return the peso to the starting position.

name: Dynamic costas stretch
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, swing them straight up in front of you 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion each time until Seus/Suas braços are above Seus/Suas head.

name: Dynamic peito stretch
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas mãos together, braços extended directly in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, quickly move Seus/Suas braços costas as far as possible and costas in again, similar to an exaggerated clapping motion. Repeat 5-10 times, increasing speed as you do so.

name: Ez-bar curl
instructions: Stand up straight while holding an EZ curl bar at the wide outer handle. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward and slightly tilted inward due to the shape of the bar. Keep Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now, while keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps. Focus on only moving Seus/Suas forearms.
Continue to raise the peso until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the top contracted position for a moment and squeeze the bíceps.
Then inhale and slowly lower the bar costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Ez-bar skullcrusher
instructions: Using a close grip, lift the EZ bar and hold it with Seus/Suas elbows in as you lie no/na bench. Seus/Suas braços should be perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the upper braços stationary, lower the bar by allowing the elbows to flex. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Pause once the bar is directly above the forehead.
Lift the bar costas to the starting position by extending the elbow and exhaling.
Repeat.

name: Elbow circles
instructions: Sit or stand with Seus/Suas pés slightly apart.
Coloque suas mãos on Seus/Suas ombros with Seus/Suas elbows at shoulder level and pointing out.
Slowly make a circle with Seus/Suas elbows. Breathe out as you start the circle and breathe in as you complete the circle.

name: Elbow to knee
instructions: Lie no/na floor, crossing Seus/Suas right leg across Seus/Suas bent left knee. Clasp Seus/Suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head, beginning with Seus/Suas shoulder blades no/na ground. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the motion by flexing the spine and rotating Seus/Suas torso to bring the left elbow to the right knee.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions before switching sides.

name: Elbows costas
instructions: Stand up straight.
Place both mãos on Seus/Suas lower costas, fingers pointing downward and elbows out.
Then gently pull Seus/Suas elbows costas aiming to touch them together.

name: Elevated costas lunge
instructions: Position a bar onto a rack at shoulder height loaded to an appropriate peso. Place a short, raised platform behind you.
Rack the bar onto Seus/Suas upper costas, keeping Seus/Suas costas arched and tight. Step onto Seus/Suas raised platform with both pés. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by stepping backwards with one leg. Descend by flexing Seus/Suas hips and knees until Seus/Suas knee touches the floor.
Pause, and extend through the hips and knees to rise up, returning all the way to the starting position before alternating.

name: Elevated cable rows
instructions: Get a platform of some sort (it can be an aerobics or calf raise platform) that is around 4-6 inches in height.
Place it no/na seat of the cable row machine.
Sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pés no/na front platform or crossbar provided making sure that Seus/Suas knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of Seus/Suas costas and grab the V-bar handles.

With Seus/Suas braços extended pull costas until Seus/Suas torso is at a 90-degree angle from Seus/Suas pernas. Seus/Suas costas should be slightly arched and Seus/Suas peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on Seus/Suas lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles costas towards Seus/Suas torso while keeping the braços close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing Seus/Suas costas muscles hard. Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original position while breathing in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Elliptical trainer
instructions: To begin, step onto the elliptical and select the desired option from the menu. Most ellipticals have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.
The handles can be used to monitor Seus/Suas heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

name: Exercise ball crunch
instructions: Lie on an exercise ball with Seus/Suas lower costas curvature pressed against the spherical surface of the ball. Seus/Suas pés should be bent at the knee and pressed firmly against the floor. The upper torso should be hanging off the top of the ball. The braços should either be kept alongside the body or crossed on top of Seus/Suas peito as these positions avoid neck strains (as opposed to the mãos behind the costas of the head position).
Lower Seus/Suas torso into a stretch position keeping the neck stationary at all times. Esta será sua posição inicial.

com o/a hips stationary, flex the waist by contracting the abdominals and curl the ombros and trunk upward until you feel a nice contraction on Seus/Suas abdominals. The braços should simply slide up the side of Seus/Suas pernas if you have them at the side or just stay on top of Seus/Suas peito if you have them crossed. The lower costas should always stay in contact com o/a ball. Exhale as you perform this movement and hold the contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Exercise ball pull-in
instructions: Place an exercise ball nearby and lay no/na floor in front of it with Seus/Suas mãos no/na floor shoulder width apart in a push-up position.

Now place Seus/Suas lower shins on top of an exercise ball. Tip: At this point Seus/Suas pernas should be fully extended com o/a shins on top of the ball and the upper body should be in a push-up type of position being supported by Seus/Suas two extended braços in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping Seus/Suas costas completely straight and the upper body stationary, pull Seus/Suas knees in towards Seus/Suas peito as you exhale, allowing the ball to roll forward under Seus/Suas ankles. Squeeze Seus/Suas abdômen and hold that position for a second.
Now slowly straighten Seus/Suas pernas, rolling the ball costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Extended range one-arm kettlebell floor press
instructions: Lie no/na floor and position a kettlebell for one arm to press. The kettlebell should be held by the handle. The leg no/na same side that you are pressing should be bent, com o/a knee crossing over the midline of the body.
Press the kettlebell by extending the elbow and adducting the arm, pressing it above Seus/Suas body. Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: External rotation
instructions: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest Seus/Suas head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the arm parallel to Seus/Suas torso.

Now bend the elbow while keeping the upper arm stationary. In this manner, the forearm will be parallel to the floor and perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you). The upper arm will be stationary by Seus/Suas torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with Seus/Suas torso at all times). Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, externally rotate Seus/Suas forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other arm.

name: External rotation with band
instructions: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as Seus/Suas elbow. Stand with Seus/Suas left side to the band a couple of pés away.

Grasp the end of the band with Seus/Suas right hand, and keep Seus/Suas elbow pressed firmly to Seus/Suas side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with Seus/Suas elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With Seus/Suas upper arm in position, Seus/Suas elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with Seus/Suas hand reaching across the front of Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Execute the movement by rotating Seus/Suas arm in a backhand motion, keeping Seus/Suas elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: External rotation with cable
instructions: Adjust the cable to the same height as Seus/Suas elbow. Stand with Seus/Suas left side to the band a couple of pés away.

Grasp the handle with Seus/Suas right hand, and keep Seus/Suas elbow pressed firmly to Seus/Suas side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with Seus/Suas elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With Seus/Suas upper arm in position, Seus/Suas elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with Seus/Suas hand reaching across the front of Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Execute the movement by rotating Seus/Suas arm in a backhand motion, keeping Seus/Suas elbow in place.

name: Face pull
instructions: Facing a high pulley with a rope or dual handles attached, pull the peso directly towards Seus/Suas face, separating Seus/Suas mãos as you do so. Keep Seus/Suas upper braços parallel to the ground.

name: Farmer's walk
instructions: There are various implements that can be used for the farmers walk. These can also be performed with heavy dumbbells or short bars if these implements aren't available. Begin by standing between the implements.
After gripping the handles, lift them up by driving through Seus/Suas heels, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas head up.
Walk taking short, quick steps, and don't forget to breathe. Move for a given distance, typically 50-100 pés, as fast as possible.

name: Fast skipping
instructions: Start in a relaxed position with one leg slightly forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Skip by executing a step-hop pattern of right-right-step to left-left-step, and so on, alternating costas and forth.
Perform fast skips by maintaining close contact com o/a ground and reduce air time, moving as quickly as possible.

name: Finger curls
instructions: Hold a barbell with both mãos and Seus/Suas palms facing up; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the bar as far as possible by extending the fingers. Allowing the bar to roll down the mãos, catch the bar com o/a final joint in the fingers.
Now curl bar up as high as possible by closing Seus/Suas mãos while exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top.

name: Flat bench cable flyes
instructions: Position a flat bench between two low pulleys so that when you are laying on it, Seus/Suas peito will be lined up com o/a cable pulleys.
Lay flat no/na bench and keep Seus/Suas pés no/na ground.
Have someone hand you the handles on each hand. You will grab each single handle attachment with a palms up grip.

Extend Seus/Suas braços by Seus/Suas side with a slight bend on Seus/Suas elbows. Tip: You will keep this bend constant through the whole movement. Seus/Suas braços should be parallel to the floor. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Now start lifting the braços in a semi-circle motion directly in front of you by pulling the cables together until both mãos meet at the top of the movement. Squeeze Seus/Suas peito as you perform this motion and breathe out during this movement. Also, hold the contraction for a second at the top. Tip: When performed correctly, at the top position of this movement, Seus/Suas braços should be perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso and the floor touching above Seus/Suas peito.
Slowly come costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Flat bench leg pull-in
instructions: Lie on an exercise mat or a flat bench with Seus/Suas pernas off the end.

Coloque suas mãos either under Seus/Suas glúteos with Seus/Suas palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench (or with palms down by the side on an exercise mat). Also extend Seus/Suas pernas straight out. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Bend Seus/Suas knees and pull Seus/Suas upper thighs into Seus/Suas midsection as you breathe out. Continue this movement until Seus/Suas knees are near Seus/Suas peito. Hold the contracted position for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Flat bench lying leg raise
instructions: Lie with Seus/Suas costas flat on a bench and Seus/Suas pernas extended in front of you off the end.
Coloque suas mãos either under Seus/Suas glúteos with Seus/Suas palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you keep Seus/Suas pernas extended, straight as possible with Seus/Suas knees slightly bent but locked raise Seus/Suas pernas until they make a 90-degree angle com o/a floor. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Now, as you inhale, slowly lower Seus/Suas pernas costas down to the starting position.

name: Flexor incline dumbbell curls
instructions: Hold the dumbbell towards the side farther from you so that you have more peso no/na side closest to you. (This can be done for a good effect on all bicep dumbbell exercises). Now do a normal incline dumbbell curl, but keep Seus/Suas wrists as far costas as possible so as to neutralize any stress that is placed on them.
Sit on an incline bench that is angled at 45-degrees while holding a dumbbell on each hand.

Let Seus/Suas braços hang down on Seus/Suas sides, com o/a elbows in, and turn the palms of Seus/Suas mãos forward com o/a thumbs pointing away from the body. Tip: You will keep this hand position throughout the movement as there should not be any twisting of the mãos as they come up. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Curl up the two dumbbells at the same time until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and exhale. Tip: Do not swing the braços or use momentum. Keep a controlled motion at all times. Hold the contracted position for a second at the top.
As you inhale, slowly go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Floor glute-ham raise
instructions: You can use a partner for this exercise or brace Seus/Suas pés under something stable.
Begin on Seus/Suas knees with Seus/Suas upper pernas and torso upright. If using a partner, they will firmly hold Seus/Suas pés to keep you in position. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower yourself by extending at the knee, taking care to NOT flex the hips as you go forward.

Coloque suas mãos in front of you as you reach the floor. This movement is very difficult and you may be unable to do it unaided. Use Seus/Suas braços to lightly push off the floor to aid Seus/Suas Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Floor press
instructions: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. Begin lying no/na floor with Seus/Suas head near the end of a power rack. Keeping Seus/Suas shoulder blades pulled together; pull the bar off of the hooks.

Lower the bar towards the bottom of Seus/Suas peito or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck Seus/Suas elbows throughout the movement. Lower the bar until Seus/Suas upper arm contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the peso.
Press the bar costas up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, Seus/Suas wrists, and elbows in line as you do so.

name: Floor press with chains
instructions: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. For this exercise, drape the chains directly over the end of the bar, trying to keep the ends away from the plates.
Begin lying no/na floor with Seus/Suas head near the end of a power rack. Keeping Seus/Suas shoulder blades pulled together, pull the bar off of the hooks.

Lower the bar towards the bottom of Seus/Suas peito or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck Seus/Suas elbows throughout the movement. Lower the bar until Seus/Suas upper arm contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the peso.
Press the bar costas up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, Seus/Suas wrists, and elbows in line as you do so.

name: Flutter kicks
instructions: On a flat bench lie facedown com o/a hips no/na edge of the bench, the pernas straight with toes high off the floor and com o/a braços on top of the bench holding on to the front edge.
Squeeze Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings and straighten the pernas until they are level com o/a hips. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Start the movement by lifting the left leg higher than the right leg.
Then lower the left leg as you lift the right leg.

Continue alternating in this manner (as though you are doing a flutter kick in water) until you have done the recommended amount of repetitions for each leg. Make sure that you keep a controlled movement at all times. Tip: You will breathe normally as you perform this movement.

name: Foot-smr
instructions: This exercise stretches the fascia of the muscles in the pés. Start off seated with Seus/Suas shoes removed. Using a foot roller or a similar object, such as a small section of pvc pipe, place Seus/Suas foot against the roller across the arch of Seus/Suas foot. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press down firmly, rolling across the arch of Seus/Suas foot. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch pés.

name: Forward drag with press
instructions: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the pernas and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing Seus/Suas mãos forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.

name: Frankenstein agachamento
instructions: This drill teaches you the proper positioning of both the bar and Seus/Suas body during the clean and front agachamento.

Place the barbell no/na front of the ombros, releasing Seus/Suas grip and extending Seus/Suas braços out in front of you. The ombros should be pushed forward to create a shelf, and the bar should be in contact com o/a throat. Ensure that you only move Seus/Suas shoulder blades forward; don't round the thoracic spine.

agachamento by flexing the knees and hips, sitting in between Seus/Suas pernas. Keep the torso upright, the braços up, and the ombros forward, and the bar should stay in place. Go to the bottom of the agachamento, until Seus/Suas hamstrings contact Seus/Suas calves.
Return to the upright position by driving through the front of the heel and extending the knees and hips.

name: Freehand jump agachamento
instructions: Cross Seus/Suas braços over Seus/Suas peito.
With Seus/Suas head up and Seus/Suas costas straight, position Seus/Suas pés at shoulder width.
Keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up, agachamento down as you inhale until Seus/Suas upper thighs are parallel, or lower, to the floor.
Now pressing mainly com o/a ball of Seus/Suas pés, jump straight up in the air as high as possible, using the thighs like springs. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
When you touch the floor again, immediately agachamento down and jump again.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Frog hops
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head, and agachamento down keeping Seus/Suas torso upright and Seus/Suas head up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Jump forward several pés, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As Seus/Suas pés contact the ground, absorb the impact through Seus/Suas pernas, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.

name: Frog sit-ups
instructions: Lie with Seus/Suas costas flat no/na floor (or exercise mat) and Seus/Suas pernas extended in front of you.
Now bend at the knees and place Seus/Suas outer thighs by the floor (or mat) as you make the soles of Seus/Suas pés touch each other.

Now try pushing both soles and bringing them up as near you as possible while you keep the outer thighs no/na floor (or at least almost touching it). Tip: In this position Seus/Suas pernas should create a diamond shape.
Now, cross Seus/Suas braços in front of you by touching the opposite ombros. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you exhale flatten Seus/Suas lower costas to the floor while curling the torso upwards. Tip: This will be like performing the first 1/4 movement of a sit up. Hold at the top position for a second.
As you inhale, slowly lower costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front barbell agachamento
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring Seus/Suas braços up sob o/a bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross Seus/Suas braços while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly com o/a middle of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front barbell agachamento to a bench
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set a flat bench behind you and set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring Seus/Suas braços up sob o/a bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross Seus/Suas braços while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until you touch the bench with Seus/Suas glúteos. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front box jump
instructions: Begin with a box of an appropriate height 1-2 pés in front of you. Stand with Seus/Suas pés should width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform a short agachamento in preparation for jumping, swinging Seus/Suas braços behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing Seus/Suas braços forward and up.
Land no/na box com o/a knees bent, absorbing the impact through the pernas. You can jump from the box costas to the ground, or preferably step down one leg at a time.

name: Front cable raise
instructions: Select the peso on a low pulley machine and grasp the single hand cable attachment that is attached to the low pulley with Seus/Suas left hand.

Face away from the pulley and put Seus/Suas arm straight down com o/a hand cable attachment in front of Seus/Suas thighs at braços' length com o/a palms of the hand facing Seus/Suas thighs. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left arm to the front with a slight bend no/na elbow and the palms of the hand always faces down. Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
Now as you inhale lower the arm costas down slowly to the starting position.
Once all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for this arm, switch braços and perform the exercise com o/a right one.

name: Front cone hops (or hurdle hops)
instructions: Set up a row of cones or other small barriers, placing them a few pés apart.
Stand in front of the first cone with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by jumping with both pés over the first cone, swinging both braços as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next cone.
Continue until you have jumped over all of the cones.

name: Front dumbbell raise
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of Seus/Suas thighs at braços length com o/a palms of the hand facing Seus/Suas thighs. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend no/na elbow and the palms of the mãos always facing down. Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell costas down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.

name: Front incline dumbbell raise
instructions: Sit down on an incline bench com o/a incline set anywhere between 30 to 60 degrees while holding a dumbbell on each hand. Tip: You can change the angle to hit the muscle a little differently each time.
Extend Seus/Suas braços straight in front of you and have Seus/Suas palms facing down com o/a dumbbells raised about 1 inch above Seus/Suas thighs. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly raise the dumbbells straight up until they are slightly above Seus/Suas ombros, while keeping Seus/Suas elbows locked. Squeeze at the top for a second and make sure you breathe out during this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas head resting down against the bench and Seus/Suas pernas no/na floor at all times.
Lower the braços costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front leg raises
instructions: Stand next to a chair or other support, holding on with one hand.
Swing Seus/Suas leg forward, keeping the leg straight. Continue with a downward swing, bringing the leg as far costas as Seus/Suas flexibility allows. Repeat 5-10 times, and then switch pernas.

name: Front plate raise
instructions: While standing straight, hold a barbell plate in both mãos at the 3 and 9 o'clock positions. Seus/Suas palms should be facing each other and Seus/Suas braços should be extended and locked with a slight bend at the elbows and the plate should be down near Seus/Suas waist in front of you as far as you can go. Tip: The braços will remain in this position throughout the exercise. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly raise the plate as you exhale until it is a little above shoulder level. Hold the contraction for a second. Tip: make sure that you do not swing the peso or bend at the elbows. Seus/Suas torso should remain stationary throughout the movement as well.
As you inhale, slowly lower the plate costas down to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front raise and pullover
instructions: Lie on a flat bench while holding a barbell using a palms down grip that is about 15 inches apart.
Place the bar on Seus/Suas upper thighs, extend Seus/Suas braços and lock them while keeping a slight bend no/na elbows. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now raise the peso using a semicircular motion and keeping Seus/Suas braços straight as you inhale. Continue the same movement until the bar is no/na other side above Seus/Suas head . (Tip: the bar will travel approximately 180-degrees). At this point Seus/Suas braços should be parallel to the floor com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing the ceiling.
Now return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Front agachamento (clean grip)
instructions: To begin, first set the bar in a rack slightly below shoulder level. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles, and lightly touching the throat. Seus/Suas mãos should be in a clean grip, touching the bar only with Seus/Suas fingers to help keep it in position.

Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso. Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head and elbows up at all times. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Bend at the knees, sitting down between Seus/Suas pernas. Continue down until Seus/Suas hamstrings are on Seus/Suas calves. Keep Seus/Suas knees aligned with Seus/Suas pés by consciously using Seus/Suas abductors to push Seus/Suas knees out as you agachamento.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly com o/a heel or middle of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Front squats with two kettlebells
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros. Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so.

Looking straight ahead at all times, agachamento as low as you can and pause at the bottom. As you agachamento down, push Seus/Suas knees out. You should agachamento between Seus/Suas pernas, keeping an upright torso, with Seus/Suas head and peito up.
Rise costas up by driving through Seus/Suas heels and repeat.

name: Front two-dumbbell raise
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of Seus/Suas thighs at braços length com o/a palms of the hand facing Seus/Suas thighs. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to the front with a slight bend no/na elbow and the palms of the mãos always facing down. Continue to go up until you braços are slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells costas down slowly to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Full range-of-motion lat pulldown
instructions: Either standing or seated on a high bench, grasp two stirrup cables that are attached to the high pulleys. Grab com o/a opposing hand so Seus/Suas braços are crisscrossed about you and Seus/Suas palms are facing forward.

Keeping Seus/Suas peito up and maintaining a slight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, pull the handles down as if you were doing a regular pulldown. The range of motion will be more of an arc. During the movement, rotate Seus/Suas mãos so that in the bottom position Seus/Suas palms face each other rather than forward. Return slowly to the starting position and repeat.

name: Gironda sternum chins
instructions: Grasp the pull-up bar with a shoulder width underhand grip.
Now hang with Seus/Suas braços fully extended and stick Seus/Suas peito out and lean costas. Tip: You will be leaning costas throughout the entire movement. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Start pulling yourself towards the bar with Seus/Suas spine arched throughout the movement and Seus/Suas head leaning costas as far away from the bar as possible. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: At the upper end of the movement, Seus/Suas hips and pernas will be at about a 45-degree angle to the floor.

Keep pulling until Seus/Suas collarbone passes the bar and Seus/Suas lower peito or sternum area touches it. Hold that contraction for a second. Tip: By the time you've completed this portion of the movement; Seus/Suas head will be parallel to the floor.
Slowly start going costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Glute ham raise
instructions: Begin by adjusting the equipment to fit Seus/Suas body. Place Seus/Suas pés against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Seus/Suas knees should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movement. Keep Seus/Suas costas arched as you begin the movement by flexing the knees. Drive Seus/Suas toes into the foot plate as you do so. Keep Seus/Suas upper body straight, and continue until Seus/Suas body is upright.
Retorne para a posição inicial, keeping Seus/Suas descent under control.

name: Glute kickback
instructions: Kneel no/na floor or an exercise mat and bend at the waist with Seus/Suas braços extended in front of you (perpendicular to the torso) in order to get into a kneeling push-up position but com o/a braços spaced at shoulder width. Seus/Suas head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, lift up Seus/Suas right leg until the hamstrings are in line com o/a costas while maintaining the 90-degree angle bend. Contract the glúteos throughout this movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second. Tip: At the end of the movement the upper leg should be parallel to the floor while the calf should be perpendicular to it.
Go costas to the initial position as you inhale and now repeat com o/a left leg.
Continue to alternate pernas until all of the recommended repetitions have been performed.

name: Goblet agachamento
instructions: Stand holding a light kettlebell by the horns close to Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
agachamento down between Seus/Suas pernas until Seus/Suas hamstrings are on Seus/Suas calves. Keep Seus/Suas peito and head up and Seus/Suas costas straight.
At the bottom position, pause and use Seus/Suas elbows to push Seus/Suas knees out. Retorne para a posição inicial, and repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Good morning
instructions: Begin with a bar on a rack at shoulder height. Rack the bar across the rear of Seus/Suas ombros as you would a power agachamento, not on top of Seus/Suas ombros. Keep Seus/Suas costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and Seus/Suas knees slightly bent. Step costas from the rack.
Begin by bending at the hips, moving them costas as you bend over to near parallel. Keep Seus/Suas costas arched and Seus/Suas cervical spine in proper alignment.
Reverse the motion by extending through the hips with Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings. Continue until you have returned to the starting position.

name: Good morning off pins
instructions: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as Seus/Suas stomach. Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of Seus/Suas ombros as you would a power agachamento, not on top of Seus/Suas ombros. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over. Keep Seus/Suas costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and Seus/Suas knees slightly bent. Keep Seus/Suas costas arched and Seus/Suas cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings, and you are standing com o/a peso. Baixe o peso lentamente costas to the pins returning to the starting position.

name: Gorilla chin/crunch
instructions: Hang from a chin-up bar using an underhand grip (palms facing you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width.
Now bend Seus/Suas knees at a 90 degree angle so that the calves are parallel to the floor while the thighs remain perpendicular to it. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, pull yourself up while crunching Seus/Suas knees up at the same time until Seus/Suas knees are at peito level. You will stop going up as soon as Seus/Suas nose is at the same level as the bar. Tip: When you get to this point you should also be finishing the crunch at the same time.
Slowly start to inhale as you Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Groin and costas stretch
instructions: Sit no/na floor with Seus/Suas knees bent and pés together.
Interlock Seus/Suas fingers behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Curl downwards, bringing Seus/Suas elbows to the inside of Seus/Suas thighs. After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial with Seus/Suas head up and Seus/Suas costas straight. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Groiners
instructions: Begin in a flexão position no/na floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Using both pernas, jump forward landing with Seus/Suas pés next to Seus/Suas mãos. Keep Seus/Suas head up as you do so.
Retorne para a posição inicial and immediately repeat the movement, continuing for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Hack agachamento
instructions: Place the costas of Seus/Suas torso against the costas pad of the machine and hook Seus/Suas ombros sob o/a shoulder pads provided.

Position Seus/Suas pernas in the platform using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain the costas no/na pad at all times.
Place Seus/Suas braços no/na side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).

Now straighten Seus/Suas pernas without locking the knees. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up (costas no/na pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hammer curls
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright and a dumbbell on each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the mãos should be facing Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now, while holding Seus/Suas upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps. Continue to raise the peso until the bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief moment as you squeeze the bíceps. Tip: Focus on keeping the elbow stationary and only moving Seus/Suas forearm.
After the brief pause, inhale and slowly begin the lower the dumbbells costas down to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hammer grip incline db supino
instructions: Lie costas on an incline bench with a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.
By using Seus/Suas thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of Seus/Suas mãos with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Keep Seus/Suas elbows flared out com o/a upper braços in line com o/a ombros (perpendicular to the torso) and the elbows bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now bring down the peso slowly to Seus/Suas side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells costas in Seus/Suas thighs and then no/na floor. This is the safest manner to dispose of the dumbbells.

name: Hamstring-smr
instructions: In a seated position, extend Seus/Suas pernas over a foam roll so that it is position no/na costas of the upper pernas. Coloque suas mãos to the side or behind you to help support Seus/Suas peso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Using Seus/Suas mãos, lift Seus/Suas hips off of the floor and shift Seus/Suas peso no/na foam roll to one leg. Relax the hamstrings of the leg you are stretching.
Roll over the foam from below the hip to above the costas of the knee, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat for the other leg.

name: Hamstring stretch
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with one leg extended above you, com o/a hip at ninety degrees. Keep the other leg flat no/na floor.
Loop a belt, band, or rope over the ball of Seus/Suas foot. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull no/na belt to create tension in the calves and hamstrings. Hold this stretch for 10-30 seconds, and repeat com o/a other leg.

name: Handstand push-ups
instructions: With Seus/Suas costas to the wall bend at the waist and place both mãos no/na floor at shoulder width.

Kick yourself up against the wall with Seus/Suas braços straight. Seus/Suas body should be upside down com o/a braços and pernas fully extended. Keep Seus/Suas whole body as straight as possible. Tip: If doing this for the first time, have a spotter help you. Also, make sure that you keep facing the wall with Seus/Suas head, rather than looking down.
Slowly lower yourself to the ground as you inhale until Seus/Suas head almost touches the floor. Tip: It is of utmost importance that you come down slow in order to avoid head injury.
Push yourself costas up slowly as you exhale until Seus/Suas elbows are nearly locked.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hang clean
instructions: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, com o/a bar hanging at the mid thigh position. Seus/Suas costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug Seus/Suas ombros towards Seus/Suas ears.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

name: Hang clean - below the knees
instructions: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, com o/a bar hanging just below the knees. Seus/Suas costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug Seus/Suas ombros towards Seus/Suas ears. As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out.

At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front agachamento position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom agachamento position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

name: Hang snatch
instructions: Begin with a wide grip no/na bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The pés should be directly below the hips com o/a pés turned out. Seus/Suas knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be at the hips. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Aggressively extend through the pernas and hips. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with Seus/Suas body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position com o/a peso overhead. Follow by returning the peso to the ground under control.

name: Hang snatch - below knees
instructions: Begin with a wide grip no/na bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The pés should be directly below the hips com o/a pés turned out. Seus/Suas knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be just below the knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Aggressively extend through the pernas and hips. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with Seus/Suas body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position com o/a peso overhead, and then return the peso to the floor under control.

name: Hanging bar good morning
instructions: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as Seus/Suas stomach. Suspend the bar using chains or suspension straps.

Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of Seus/Suas ombros as you would a power agachamento, not on top of Seus/Suas traps. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over. Keep Seus/Suas costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and Seus/Suas knees slightly bent. Keep Seus/Suas costas arched and Seus/Suas cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings, and you are standing com o/a peso.
Baixe o peso lentamente costas to the starting position, where it is supported by the chains.

name: Hanging leg raise
instructions: Hang from a chin-up bar with both braços extended at braços length in top of you using either a wide grip or a medium grip. The pernas should be straight down com o/a pelvis rolled slightly backwards. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas pernas until the torso makes a 90-degree angle com o/a pernas. Exhale as you perform this movement and hold the contraction for a second or so.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hanging pike
instructions: Hang from a chin-up bar with Seus/Suas pernas and pés together using an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width. Tip: You may use wrist wraps in order to facilitate holding on to the bar.

Now bend Seus/Suas knees at a 90 degree angle and bring the upper pernas forward so that the calves are perpendicular to the floor while the thighs remain parallel to it. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull Seus/Suas pernas up as you exhale until you almost touch Seus/Suas shins com o/a bar above you. Tip: Try to straighten Seus/Suas pernas as much as possible while at the top.
Lower Seus/Suas pernas as slowly as possible until you reach the starting position. Tip: Avoid swinging and using momentum at all times.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Heaving snatch balance
instructions: This drill helps you learn the snatch. Begin by holding a light peso across the costas of the ombros. Seus/Suas pés should be slightly wider than hip width apart com o/a pés turned out, the same position that you would perform a agachamento with.
Begin by dipping com o/a knees slightly, and popping costas up to briefly unload the bar. Drive yourself underneath the bar, elevating it overhead as you descend into a full agachamento.
Return to a standing position.

name: Heavy bag thrust
instructions: Utilize a heavy bag for this exercise. Assume an upright stance next to the bag, with Seus/Suas pés staggered, fairly wide apart. Place Seus/Suas hand no/na bag at about peito height. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by twisting at the waist, pushing the bag forward as hard as possible. Perform this move quickly, pushing the bag away from Seus/Suas body.
Receive the bag as it swings costas by reversing these steps.

name: High cable curls
instructions: Stand between a couple of high pulleys and grab a handle in each arm. Position Seus/Suas upper braços in a way that they are parallel to the floor com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Curl the handles towards you until they are next to Seus/Suas ears. Make sure that as you do so you flex Seus/Suas bíceps and exhale. The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Hold for a second in the contracted position as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly bring costas the braços to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hip circles (prone)
instructions: Position yourself on Seus/Suas mãos and knees no/na ground. Maintaining good posture, raise one bent knee off of the ground. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the knee in a bent position, rotate the femur in an arc, attempting to make a big circle with Seus/Suas knee.
Perform this slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat no/na other side.

name: Hip extension with bands
instructions: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Facing the attachment point of the band, hold on to the column to stabilize yourself.
Keeping Seus/Suas head and Seus/Suas peito up, move the resisted leg costas as far as you can while keeping the knee straight.
Return the leg to the starting position.

name: Hip flexion with band
instructions: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Face away from the attachment point of the band.
Keeping Seus/Suas head and Seus/Suas peito up, raise Seus/Suas knee up to 90 degrees and pause.
Return the leg to the starting position.

name: Hip lift with band
instructions: After choosing a suitable band, lay down in the middle of the rack, after securing the band on either side of you. If Seus/Suas rack doesn't have pegs, the band can be secured using heavy dumbbells or similar objects, just ensure they won't move.

Adjust Seus/Suas position so that the band is directly over Seus/Suas hips. Bend Seus/Suas knees and place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor. Seus/Suas mãos can be no/na floor or holding the band in position.
