Keeping Seus/Suas ombros no/na ground, drive through Seus/Suas heels to raise Seus/Suas hips, pushing into the band as high as you can.
Pause at the top of the motion, and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Hug a ball
instructions: Seat yourself no/na floor.
Straddle an exercise ball between both pernas and lower Seus/Suas hips down toward the floor.

Hug Seus/Suas braços around the ball to support Seus/Suas body. Adjust Seus/Suas pernas so that Seus/Suas pés are flat no/na floor and Seus/Suas knees line up over Seus/Suas ankles. Keep a good grip no/na ball so it doesn't roll away from you and send you costas onto Seus/Suas buttocks.

name: Hug knees to peito
instructions: Lie down on Seus/Suas costas and pull both knees up to Seus/Suas peito.
Hold Seus/Suas braços sob o/a knees, not over (that would put to much pressure on Seus/Suas knee joints).
Slowly pull the knees toward Seus/Suas ombros. This also stretches Seus/Suas buttocks muscles.

name: Hurdle hops
instructions: Set up a row of hurdles or other small barriers, placing them a few pés apart.
Stand in front of the first hurdle with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by jumping with both pés over the first hurdle, swinging both braços as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next hurdle. Continue until you have jumped over all of the hurdles.

name: Hyperextensions (costas extensions)
instructions: Lie face down on a hyperextension bench, tucking Seus/Suas ankles securely sob o/a footpads.
Adjust the upper pad if possible so Seus/Suas upper thighs lie flat across the wide pad, leaving enough room for you to bend at the waist without any restriction.

With Seus/Suas body straight, cross Seus/Suas braços in front of you (my preference) or behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: You can also hold a peso plate for extra resistência in front of you under Seus/Suas crossed braços.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping Seus/Suas costas flat. Inhale as you perform this movement. Keep moving forward until you feel a nice stretch no/na hamstrings and you can no longer keep going without a rounding of the costas. Tip: Never round the costas as you perform this exercise. Also, some people can go farther than others. The key thing is that you go as far as Seus/Suas body allows you to without rounding the costas.

Slowly raise Seus/Suas torso costas to the initial position as you inhale. Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch Seus/Suas costas past a straight line. Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the costas from injury.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Hyperextensions with no hyperextension bench
instructions: With someone holding down Seus/Suas pernas, slide yourself down to the edge a flat bench until Seus/Suas hips hang off the end of the bench. Tip: Seus/Suas entire upper body should be hanging down towards the floor. Also, you will be in the same position as if you were on a hyperextension bench but the range of motion will be shorter due to the height of the flat bench vs. that of the hyperextension bench.

With Seus/Suas body straight, cross Seus/Suas braços in front of you (my preference) or behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: You can also hold a peso plate for extra resistência in front of you under Seus/Suas crossed braços.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping Seus/Suas costas flat. Inhale as you perform this movement. Keep moving forward until you almost touch the floor or you feel a nice stretch no/na hamstrings (whichever comes first). Tip: Never round the costas as you perform this exercise.

Slowly raise Seus/Suas torso costas to the initial position as you exhale. Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch Seus/Suas costas past a straight line. Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the costas from injury.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: It band and glute stretch
instructions: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of Seus/Suas pés, and swing that leg across Seus/Suas body to the opposite side, keeping the leg extended as you lay no/na ground. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas foot off of the floor, pull no/na belt, using the tension to pull the toes up. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and repeat no/na other side.

name: Iliotibial tract-smr
instructions: Lay on Seus/Suas side, com o/a bottom leg placed onto a foam roller between the hip and the knee. The other leg can be crossed in front of you.

Place as much of Seus/Suas peso as is tolerable onto Seus/Suas bottom leg; there is no need to keep Seus/Suas bottom leg in contact com o/a ground. Be sure to relax the muscles of the leg you are stretching.
Roll Seus/Suas leg over the foam from you hip to Seus/Suas knee, pausing for 10-30 seconds at points of tension. Repeat com o/a opposite leg.

name: Inchworm
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés close together. Keeping Seus/Suas pernas straight, stretch down and put Seus/Suas mãos no/na floor directly in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by walking Seus/Suas mãos forward slowly, alternating Seus/Suas left and Seus/Suas right. As you do so, bend only at the hip, keeping Seus/Suas pernas straight.
Keep going until Seus/Suas body is parallel to the ground in a flexão position.
Now, keep Seus/Suas mãos in place and slowly take short steps with Seus/Suas pés, moving only a few inches at a time.
Continue walking until Seus/Suas pés are by hour mãos, keeping Seus/Suas pernas straight as you do so.

name: Incline barbell tríceps extension
instructions: Hold a barbell with an overhand grip (palms down) that is a little closer together than shoulder width.
Lie costas on an incline bench set at any angle between 45-75-degrees.
Bring the bar overhead with Seus/Suas braços extended and elbows in. The braços should be in line com o/a torso above the head. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now lower the bar in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Inhale as you perform this movement. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas upper braços stationary and close to Seus/Suas head at all times. Only the forearms should move.
Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe out and you contract the tríceps. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline bench pull
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lie face down on an incline bench that is set to an incline that is approximately 30 degrees.
Let the braços hang to Seus/Suas sides fully extended as they point to the floor.
Turn the wrists until Seus/Suas mãos have a pronated (palms down) grip.
Now flare the elbows out. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, start to pull the dumbbells up as if you are doing a reverse supino. You will do this by bending at the elbows and bringing the upper braços up as you let the forearms hang. Continue this motion until the upper braços are at the same level as Seus/Suas costas. Tip: The elbows will come out to the side and Seus/Suas upper braços and torso should make the letter "T" at the top of the movement. Hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly go costas down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline cable peito press
instructions: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Seus/Suas upper braços should be about 45 degrees to the body, with Seus/Suas head and peito up. The elbows should be bent to about 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together straight in front of you. Keep Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movement.
After pausing at full extension, Retorne para a posição inicial, keeping tension no/na cables.

name: Incline cable flye
instructions: To get yourself into the starting position, set the pulleys at the floor level (lowest level possible no/na machine that is below Seus/Suas torso).
Place an incline bench (set at 45 degrees) in between the pulleys, select a peso on each one and grab a pulley on each hand.
With a handle on each hand, lie no/na incline bench and bring Seus/Suas mãos together at braços length in front of Seus/Suas face. Esta será sua posição inicial.

With a slight bend of Seus/Suas elbows (in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon), lower Seus/Suas braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on Seus/Suas peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the braços should remain stationary. The movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.

Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position as you squeeze Seus/Suas peito muscles and exhale. Hold the contracted position for a second. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the peso.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Incline dumbbell bench with palms facing in
instructions: Lie costas on an incline bench with a dumbbell on each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.
By using Seus/Suas thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of Seus/Suas mãos with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Keep Seus/Suas elbows flared out com o/a upper braços in line com o/a ombros (perpendicular to the torso) and the elbows bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now bring down the peso slowly to Seus/Suas side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells costas in Seus/Suas thighs and then no/na floor. This is the safest manner to dispose of the dumbbells.

name: Incline dumbbell curl
instructions: Sit costas on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand held at braços length. Keep Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso and rotate the palms of Seus/Suas mãos until they are facing forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline dumbbell flyes
instructions: Hold a dumbbell on each hand and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend Seus/Suas braços above you with a slight bend at the elbows.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing you. Tip: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in, start to slowly lower the braços to the side while keeping the braços extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the hand are facing each other. Tip: At the end of the movement the braços will be by Seus/Suas side com o/a palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the dumbbells costas up to the starting position by reversing the motion and rotating the mãos so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Tip: Keep in mind that the movement will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline dumbbell flyes - with a twist
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend Seus/Suas braços above you with a slight bend at the elbows.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing you. Tip: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in, start to slowly lower the braços to the side while keeping the braços extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the hand are facing each other. Tip: At the end of the movement the braços will be by Seus/Suas side com o/a palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the dumbbells costas up to the starting position by reversing the motion and rotating the mãos so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Tip: Keep in mind that the movement will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline dumbbell press
instructions: Lie costas on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand atop Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos will be facing each other.
Then, using Seus/Suas thighs to help push the dumbbells up, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.
Once you have the dumbbells raised to shoulder width, rotate Seus/Suas wrists forward so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing away from you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Be sure to keep full control of the dumbbells at all times. Then breathe out and push the dumbbells up with Seus/Suas peito.
Lock Seus/Suas braços at the top, hold for a second, and then start slowly lowering the peso. Tip Ideally, lowering the peso should take about twice as long as raising them.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells costas on Seus/Suas thighs and then no/na floor. This is the safest manner to release the dumbbells.

name: Incline hammer curls
instructions: Seat yourself on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. You should pressed firmly against he costas with Seus/Suas pés together. Allow the dumbbells to hang straight down at Seus/Suas side, holding them with a neutral grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by flexing at the elbow, attempting to keep the upper arm stationary.
Continue to the top of the movement and pause, then slowly return to the start position.

name: Incline inner bíceps curl
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie costas on an incline bench.
The dumbbells should be at arm's length hanging at Seus/Suas sides and Seus/Suas palms should be facing out. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now as you exhale curl the peso outward and up while keeping Seus/Suas forearms in line with Seus/Suas side deltoids. Continue the curl until the dumbbells are at shoulder height and to the sides of Seus/Suas deltoids. Tip: The end of the movement should look similar to a double bíceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, start to inhale and slowly lower the peso costas to the starting position using the same path used to bring them up.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Incline push-up
instructions: Stand facing bench or sturdy elevated platform. Place mãos on edge of bench or platform, slightly wider than shoulder width.
Position forefoot costas from bench or platform with braços and body straight. braços should be perpendicular to body. Keeping body straight, lower peito to edge of box or platform by bending braços.
Push body up until braços are extended. Repeat.

name: Incline push-up close-grip
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Coloque suas mãos next to one another no/na bar.
Position Seus/Suas pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, lower Seus/Suas peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the elbows, pressing yourself costas up.

name: Incline push-up depth jump
instructions: For this drill you will need a box about 12 inches high, and two thick mats or aerobics steps.

Place the steps just outside of Seus/Suas ombros, and place Seus/Suas pés on top of the box so that you are in an incline flexão position, Seus/Suas mãos just inside the steps. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin by bending at the elbows to lower Seus/Suas body, quickly reversing position to push Seus/Suas body off of the ground. As you leave the ground, move Seus/Suas mãos onto the steps, bending Seus/Suas elbows to absorb the impact.
Repeat the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Incline push-up medium
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Coloque suas mãos no/na bar, with Seus/Suas mãos about shoulder width apart.
Position Seus/Suas pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, lower Seus/Suas peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the elbows, pressing yourself costas up.

name: Incline push-up reverse grip
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Coloque suas mãos no/na bar palms up, with Seus/Suas mãos about shoulder width apart.
Position Seus/Suas pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, lower Seus/Suas peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the elbows, pressing yourself costas up.

name: Incline push-up wide
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Coloque suas mãos no/na bar, with Seus/Suas mãos wider than shoulder width.
Position Seus/Suas pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. Seus/Suas braços should be perpendicular to the body. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, lower Seus/Suas peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne para a posição inicial by extending the elbows, pressing yourself costas up.

name: Intermediate groin stretch
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended. Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of Seus/Suas pés, and swing that leg as far to the side as you can. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull gently no/na belt to create tension in Seus/Suas groin and hamstring muscles. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and repeat no/na other side.

name: Intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch
instructions: Lie face down no/na floor, with a rope, belt, or band looped around one foot.

Flex the knee and extend the hip of the leg to be stretched, using both mãos to pull no/na belt. Seus/Suas knee and Seus/Suas hip should come off of the floor, creating tension in the hip flexors and quadriceps. Hold the stretch for 10-20 seconds, and repeat no/na other leg.

name: Internal rotation with band
instructions: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as Seus/Suas elbow. Stand with Seus/Suas right side to the band a couple of pés away.

Grasp the end of the band with Seus/Suas right hand, and keep Seus/Suas elbow pressed firmly to Seus/Suas side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with Seus/Suas elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With Seus/Suas upper arm in position, Seus/Suas elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with Seus/Suas hand reaching away from Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Execute the movement by rotating Seus/Suas arm in a forehand motion, keeping Seus/Suas elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Inverted row
instructions: Position a bar in a rack to about waist height. You can also use a smith machine.

Take a wider than shoulder width grip no/na bar and position yourself hanging underneath the bar. Seus/Suas body should be straight with Seus/Suas heels no/na ground with Seus/Suas braços fully extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling Seus/Suas peito towards the bar. Retract Seus/Suas shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Inverted row with straps
instructions: Hang a rope or suspension straps from a rack or other stable object. Grasp the ends and position yourself in a supine position hanging from the ropes. Seus/Suas body should be straight with Seus/Suas heels no/na ground with Seus/Suas braços fully extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling Seus/Suas peito to Seus/Suas mãos. Retract Seus/Suas shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Iron crosses (stretch)
instructions: Lie face down no/na floor, with Seus/Suas braços extended out to Seus/Suas side, palms pressed to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To begin, flex one knee and bring that leg across the costas of Seus/Suas body, attempting to touch it to the ground near the opposite hand.
Promptly return the leg to the starting postion, and quickly repeat com o/a other leg. Continue alternating for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Isometric peito squeezes
instructions: While either seating or standing, bend Seus/Suas braços at a 90-degree angle and place the palms of Seus/Suas mãos together in front of Seus/Suas peito. Tip: Seus/Suas mãos should be open com o/a palms together and fingers facing forward (perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso).
Push both mãos against each other as you contract Seus/Suas peito. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat.

name: Isometric neck exercise - front and costas
instructions: With Seus/Suas head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place both of Seus/Suas mãos no/na front side of Seus/Suas head.

Now gently push forward as you contract the neck muscles but resisting any movement of Seus/Suas head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with Seus/Suas mãos placed no/na costas side of Seus/Suas head.

name: Isometric neck exercise - sides
instructions: With Seus/Suas head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place Seus/Suas left hand no/na left side of Seus/Suas head.

Now gently push towards the left as you contract the left neck muscles but resisting any movement of Seus/Suas head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with Seus/Suas right hand placed no/na right side of Seus/Suas head.

name: Isometric wipers
instructions: Assume a push-up position, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas mãos and toes while keeping Seus/Suas body straight. Seus/Suas mãos should be just outside of shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by shifting Seus/Suas body peso as far to one side as possible, allowing the elbow on that side to flex as you lower Seus/Suas body.
Reverse the motion by extending the flexed arm, pushing yourself up and then dropping to the other side.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Jm press
instructions: Start the exercise the same way you would a close grip supino. You will lie on a flat bench while holding a barbell at braços length (fully extended) com o/a elbows in. However, instead of having the braços perpendicular to the torso, make sure the bar is set in a direct line above the upper peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now beginning from a fully extended position lower the bar down as if performing a lying tríceps extension. Inhale as you perform this movement. When you reach the half way point, let the bar roll costas about one inch by moving the upper braços towards Seus/Suas pernas until they are perpendicular to the torso. Tip: Keep the bend at the elbows constant as you bring the upper braços forward.
As you exhale, press the bar costas up by using the tríceps to perform a close grip supino.
Now go costas to the starting position and start over.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Jackknife sit-up
instructions: Lie flat no/na floor (or exercise mat) on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas braços extended straight costas behind Seus/Suas head and Seus/Suas pernas extended also. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, bend at the waist while simultaneously raising Seus/Suas pernas and braços to meet in a jackknife position. Tip: The pernas should be extended and lifted at approximately a 35-45 degree angle from the floor and the braços should be extended and parallel to Seus/Suas pernas. The upper torso should be off the floor.
While inhaling, lower Seus/Suas braços and pernas costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Janda sit-up
instructions: Position Seus/Suas body no/na floor in the basic sit-up position; knees to a ninety degree angle with pés flat no/na floor and braços either crossed over Seus/Suas peito or to the sides. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you strongly tighten Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings, fill Seus/Suas lungs with air and in a slow (three to six second count) ascent, slowly exhale. Tip: It is important to tighten the glúteos and hamstrings as this will cause the hip flexors to be inactivated in a process called reciprocal inhibition, which basically means that opposite muscles to the contracted ones will relax.
As you inhale, slowly go costas in a controlled manner to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Jefferson squats
instructions: Place a barbell no/na floor.
Stand in the middle of the bar length wise.
Bend down by bending at the knees and keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and grasp the front of the bar with Seus/Suas right hand. Seus/Suas palm should be in (neutral grip) facing the left side.

Grasp the rear of the bar with Seus/Suas left hand. The palm of Seus/Suas hand should be in neutral grip alignment (palms facing the right side). Tip: Ensure that Seus/Suas grip is even no/na bar. Seus/Suas torso should be positioned right in the middle of the bar and the distance between Seus/Suas torso and Seus/Suas right hand (which should be at the front) should be the same as the distance between Seus/Suas torso and Seus/Suas left hand (which should be to Seus/Suas costas).
Now stand straight up com o/a peso. Tip: Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart and Seus/Suas toes slightly pointed out.

agachamento down by bending at the knees and keeping Seus/Suas costas straight until Seus/Suas upper thighs are parallel com o/a floor. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas costas as vertical as possible com o/a floor and Seus/Suas head up. Also remember to not let Seus/Suas knees go past Seus/Suas toes. Inhale during this portion of the movement.

Now drive yourself costas up to the starting position by pushing com o/a pés . Tip: Keep the bar hanging at arm's length and Seus/Suas elbows locked with a slight bend. The braços only serve as hooks. Avoid doing any lifting with them. Do the lifting with Seus/Suas thighs; not Seus/Suas braços.

name: Jerk balance
instructions: This drill helps you learn to drive yourself low enough during the jerk and corrects those who move backward during the movement. Begin com o/a bar racked in the jerk position, com o/a ombros forward, torso upright, and the pés split slightly apart.

Initiate the movement as you would a normal jerk, dipping at the knees while keeping Seus/Suas torso vertical, and driving costas up forcefully, using momentum and not Seus/Suas braços to elevate the peso.
Keep the rear foot in place, using it to drive Seus/Suas body forward into a full split as you jerk the peso. Recover by standing up com o/a peso overhead.

name: Jerk dip agachamento
instructions: This movement strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Begin com o/a bar racked in the jerk position, com o/a ombros forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The pés should be directly sob o/a hips, com o/a pés turned out as is comfortable.

Keeping the torso vertical, dip by flexing the knees, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the hips to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the peso to the starting position by driving forcefully though the pés.

name: Jogging, treadmill
instructions: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than jogging outside. A 150 lb person will burn almost 250 calories jogging for 30 minutes, compared to more than 450 calories running. Maintain proper posture as you jog, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking Seus/Suas heart rate.

name: Keg load
instructions: To load kegs, place the desired number a distance from the loading platform, typically 30-50 pés.
Begin by grabbing the close handle of the first keg, tilting it onto its side to grab the opposite edge of the bottom of the keg. Lift the keg up to Seus/Suas peito.

The higher you can place the keg, the faster you should be able to move to the platform. Shouldering is usually not allowed. Be sure to keep a firm hold no/na keg. Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible.
Retorne para a posição inicial to retrieve the next keg, and repeat until the event is completed.

name: Kettlebell arnold press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. The palm should be facing inward.
Looking straight ahead, press the kettlebell out and overhead, rotating Seus/Suas wrist so that Seus/Suas palm faces forward at the top of the motion.
Return the kettlebell to the starting position, com o/a palm facing in.

name: Kettlebell dead clean
instructions: Place kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés. To get in the starting position, push Seus/Suas butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Lower the kettlebell, keeping the hamstrings loaded by keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas butt out.

name: Kettlebell figure 8
instructions: Place one kettlebell between Seus/Suas pernas and take a wider than shoulder width stance. Bend over by pushing Seus/Suas butt out and keeping Seus/Suas costas flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to Seus/Suas other hand between Seus/Suas pernas. The receiving hand should reach from behind the pernas. Go costas and forth for several repetitions.

name: Kettlebell hang clean
instructions: Place kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés. To get in the starting position, push Seus/Suas butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Lower kettlebell to a hanging position between Seus/Suas pernas while keeping the hamstrings loaded. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times.

name: Kettlebell one-legged levantamento terra
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle in one hand. Stand on one leg, no/na same side that you hold the kettlebell.
Keeping that knee slightly bent, perform a stiff legged levantamento terra by bending at the hip, extending Seus/Suas free leg behind you for balance.
Continue lowering the kettlebell until you are parallel to the ground, and then return to the upright position.

name: Kettlebell pass between the pernas
instructions: Place one kettlebell between Seus/Suas pernas and take a comfortable stance. Bend over by pushing Seus/Suas butt out and keeping Seus/Suas costas flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to Seus/Suas other hand between Seus/Suas pernas, in the fashion of a "W". Go costas and forth for several repetitions.

name: Kettlebell pirate ships
instructions: With a wide stance, hold a kettlebell with both mãos. Allow it to hang at waist level with Seus/Suas braços extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by turning to one side, swinging the kettlebell to head height. Briefly pause at the top of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as you rotate to the opposite side, again raising the kettlebell to head height.
Repeat for the desired amount of repetitions.

name: Kettlebell pistol agachamento
instructions: Pick up a kettlebell with two mãos and hold it by the horns. Hold one leg off of the floor and agachamento down no/na other.
agachamento down by flexing the knee and sitting costas com o/a hips, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Hold the bottom position for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping Seus/Suas head and peito up.
Lower yourself again and repeat.

name: Kettlebell seated press
instructions: Sit no/na floor and spread Seus/Suas pernas out comfortably.
Clean one kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder.
Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead. Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Kettlebell seesaw press
instructions: Clean two kettlebells two Seus/Suas ombros.
Press one kettlebell.
Lower the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same amount of reps on both sides.

name: Kettlebell sumo high pull
instructions: Place a kettlebell no/na ground between Seus/Suas pés. Position Seus/Suas pés in a wide stance, and grasp the kettlebell with two mãos. Set Seus/Suas hips costas as far as possible, with Seus/Suas knees bent. Keep Seus/Suas peito and head up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by extending the hips and knees, simultaneously pulling the kettlebell to Seus/Suas ombros, raising Seus/Suas elbows as you do so. Reverse the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Kettlebell thruster
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros. Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin to agachamento by flexing Seus/Suas hips and knees, lowering Seus/Suas hips between Seus/Suas pernas. Maintain an upright, straight costas as you descend as low as you can.

At the bottom, reverse direction and agachamento by extending Seus/Suas knees and hips, driving through Seus/Suas heels. As you do so, press both kettlebells overhead by extending Seus/Suas braços straight up, using the momentum from the agachamento to help drive the peso upward.
As you begin the next repetition, return the peso to the ombros.

name: Kettlebell turkish get-up (lunge style)
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas no/na floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee no/na same side as the kettlebell.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use Seus/Suas non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position. Using Seus/Suas free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to one knee.
While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion costas to the starting position and repeat.

name: Kettlebell turkish get-up (agachamento style)
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas no/na floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee no/na same side as the kettlebell.
Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use Seus/Suas non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position.

Using Seus/Suas free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to Seus/Suas pés. While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion costas to the starting position and repeat.

name: Kettlebell windmill
instructions: Place a kettlebell in front of Seus/Suas lead foot and clean and press it overhead with Seus/Suas opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push Seus/Suas butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn Seus/Suas pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm com o/a locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking Seus/Suas butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the floor with Seus/Suas free hand. Keep Seus/Suas eyes no/na kettlebell that you hold over Seus/Suas head at all times.
Pause for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion costas to the starting position.

name: Kipping muscle up
instructions: Grip the rings using a false grip, com o/a base of Seus/Suas palms on top of the rings.
Begin with a movement swinging Seus/Suas pernas backward slightly.

Counter that movement by swinging Seus/Suas pernas forward and up, jerking Seus/Suas chin and peito costas, pulling yourself up with both braços as you do so. As you reach the top position of the pull-up, pull the rings to Seus/Suas armpits as you roll Seus/Suas ombros forward, allowing Seus/Suas elbows to move straight costas behind you. This puts you into the proper position to continue into the dip portion of the movement.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.

name: Knee across the body
instructions: Deite-se no chão with Seus/Suas right leg straight. Bend Seus/Suas left leg and lower it across Seus/Suas body, holding the knee down toward the floor with Seus/Suas right hand. (The knee doesn't need to touch the floor if you're tight.)

Place Seus/Suas left arm comfortably beside you and turn Seus/Suas head to the left. Imagine you have a peso tied to Seus/Suas tailbone. let Seus/Suas tailbone fall costas toward the floor as Seus/Suas peito reaches in the opposite direction to stretch Seus/Suas lower costas. Switch sides.

name: Knee circles
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pernas together and mãos by Seus/Suas waist.
Now move Seus/Suas knees in a circular motion as you breathe normally.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Knee/hip raise on parallel bars
instructions: Position Seus/Suas body no/na vertical leg raise bench so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting no/na pads next to the torso and holding on to the handles. Seus/Suas braços will be dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus.
The torso should be straight com o/a lower costas pressed against the pad of the machine and the pernas extended pointing towards the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now as you breathe out, lift Seus/Suas pernas up as you keep them extended. Continue this movement until Seus/Suas pernas are roughly parallel to the floor and then hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Do not use any momentum or swinging as you perform this exercise.
Slowly go costas to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Knee tuck jump
instructions: Begin in a comfortable standing position with Seus/Suas knees slightly bent. Hold Seus/Suas mãos in front of you, palms down with Seus/Suas fingertips together at peito height. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Rapidly dip down into a quarter agachamento and immediately explode upward. Drive the knees towards the peito, attempting to touch them to the palms of the mãos.
Jump as high as you can, raising Seus/Suas knees up, and then ensure a good land be re-extending Seus/Suas pernas, absorbing impact through be allowing the knees to rebend.

name: Kneeling arm drill
instructions: This drill helps increase arm efficiency during the run. Begin kneeling, left foot in front, right knee down. Apply pressure through the front heel to keep Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings activated.
Begin by blocking the braços in long, pendulum like swings. Close the arm angle, blocking com o/a braços as you would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as Seus/Suas mãos pass the hip, accelerate them forward during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly as possible.
Switch knees and repeat.

name: Kneeling cable crunch with alternating oblique twists
instructions: Connect a rope attachment to a high pulley cable and position a mat no/na floor in front of it.
Grab the rope with both mãos and kneel approximately two pés costas from the tower.
Position the rope behind Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas mãos by Seus/Suas ears.
Keep Seus/Suas mãos in the same place, contract Seus/Suas abdômen and pull downward no/na rope in a crunching movement until Seus/Suas elbows reach Seus/Suas knees.
Pause briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the starting position.
Repeat the same downward movement until you're halfway down, at which time you'll begin rotating one of Seus/Suas elbows to the opposite knee.
Again, pause briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the starting position.
Repeat the same movement as before, but alternate the other elbow to the opposite knee.
Continue this series of movements to failure.

name: Kneeling cable tríceps extension
instructions: Place a bench sideways in front of a high pulley machine.
Hold a straight bar attachment above Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas mãos about 6 inches apart with Seus/Suas palms facing down.
Face away from the machine and kneel.
Place Seus/Suas head and the costas of Seus/Suas upper braços no/na bench. Seus/Suas elbows should be bent com o/a forearms pointing towards the high pulley. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head at all times com o/a elbows in, press the bar out in a semicircular motion until the elbows are locked and Seus/Suas braços are parallel to the floor. Contract the tríceps hard and keep this position for a second. Exhale as you perform this movement.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Kneeling forearm stretch
instructions: Start by kneeling on a mat with Seus/Suas palms flat and Seus/Suas fingers pointing costas toward Seus/Suas knees.
Slowly lean costas keeping Seus/Suas palms flat no/na floor until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas wrists and forearms. Hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Kneeling high pulley row
instructions: Select the appropriate peso using a pulley that is above Seus/Suas head. Attach a rope to the cable and kneel a couple of pés away, holding the rope out in front of you with both braços extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by flexing the elbows and fully retracting Seus/Suas ombros, pulling the rope toward Seus/Suas upper peito with Seus/Suas elbows out.
After pausing briefly, slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Kneeling hip flexor
instructions: Kneel on a mat and bring Seus/Suas right knee up so the bottom of Seus/Suas foot is no/na floor and extend Seus/Suas left leg out behind you so the top of Seus/Suas foot is no/na floor.
Shift Seus/Suas peso forward until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas hip. Hold for 15 seconds, then repeat for Seus/Suas other side.

name: Kneeling jump agachamento
instructions: Begin kneeling no/na floor with a barbell racked across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros, or you can use Seus/Suas body peso for this exercise. This can be done inside of a power rack to make unracking easier.
Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until Seus/Suas glúteos touch Seus/Suas pés, keeping Seus/Suas head and peito up.
Explode up with Seus/Suas hips, generating enough power to land with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor.
Continue com o/a agachamento by driving through Seus/Suas heels and extending the knees to come to a standing position.

name: Kneeling single-arm high pulley row
instructions: Attach a single handle to a high pulley and make Seus/Suas peso selection.
Kneel in front of the cable tower, taking the cable with one hand with Seus/Suas arm extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Starting with Seus/Suas palm facing forward, pull the peso down to Seus/Suas torso by flexing the elbow and retract the shoulder blade. As you do so, rotate the wrist so that at the completion of the movement, Seus/Suas palm is now facing you.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Kneeling agachamento
instructions: Set the bar to the proper height in a power rack. Kneel behind the bar; it may be beneficial to put a mat down to pad Seus/Suas knees. Slide sob o/a bar, racking it across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros. Seus/Suas shoulder blades should be retracted and the bar tight across Seus/Suas costas. Unrack the peso.
With Seus/Suas head looking forward, sit costas with Seus/Suas butt until you touch Seus/Suas calves.
Reverse the motion, returning the torso to an upright position.

name: Landmine 180's
instructions: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking it to shoulder height with both mãos with Seus/Suas braços extended in front of you. Adopt a wide stance. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by rotating the trunk and hips as you swing the peso all the way down to one side. Keep Seus/Suas braços extended throughout the exercise.
Reverse the motion to swing the peso all the way to the opposite side.
Continue alternating the movement until the set is complete.

name: Landmine linear jammer
instructions: Position a bar into landmine or, lacking one, securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso and position the handle attachment no/na bar.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking the handles to Seus/Suas ombros. Esta será sua posição inicial.
In an athletic stance, agachamento by flexing Seus/Suas hips and setting Seus/Suas hips costas, keeping Seus/Suas braços flexed.

Reverse the motion by powerfully extending through the hips, knees, and ankles, while also extending the elbows to straighten the braços. This movement should be done explosively, coming out of the agachamento to full extension as powerfully as possible.
Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Lateral bound
instructions: Assume a half agachamento position facing 90 degrees from Seus/Suas direction of travel. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Allow Seus/Suas lead leg to do a countermovement inward as you shift Seus/Suas peso to the outside leg.
Immediately push off and extend, attempting to bound to the side as far as possible.
Upon landing, immediately push off in the opposite direction, returning to Seus/Suas original start position.
Continue costas and forth for several repetitions.

name: Lateral box jump
instructions: Assume a comfortable standing position, with a short box positioned next to you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Quickly dip into a quarter agachamento to initiate the stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to jump up and to the side.
Bring Seus/Suas knees high enough to ensure Seus/Suas pés have good clearance over the box.
Land no/na center of the box, using Seus/Suas pernas to absorb the impact.
Carefully jump down to the other side of the box, and continue going costas and forth for several repetitions.

name: Lateral cone hops
instructions: Position a number of cones in a row several pés apart.
Stand next to the end of the cones, facing 90 degrees to the direction of travel. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the jump by dipping com o/a knees to initiate a stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to push off the ground, jumping up and sideways over the cone.
Use Seus/Suas pernas to absorb impact upon landing, and rebound into the next jump, continuing down the row of cones.

name: Lateral raise - with bands
instructions: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles using a pronated (palms facing Seus/Suas thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The handles should be resting no/na sides of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas braços should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas should be straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the handles to the sides as you exhale. Continue to lift the handles until they are slightly above parallel. Tip: As you lift the handles, slightly tilt the hand as if you were pouring water and keep Seus/Suas braços extended. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the handles costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Latissimus dorsi-smr
instructions: While lying no/na floor, place a foam roll under Seus/Suas costas and to one side, just behind Seus/Suas arm pit. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keep the arm of the side being stretched behind and to the side of you as you shift Seus/Suas peso onto Seus/Suas lats, keeping Seus/Suas upper body off of the ground. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and switch sides.

name: Leg-over floor press
instructions: Lie no/na floor with one kettlebell in place on Seus/Suas peito, holding it by the handle. Extend leg on working side over leg on non-working side.Seus/Suas free arm can be extended out to Seus/Suas side for support.
Press the kettlebll into a locked out position.
Lower the peso until the elbow touches the ground, keeping the kettlebell above the elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Leg-up hamstring stretch
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas, bend one knee, and put that foot flat no/na floor to stabilize Seus/Suas spine.

Extend the other leg in the air. If you're tight, you wont be able to straighten it. That's okay. Extend the knee so that the sole of the lifted foot faces the ceiling (or as close as you can get it).
Slowly straighten the pernas as much as possible and then pull the leg toward Seus/Suas nose. Switch sides.

name: Leg extensions
instructions: For this exercise you will need to use a leg extension machine. First choose Seus/Suas peso and sit no/na machine with Seus/Suas pernas sob o/a pad (pés pointed forward) and the mãos holding the side bars. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: You will need to adjust the pad so that it falls on top of Seus/Suas lower leg (just above Seus/Suas pés). Also, make sure that Seus/Suas pernas form a 90-degree angle between the lower and upper leg. If the angle is less than 90-degrees then that means the knee is over the toes which in turn creates undue stress at the knee joint. If the machine is designed that way, either look for another machine or just make sure that when you start executing the exercise you stop going down once you hit the 90-degree angle.
Using Seus/Suas quadriceps, extend Seus/Suas pernas to the maximum as you exhale. Ensure that the rest of the body remains stationary no/na seat. Pause a second no/na contracted position.
Baixe o peso lentamente costas to the original position as you inhale, ensuring that you do not go past the 90-degree angle limit.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

name: Leg lift
instructions: While standing up straight with both pés next to each other at around shoulder width, grab a sturdy surface such as the sides of a agachamento rack or the top of a chair to brace yourself and keep balance.
With or without an ankle peso, lift one leg behind you as if performing a leg curl but standing up while keeping the other leg straight. Expire ao realizar este movimento.
Slowly bring the raised leg costas to the floor as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Repeat the movement com o/a opposite leg.

name: Leg press
instructions: Using a leg press machine, sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pernas no/na platform directly in front of you at a medium (shoulder width) foot stance. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until Seus/Suas pernas are fully extended in front of you. Tip: Make sure that you do not lock Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas torso and the pernas should make a perfect 90-degree angle. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until Seus/Suas upper and lower pernas make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés and using the quadriceps go costas to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.

name: Leg pull-in
instructions: Lie on an exercise mat with Seus/Suas pernas extended and Seus/Suas mãos either palms facing down next to you or under Seus/Suas glúteos. Tip: My preference is com o/a mãos next to me. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Bend Seus/Suas knees and pull Seus/Suas upper thighs into Seus/Suas midsection as you breathe out. Continue the motion until Seus/Suas knees are around peito level. Contract Seus/Suas abdômen as you execute this movement and hold for a second at the top. Tip: As you perform the motion, the lower pernas (calves) should always remain parallel to the floor.
Retorne para a posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Leverage peito press
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for Seus/Suas height. The handles should be near the bottom or middle of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion.
Seus/Suas peito and head should be up and Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start position, keeping tension no/na muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.

name: Leverage levantamento terra
instructions: Load the pins to an appropriate peso. Position yourself directly between the handles. Grasp the bottom handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower Seus/Suas hips as you take a breath. Look forward with Seus/Suas head and keep Seus/Suas peito up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Return the peso to the starting position.

name: Leverage decline peito press
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for Seus/Suas height. The handles should be near the bottom of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Seus/Suas peito and head should be up and Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start position, keeping tension no/na muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.

name: Leverage high row
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that you can just reach the handles above you. Adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull the handles towards Seus/Suas torso, retracting Seus/Suas shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to the stops to keep tension no/na muscles being worked.

name: Leverage incline peito press
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for Seus/Suas height. The handles should be near the top of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Seus/Suas peito and head should be up and Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start position, keeping tension no/na muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.

name: Leverage iso row
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that the handles are at peito level. Grasp the handles with either a neutral or pronated grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull the handles towards Seus/Suas torso, retracting Seus/Suas shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.

Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position. For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to the stops to keep tension no/na muscles being worked.

name: Leverage desenvolvimento
instructions: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for Seus/Suas height. The handles should be near the top of the ombros at the beginning of the motion. Seus/Suas peito and head should be up and handles held with a pronated grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press the handles upward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso to just above the start position, keeping tension no/na muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.

name: Leverage shrug
instructions: Load the pins to an appropriate peso. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower Seus/Suas hips as you take a breath. Look forward with Seus/Suas head and keep Seus/Suas peito up.

Drive through the floor with Seus/Suas heels, extending Seus/Suas hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep Seus/Suas braços straight throughout the movement, finishing with Seus/Suas ombros costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise the peso by shrugging the ombros towards Seus/Suas ears, moving straight up and down.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return the peso to the starting position.

name: Linear 3-part start technique
instructions: This drill helps you accelerate as quickly as possible into a sprint from a dead stop. It helps to use a line to start from. Begin with two pés no/na line. Place Seus/Suas left foot com o/a toe next to Seus/Suas right ankle. Place Seus/Suas right foot 4-6 inches behind the left.
Place Seus/Suas right hand onto the line, and thing bring Seus/Suas nose close to Seus/Suas left knee.
agachamento down as you lean foward, Seus/Suas head being lower than Seus/Suas hips and Seus/Suas peso loaded onto the left leg. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Take Seus/Suas left hand up so that it is parallel to the ground, pointing behind you, and explode out when ready.

name: Linear acceleration wall drill
instructions: Lean at around 45 degrees against a wall. Seus/Suas pés should be together, glúteos contracted.
Begin by lifting Seus/Suas right knee quickly, pausing, and then driving it straight down into the ground.
Switch pernas, raising the opposite knee, and then attacking the ground straight down.
Repeat once more with Seus/Suas right leg, and as soon as the right foot strikes the ground hammer them out rapidly, alternating left and right as fast as you can.

name: Linear depth jump
instructions: You will need two boxes or benches spaced a few pés away from each other. Begin by standing on one box facing towards the other platform.
To initiate the movement, gently drop down to the ground between Seus/Suas platforms, allowing the knees and hips to flex.
Reverse the motion by exploding, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump onto the other platform.
Land softly, asborbing the impact through the pernas.

name: Log lift
instructions: Begin standing com o/a log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into Seus/Suas peito. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push Seus/Suas head costas and look up, creating a shelf on Seus/Suas peito to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above Seus/Suas head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push Seus/Suas head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.

name: London bridges
instructions: Attach a climbing rope to a high beam or cross member. Below it, ensure that the smith machine bar is locked in place com o/a safeties and cannot move. Alternatively, a secure box could also be utilized.
Stand no/na bar, using the rope to balance yourself. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, lean costas and lower Seus/Suas body by slowly going hand over hand com o/a rope. Continue until you are perpendicular to the ground.
Keeping Seus/Suas body straight, reverse the motion, going hand over hand costas to the starting position.

name: Looking at ceiling
instructions: Kneel no/na floor, holding Seus/Suas heels with both mãos.
Lift Seus/Suas buttocks up and forward while bringing Seus/Suas head costas to look up at the ceiling, to give an arch in Seus/Suas costas.

name: Low cable crossover
instructions: To move into the starting position, place the pulleys at the low position, select the resistência to be used and grasp a handle in each hand.
Step forward, gaining tension in the pulleys. Seus/Suas palms should be facing forward, mãos below the waist, and Seus/Suas braços straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
With a slight bend in Seus/Suas braços, draw Seus/Suas mãos upward and toward the midline of Seus/Suas body. Seus/Suas mãos should come together in front of Seus/Suas peito, palms facing up.
Return Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position after a brief pause.

name: Low cable tríceps extension
instructions: Select the desired peso and lay down face up no/na bench of a seated row machine that has a rope attached to it. Seus/Suas head should be pointing towards the attachment.
Grab the outside of the rope ends with Seus/Suas palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Position Seus/Suas elbows so that they are dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus and Seus/Suas upper braços are perpendicular (90 degree angle) to Seus/Suas torso. Tip: Keep the elbows in and make sure that the upper braços point to the ceiling while Seus/Suas forearms point towards the pulley above Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, extend Seus/Suas lower braços until they are straight and vertical. The upper braços and elbows remain stationary throughout the movement. Only the forearms should move. Contract the tríceps hard for a second.
As you breathe in slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Low pulley row to neck
instructions: Sit on a low pulley row machine with a rope attachment.

Grab the ends of the rope using a palms-down grip and sit with Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas knees slightly bent. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas costas almost completely vertical and Seus/Suas braços fully extended in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While keeping Seus/Suas torso stationary, lift Seus/Suas elbows and start bending them as you pull the rope towards Seus/Suas neck while exhaling. Throughout the movement Seus/Suas upper braços should remain parallel to the floor. Tip: Continue this motion until Seus/Suas mãos are almost next to Seus/Suas ears (the forearms will not be parallel to the floor at the end of the movement as they will be angled a bit upwards) and Seus/Suas elbows are out away from Seus/Suas sides.
After holding for a second or so at the contracted position, come costas slowly to the starting position as you inhale. Tip: Again, during no part of the movement should the torso move.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lower costas-smr
instructions: In a seated position, place a foam roll under Seus/Suas lower costas. Cross Seus/Suas braços in front of you and protract Seus/Suas ombros. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas hips off of the floor and lean costas, keeping Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas lower costas. Now shift Seus/Suas peso slightly to one side, keeping Seus/Suas peso off of the spine and no/na muscles to the side of it. Roll over Seus/Suas lower costas, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat no/na other side.

name: Lower costas curl
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas stomach with Seus/Suas braços out to Seus/Suas sides. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Using Seus/Suas lower costas muscles, extend Seus/Suas spine lifting Seus/Suas peito off of the ground. Do not use Seus/Suas braços to push yourself up. Keep Seus/Suas head up during the movement. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Lunge pass through
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas torso upright holding a kettlebell in Seus/Suas right hand. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Step forward with Seus/Suas left foot and lower Seus/Suas upper body down by flexing the hip and the knee, keeping the torso upright. Lower Seus/Suas costas knee until it nearly touches the ground.
As you lunge, pass the kettlebell under Seus/Suas front leg to Seus/Suas opposite hand.
Pressing through the heel of Seus/Suas foot, Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions, alternating pernas.

name: Lunge sprint
instructions: Adjust a bar in a Smith machine to an appropriate height. Position yourself sob o/a bar, racking it across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros. Unrack the bar, and then split Seus/Suas pés, moving one foot forward and one foot costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower Seus/Suas costas knee nearly to the ground, flexing the knees and lowering Seus/Suas hips as you do so.

At the bottom of the descent, immediately reverse direction. Explosively drive through the heel of Seus/Suas front foot with light pressure from Seus/Suas costas foot. Jump up and reverse the position of Seus/Suas pernas.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying bent leg groin
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas knees bent and the soles of the pés pressed together. Have Seus/Suas partner hold Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to squeeze Seus/Suas knees together, while Seus/Suas partner prevents any movement from occurring.

After 10-20 seconds, relax Seus/Suas muscles as Seus/Suas partner gently pushes Seus/Suas knees towards the floor. Be sure to inform Seus/Suas helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

name: Lying cable curl
instructions: Grab a straight bar or E-Z bar attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both mãos, using an underhand (palms facing up) shoulder-width grip.
Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas on top of an exercise mat in front of the peso stack with Seus/Suas pés flat against the frame of the pulley machine and Seus/Suas pernas straight.
With Seus/Suas braços extended and Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas body slightly bend Seus/Suas braços. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary and the elbows close to Seus/Suas body, curl the bar up slowly toward Seus/Suas peito as you breathe out and you squeeze the bíceps.
After a second squeeze at the top of the movement, slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying cambered barbell row
instructions: Place a cambered bar underneath an exercise bench.
Lie face down no/na exercise bench and grab the bar using a palms down (pronated grip) that is wider than shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale row the bar up as you keep the elbows close to Seus/Suas body to either Seus/Suas peito, in order to target the upper mid costas, or to Seus/Suas stomach if targeting the lats is Seus/Suas goal.
After a second hold at the top, lower costas down to the starting position slowly as you inhale.

name: Lying close-grip bar curl on high pulley
instructions: Place a flat bench in front of a high pulley or lat pulldown machine.
Hold the straight bar attachment using an underhand grip (palms up) that is about shoulder width.
Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas head over the end of the bench.
Now extend Seus/Suas braços straight above Seus/Suas ombros. Seus/Suas torso and Seus/Suas braços should make a 90-degree angle and the elbows should be in. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe out, curl the bar down in a semicircular motion until it touches Seus/Suas chin. Squeeze the bíceps for a second at the top contracted position. Tip: As you execute this motion only the forearms should move. At no time should the upper braços be moving at all. They are to remain perpendicular throughout the movement.
Return to starting position slowly.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying close-grip barbell tríceps extension behind the head
instructions: While holding a barbell or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on Seus/Suas costas on a flat bench with Seus/Suas head close to the end of the bench. Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it no/na inner handles.

Extend Seus/Suas braços in front of you and slowly bring the bar costas in a semi circular motion (while keeping the braços extended) to a position over Seus/Suas head. At the end of this step Seus/Suas braços should be overhead and parallel to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas elbows in at all times.
As you inhale, lower the bar by bending at the elbows and while keeping the upper arm stationary. Keep lowering the bar until Seus/Suas forearms are perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale bring the bar costas up to the starting position by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion until the lower braços are also parallel to the floor. Contract the tríceps hard at the top of the movement for a second. Tip: Again, only the forearms should move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying close-grip barbell tríceps press to chin
instructions: While holding a barbell or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on Seus/Suas costas on a flat bench with Seus/Suas head off the end of the bench. Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it no/na inner handles.
Extend Seus/Suas braços in front of you as you hold the barbell over Seus/Suas peito. The braços should be perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso (90-degree angle). Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you inhale, lower the bar in a semi-circular motion by bending at the elbows and while keeping the upper arm stationary and elbows in. Keep lowering the bar until it lightly touches Seus/Suas chin.

As you exhale bring the bar costas up to the starting position by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion. Contract the tríceps hard at the top of the movement for a second. Tip: Again, only the forearms should move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying crossover
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended.

Cross one leg over Seus/Suas body com o/a knee bent, attempting to touch the knee to the ground. Seus/Suas partner should kneel beside you, holding Seus/Suas shoulder down with one hand and controlling the crossed leg com o/a other. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to raise the bent knee off of the ground as Seus/Suas partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the leg as Seus/Suas partner gently presses the knee towards the floor. Repeat com o/a other side.

name: Lying dumbbell tricep extension
instructions: Lie on a flat bench while holding two dumbbells directly in front of you. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended at a 90-degree angle from Seus/Suas torso and the floor. The palms should be facing in and the elbows should be tucked in. This is the starting position.
As you breathe in and you keep the upper braços stationary com o/a elbows in, Baixe o peso lentamente until the dumbbells are near Seus/Suas ears.
At that point, while keeping the elbows in and the upper braços stationary, use the tríceps to bring the peso costas up to the starting position as you breathe out.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying face down plate neck resistência
instructions: Lie face down with Seus/Suas whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a peso plate behind Seus/Suas head. Tip: You will need to position yourself so that Seus/Suas ombros are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the upper peito, neck and face to be off the bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the plate secure no/na costas of Seus/Suas head slowly lower Seus/Suas head (as in saying "yes") as you breathe in.
Raise Seus/Suas head costas up to the starting position in a semi-circular motion as you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying face up plate neck resistência
instructions: Lie face up with Seus/Suas whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a peso plate on top of Seus/Suas forehead. Tip: You will need to position yourself so that Seus/Suas ombros are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the traps, neck and head to be off the bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the plate secure on Seus/Suas forehead slowly lower Seus/Suas head costas in a semi-circular motion as you breathe in.
Raise Seus/Suas head costas up to the starting position in a semi-circular motion as you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying glute
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to Seus/Suas body. Seus/Suas partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to push Seus/Suas leg towards Seus/Suas partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as Seus/Suas partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards Seus/Suas peito. Be sure to inform Seus/Suas helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

name: Lying hamstring
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended. Seus/Suas partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have Seus/Suas partner hold the ankle. Seus/Suas partner can use their shoulder to brace Seus/Suas leg if necessary. Esta será sua posição inicial.
With Seus/Suas partner holding Seus/Suas leg in place, attempt to flex the knee, contracting the hamstrings for 10-20 seconds.

Then relax Seus/Suas leg, allowing Seus/Suas partner to gently push the leg towards Seus/Suas head. Be sure to inform Seus/Suas helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.

name: Lying high bench barbell curl
instructions: Lie face forward on a tall flat bench while holding a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up). Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it no/na inner handles. Seus/Suas upper body should be positioned in a way that the upper peito is over the end of the bench and the barbell is hanging in front of you com o/a braços extended and perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While keeping the elbows in and the upper braços stationary, curl the peso up in a semi-circular motion as you contract the bíceps and exhale. Hold at the top of the movement for a second.
As you inhale, slowly go costas to the starting position. Tip: Maintain full control of the peso at all times and avoid any swinging. Remember, only the forearms should move throughout the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying leg curls
instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit Seus/Suas height and lie face down no/na leg curl machine com o/a pad of the lever no/na costas of Seus/Suas pernas (just a few inches sob o/a calves). Tip: Preferably use a leg curl machine that is angled as opposed to flat since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment.

Keeping the torso flat no/na bench, ensure Seus/Suas pernas are fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine. Position Seus/Suas toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances described no/na foot positioning section). Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you exhale, curl Seus/Suas pernas up as far as possible without lifting the upper pernas from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the pernas costas to the initial position. Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying machine agachamento
instructions: Adjust the leg machine to a height that will allow you to get inside it with Seus/Suas knees bent and the thighs slightly below parallel.

Once you select the peso, position yourself inside the machine face up com o/a knees bent and thighs slightly below parallel to the platform. Make sure that the knees do not go past the toes. The angle created between the hamstrings and the calves should be one that is slightly less than 90 degrees (since Seus/Suas starting position requires you to start slightly below parallel). Seus/Suas costas and Seus/Suas head should be resting no/na machine while Seus/Suas ombros are pressed sob o/a shoulder pads.
Coloque suas mãos by the handles and position Seus/Suas pés slightly pointing out at a shoulder width position. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While pressing com o/a balls of the pés as you breathe out, make Seus/Suas whole body erect as you squeeze the quads. Hold the contracted position for a second.
