Tip: Since you are starting below parallel, you can opt to use Seus/Suas mãos to help you up by pressing on Seus/Suas thighs only no/na first repetition.

Slowly agachamento down as you inhale but instead of going all the way down to the starting position, just stop once Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the platform. The angle between Seus/Suas hamstrings and calves should be a 90-degree angle.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying one-arm lateral raise
instructions: While holding a dumbbell in one hand, lay with Seus/Suas peito down on a flat bench. The other hand can be used to hold to the leg of the bench for stability.
Position the palm of the hand that is holding the dumbbell in a neutral manner (palms facing Seus/Suas torso) as you keep the arm extended com o/a elbow slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now raise the arm com o/a dumbbell to the side until Seus/Suas elbow is at shoulder height and Seus/Suas arm is roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain Seus/Suas arm perpendicular to the torso while keeping Seus/Suas arm extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying prone quadriceps
instructions: Lay face down no/na floor with Seus/Suas partner kneeling beside you. Flex one knee and raise that leg off the ground, attempting to touch Seus/Suas glúteos with Seus/Suas foot. Seus/Suas partner should hold the knee and ankle. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to extend Seus/Suas knee while Seus/Suas partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax Seus/Suas muscles as Seus/Suas partner gently pushes the foot towards Seus/Suas glúteos, further stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
After 10-20 seconds, switch sides.

name: Lying rear delt raise
instructions: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, lay with Seus/Suas peito down on a flat bench.
Position the palms of the mãos in a neutral manner (palms facing Seus/Suas torso) as you keep the braços extended com o/a elbows slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now raise the braços to the side until Seus/Suas elbows are at shoulder height and Seus/Suas braços are roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain Seus/Suas braços perpendicular to the torso while keeping them extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other arm.

name: Lying supine dumbbell curl
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench face up while holding a dumbbell in each arm on top of Seus/Suas thighs.
Bring the dumbbells to the sides com o/a braços extended and the palms of the mãos facing Seus/Suas thighs (neutral grip).

While keeping the braços close to Seus/Suas torso and elbows in, slowly lower Seus/Suas braços (as you keep them extended with a slight bend at the elbows) as far down towards the floor as you can go. Once you cannot go down any further, lock Seus/Suas upper braços in that position and that will be Seus/Suas starting position.

As you breathe out, slowly begin to curl the peso up as you simultaneously rotate Seus/Suas wrists so that the palms of the mãos face up. Continue curling the peso until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and squeeze hard at the top position for a second. Tip: Only the forearms should move. Upper braços should remain stationary and elbows should stay in throughout the movement.
Return costas to the starting position very slowly.

name: Lying t-bar row
instructions: Load up the T-bar Row Machine com o/a desired peso and adjust the leg height so that Seus/Suas upper peito is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand no/na appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper peito at the top of the pad.
Lay face down no/na pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of Seus/Suas costas you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend Seus/Suas braços in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale slowly pull the peso up and squeeze Seus/Suas costas at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper braços as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the costas muscles. Also, do not lift Seus/Suas body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the bíceps to lift the peso.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go costas down to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Lying tríceps press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with either an e-z bar (my preference) or a straight bar placed no/na floor behind Seus/Suas head and Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.

Grab the bar behind you, using a medium overhand (pronated) grip, and raise the bar in front of you at braços length. Tip: The braços should be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. The elbows should be tucked in. This is the starting position.
As you breathe in, Baixe o peso lentamente until the bar lightly touches Seus/Suas forehead while keeping the upper braços and elbows stationary.
At that point, use the tríceps to bring the peso costas up to the starting position as you breathe out.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Machine supino
instructions: Sit down no/na peito Press Machine and select the peso.
Step no/na lever provided by the machine since it will help you to bring the handles forward so that you can grab the handles and fully extend the braços.

Grab the handles with a palms-down grip and lift Seus/Suas elbows so that Seus/Suas upper braços are parallel to the floor to the sides of Seus/Suas torso. Tip: Seus/Suas forearms will be pointing forward since you are grabbing the handles. Once you bring the handles forward and extend the braços you will be at the starting position.
Now bring the handles costas towards you as you breathe in.
Push the handles away from you as you flex Seus/Suas pecs and you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second before going costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of reps.
When finished step no/na lever again and slowly get the handles costas to their original place.

name: Machine rosca bíceps
instructions: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make Seus/Suas peso selection. Place Seus/Suas upper braços against the pads and grasp the handles. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by flexing the elbow, pulling Seus/Suas lower arm towards Seus/Suas upper arm.
Pause at the top of the movement, and then slowly return the peso to the starting position.
Avoid returning the peso all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension no/na muscles being worked.

name: Machine preacher curls
instructions: Sit down no/na Preacher Curl Machine and select the peso.

Place the costas of Seus/Suas upper braços (Seus/Suas tríceps) no/na preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up). Tip: Make sure that when you place the braços no/na pad you keep the elbows in. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the bíceps. At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Only the forearms should move. The upper braços should remain stationary and no/na pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Machine shoulder (military) press
instructions: Sit down no/na desenvolvimento Machine and select the peso.
Grab the handles to Seus/Suas sides as you keep the elbows bent and in line with Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now lift the handles as you exhale and you extend the braços fully. At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.
Lower the handles slowly costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Machine tríceps extension
instructions: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make Seus/Suas peso selection. Place Seus/Suas upper braços against the pads and grasp the handles. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by extending the elbow, pulling Seus/Suas lower arm away from Seus/Suas upper arm.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly return the peso to the starting position.
Avoid returning the peso all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension no/na muscles being worked.

name: Medicine ball peito pass
instructions: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lacking one, this movement can be performed against a wall.
Begin facing Seus/Suas partner holding the medicine ball at Seus/Suas torso with both mãos.
Pull the ball to Seus/Suas peito, and reverse the motion by extending through the elbows. For sports applications, you can take a step as you throw.
Seus/Suas partner should catch the ball, and throw it costas to you.
Receive the throw with both mãos at peito height.

name: Medicine ball full twist
instructions: For this exercise you will need a medicine ball and a partner. Stand costas to costas with Seus/Suas partner, spaced 2-3 pés apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Hold the ball in front of the trunk. Open the hips and turn the ombros at the same time as Seus/Suas partner.
For full rotation, you and Seus/Suas partner should twist in the same direction, i.e. counter-clockwise.
Pass the ball to Seus/Suas partner, and both of you can now twist in the opposite direction to repeat the procedure.

name: Medicine ball scoop throw
instructions: Assume a semisquat stance with a medicine ball in Seus/Suas mãos. Seus/Suas braços should hang so the ball is near Seus/Suas pés.
Begin by thrusting the hips forward as you extend through the pernas, jumping up.

As you do, swing Seus/Suas braços up and over Seus/Suas head, keeping them extended, releasing the ball at the peak of Seus/Suas movement. The goal is to throw the ball the greatest distance behind you.

name: Middle costas shrug
instructions: Lie facedown on an incline bench while holding a dumbbell in each hand. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended hanging down and pointing towards the floor. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing each other. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and hold the contraction for a full second. Tip: This movement is just like the reverse action of a hug, or trying to perform rear laterals as if you had no braços.
As you inhale go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Middle costas stretch
instructions: Stand so Seus/Suas pés are shoulder width apart and Seus/Suas mãos are on Seus/Suas hips.
Twist at Seus/Suas waist until you feel a stretch. Hold for 10 to 15 seconds, then twist to the other side.

name: Mixed grip chin
instructions: Using a spacing that is just about 1 inch wider than shoulder width, grab a pull-up bar com o/a palms of one hand facing forward and the palms of the other hand facing towards you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now start to pull yourself up as you exhale. Tip: com o/a arm that has the palms facing up concentrate on using the costas muscles in order to perform the movement. The elbow of that arm should remain close to the torso. com o/a other arm that has the palms facing forward, the elbows will be away but in line com o/a torso. You will concentrate on using the lats to pull Seus/Suas body up.
After a second contraction at the top, start to slowly come down as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

no/na following set, switch grips; so if you had the right hand com o/a palms facing you and the left one com o/a palms facing forward, no/na next set you will have the palms facing forward for the right hand and facing you for the left.

name: Monster walk
instructions: Place a band around both ankles and another around both knees. There should be enough tension that they are tight when Seus/Suas pés are shoulder width apart.
To begin, take short steps forward alternating Seus/Suas left and right foot.
After several steps, do just the opposite and walk backward to where you started.

name: Mountain climbers
instructions: Begin in a flexão position, with Seus/Suas peso supported by Seus/Suas mãos and toes. Flexing the knee and hip, bring one leg until the knee is approximately sob o/a hip. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Explosively reverse the positions of Seus/Suas pernas, extending the bent leg until the leg is straight and supported by the toe, and bringing the other foot up com o/a hip and knee flexed. Repeat in an alternating fashion for 20-30 seconds.

name: Moving claw series
instructions: This move helps prepare Seus/Suas running form to help you excel at sprinting. As you run, be sure to flex the knee, aiming to kick Seus/Suas glúteos as the hip extends.
Reload the quad as the leg moves costas forward, attacking the ground no/na next step.
Ensure that as you run, you block com o/a braços, punching through in a rapid 1-2 motion.

name: Muscle snatch
instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell held at the mid thigh position with a wide grip. The pés should be directly below the hips, com o/a pés turned out as needed. Lower the hips, com o/a peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.

Begin the pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar. Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body.
Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, without rebending the knees.

name: Muscle up
instructions: Grip the rings using a false grip, com o/a base of Seus/Suas palms on top of the rings. Initiate a pull up by pulling the elbows down to Seus/Suas side, flexing the elbows.

As you reach the top position of the pull-up, pull the rings to Seus/Suas armpits as you roll Seus/Suas ombros forward, allowing Seus/Suas elbows to move straight costas behind you. This puts you into the proper position to continue into the dip portion of the movement.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.

name: Narrow stance hack squats
instructions: Place the costas of Seus/Suas torso against the costas pad of the machine and hook Seus/Suas ombros sob o/a shoulder pads provided.

Position Seus/Suas pernas in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Seus/Suas pés should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain the costas no/na pad at all times.
Place Seus/Suas braços no/na side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten Seus/Suas pernas without locking the knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up (costas no/na pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Narrow stance leg press
instructions: Using a leg press machine, sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pernas no/na platform directly in front of you at a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Seus/Suas pés should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain the costas no/na pad at all times.

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until Seus/Suas pernas are fully extended in front of you. Tip: Make sure that you do not lock Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas torso and the pernas should make a perfect 90-degree angle. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until Seus/Suas upper and lower pernas make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés and using the quadriceps go costas to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.

name: Narrow stance squats
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. pés should be around 3-6 inches apart. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times (looking down will get you off balance) and maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Natural glute ham raise
instructions: Using the leg pad of a lat pulldown machine or a preacher bench, position yourself so that Seus/Suas ankles are sob o/a pads, knees no/na seat, and you are facing away from the machine. You should be upright and maintaining good posture.
Esta será sua posição inicial. Lower yourself under control until Seus/Suas knees are almost completely straight.
Remaining in control, raise yourself costas up to the starting position.
If you are unable to complete a rep, use a band, a partner, or push off of a box to aid in completing a repetition.

name: Neck-smr
instructions: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind Seus/Suas head and against Seus/Suas neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Starting at the top of Seus/Suas neck, slowly roll down the muscles of Seus/Suas neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

name: Neck press
instructions: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over Seus/Suas neck with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Oblique crunches
instructions: Lie flat no/na floor with Seus/Suas lower costas pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put one hand beside Seus/Suas head and the other to the side against the floor.
Make sure Seus/Suas pés are elevated and resting on a flat surface.
Now lift the shoulder in which Seus/Suas hand is touching Seus/Suas head.

Simply elevate Seus/Suas shoulder and body upward until you touch Seus/Suas knee. For example, if you have Seus/Suas right hand besides Seus/Suas head, then you want to elevate Seus/Suas body upwards until Seus/Suas right elbow touches Seus/Suas left knee. The same variation can be applied doing the inverse and using Seus/Suas left elbow to touch Seus/Suas right knee.
After Seus/Suas knee touches Seus/Suas elbow, lower Seus/Suas body until you have reached the starting position.
Remember to breathe in during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to breathe out during the concentric (upward) part of the exercise.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.

name: Oblique crunches - on the floor
instructions: Start out by lying on Seus/Suas right side with Seus/Suas pernas lying on top of each other. Make sure Seus/Suas knees are bent a little bit.
Place Seus/Suas left hand behind Seus/Suas head.
Once you are in this set position, begin by moving Seus/Suas left elbow up as you would perform a normal crunch except this time the main emphasis is on Seus/Suas obliques.
Crunch as high as you can, hold the contraction for a second and then slowly drop costas down into the starting position.
Remember to breathe in during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to breathe out during the concentric (elevation) part of the exercise.

name: Olympic agachamento
instructions: Begin with a barbell supported on top of the traps. The peito should be up, and the head facing forward. Adopt a hip width stance com o/a pés turned out as needed.

Descend by flexing the knees, refraining from moving the hips costas as much as possible. This requires that the knees travel forward; ensure that they stay aligned com o/a pés. The goal is to keep the torso as upright as possible. Continue all the way down, keeping the peso no/na front of the heel.
At the moment the upper pernas contact the lower, reverse the motion, driving the peso upward.

name: On-your-costas quad stretch
instructions: Lie on a flat bench or step, and hang one leg and arm over the side.
Bend the knee and hold the top of the foot. As you do this, be careful not to arch Seus/Suas lower costas.
Pull the belly button to the spine to stay in neutral. Press Seus/Suas foot down and into Seus/Suas hand. To add the hip stretch, lift the hip of the leg you're holding up toward the ceiling.
Switch sides.

name: On your side quad stretch
instructions: Start off by lying on Seus/Suas right side, with Seus/Suas right knee bent at a 90-degree angle resting no/na floor in front of you (this stabilizes the torso).

Bend Seus/Suas left knee behind you and hold Seus/Suas left foot with Seus/Suas left hand. To stretch Seus/Suas hip flexor, press Seus/Suas left hip forward as you push Seus/Suas left foot costas into Seus/Suas hand. Switch sides.

name: One-arm dumbbell row
instructions: Choose a flat bench and place a dumbbell on each side of it.

Place the right leg on top of the end of the bench, bend Seus/Suas torso forward from the waist until Seus/Suas upper body is parallel to the floor, and place Seus/Suas right hand no/na other end of the bench for support.

Use the left hand to pick up the dumbbell no/na floor and hold the peso while keeping Seus/Suas lower costas straight. The palm of the hand should be facing Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Pull the resistência straight up to the side of Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas upper arm close to Seus/Suas side and keeping the torso stationary. Breathe out as you perform this step. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. Also, make sure that the force is performed com o/a costas muscles and not the braços. Finally, the upper torso should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the dumbbell; therefore do not try to pull the dumbbell up using the forearms.
Lower the resistência straight down to the starting position. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the specified amount of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat again com o/a other arm.

name: One-arm flat bench dumbbell flye
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand resting on top of Seus/Suas thigh. The palm of Seus/Suas hand com o/a dumbbell in it should be at a neutral grip.

By using Seus/Suas thighs to help you get the dumbbell up, clean the dumbbell so that you can hold it in front of you with Seus/Suas lifting arm being fully extended. Remember to maintain a neutral grip with this exercise. Seus/Suas non lifting hand should be to the side holding the flat bench for better support. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Seus/Suas arm com o/a peso should have a slight bend on Seus/Suas elbow in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon. Begin by lowering Seus/Suas arm com o/a peso in it out in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on Seus/Suas peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, Seus/Suas lifting arm should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return Seus/Suas lifting arm costas to the starting position as you squeeze Seus/Suas peito muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the peso.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: One-arm high-pulley cable side bends
instructions: Connect a standard handle to a tower. Move cable to highest pulley position.
Stand with side to cable. With one hand, reach up and grab handle with underhand grip.
Pull down cable until elbow touches Seus/Suas side and the handle is by Seus/Suas shoulder.
Position pés hip-width apart. Place free hand on hip to help gauge pivot point.
Keep arm in static position. Contract oblique to bring the peso down in a side crunch.
Once you reach maximum contraction, slowly release the peso to the starting position. The peso stack should never be unloaded in a resting position. The aim is constant tension during the set.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: One-arm incline lateral raise
instructions: Lie down sideways on an incline supino with a dumbbell in the hand. Make sure the shoulder is pressing against the incline bench and the arm is lying across Seus/Suas body com o/a palm around Seus/Suas navel.
Hold a dumbbell in Seus/Suas uppermost arm while keeping it extended in front of you parallel to the floor. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

While keeping the dumbbell parallel to the floor at all times, perform a lateral raise. Seus/Suas arm should travel straight up until it is pointing at the ceiling. Tip: Exhale as you perform this movement. Hold the dumbbell in the position and feel the contraction in the ombros for a second.
While inhaling lower the peso across Seus/Suas body costas into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One-arm kettlebell clean
instructions: Place a kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés. As you bend down to grab the kettlebell, push Seus/Suas butt costas and keep Seus/Suas eyes looking forward.
Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Return the peso to the starting position.

name: One-arm kettlebell clean and jerk
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle.

Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.
Dip Seus/Suas body by bending the knees, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using Seus/Suas body's momentum to move the peso.
Receive the peso overhead by returning to a agachamento position underneath the peso.
Keeping the peso overhead, return to a standing position. Lower the peso to the floor to perform the next repetition.

name: One-arm kettlebell floor press
instructions: Lie no/na floor holding a kettlebell with one hand, with Seus/Suas upper arm supported by the floor. The palm should be facing in.
Press the kettlebell straight up toward the ceiling, rotating Seus/Suas wrist.
Lower the kettlebell costas to the starting position and repeat.

name: One-arm kettlebell jerk
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Dip Seus/Suas body by bending the knees, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using Seus/Suas body's momentum to move the peso. Receive the peso overhead by returning to a agachamento position underneath the peso. Keeping the peso overhead, return to a standing position.
Lower the peso to perform the next repetition.

name: One-arm kettlebell military press to the side
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell costas to Seus/Suas shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract Seus/Suas lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

name: One-arm kettlebell para press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Hold the kettlebell com o/a elbow out to the side, and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell costas to Seus/Suas shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract Seus/Suas lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

name: One-arm kettlebell push press
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Dip Seus/Suas body by bending the knees, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using Seus/Suas body's momentum to move the peso. Lower the peso to perform the next repetition.

name: One-arm kettlebell row
instructions: Place a kettlebell in front of Seus/Suas pés. Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and then push Seus/Suas butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the starting position. Grab the kettlebell and pull it to Seus/Suas stomach, retracting Seus/Suas shoulder blade and flexing the elbow. Keep Seus/Suas costas straight. Lower and repeat.

name: One-arm kettlebell snatch
instructions: Place a kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés. Bend Seus/Suas knees and push Seus/Suas butt costas to get in the proper starting position.
Look straight ahead and swing the kettlebell costas between Seus/Suas pernas.

Immediately reverse the direction and drive through with Seus/Suas hips and knees, accelerating the kettlebell upward. As the kettlebell rises to Seus/Suas shoulder rotate Seus/Suas hand and punch straight up, using momentum to receive the peso locked out overhead.

name: One-arm kettlebell split jerk
instructions: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Dip Seus/Suas body by bending the knees, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using Seus/Suas body's momentum to move the peso.
Receive the peso overhead by returning to a agachamento position underneath the peso, positioning one leg in front of you and one leg behind you.
Keeping the peso overhead, return to a standing position and bring Seus/Suas pés together. Lower the peso to perform the next repetition.

name: One-arm kettlebell split snatch
instructions: Hold a kettlebell in one hand by the handle.
agachamento towards the floor, and then reverse the motion, extending the hips, knees, and finally the ankles, to raise the kettlebell overhead.

After fully extending the body, descend into a lunge position to receive the peso overhead, one leg forward and one leg costas. Ensure you drive through with Seus/Suas hips and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.
Return to a standing position, holding the peso overhead, and bring the pés together. Lower the peso to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: One-arm long bar row
instructions: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate peso onto Seus/Suas end.
Stand next to the bar, and take a grip with one hand close to the collar. Using Seus/Suas hips and pernas, rise to a standing position.
Assume a bent-knee stance with Seus/Suas hips costas and Seus/Suas peito up. Seus/Suas arm should be extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull the peso to Seus/Suas side by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. Do not jerk the peso or cheat during the movement.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: One-arm medicine ball slam
instructions: Start in a standing position with a staggered, athletic stance. Hold a medicine ball in one hand, no/na same side as Seus/Suas costas leg. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by winding the arm, raising the medicine ball above Seus/Suas head. As you do so, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles to load up for the slam.
At peak extension, flex the ombros, spine, and hips to throw the ball hard into the ground directly in front of you.
Catch the ball no/na bounce and continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: One-arm open palm kettlebell clean
instructions: Place one kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés.
Grab the handle with one hand and raise the kettlebell rapidly, let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palm of Seus/Suas hand.
Throw the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the handle with one hand.
Take the kettlebell to the floor and repeat. Make sure to work both braços.

name: One-arm overhead kettlebell squats
instructions: Clean and press a kettlebell with one arm. Clean the kettlebell to Seus/Suas shoulder by extending through the pernas and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas shoulder. Rotate Seus/Suas wrist as you do so. Press the peso overhead by extending through the elbow.Esta será sua posição inicial.
Looking straight ahead and keeping a kettlebell locked out above you, flex the knees and hips and lower Seus/Suas torso between Seus/Suas pernas, keeping Seus/Suas head and peito up.
Pause at the bottom position for a second before rising costas to the top, driving through the heels of Seus/Suas pés.

name: One-arm side levantamento terra
instructions: Stand to the side of a barbell next to its center. Bend Seus/Suas knees and lower Seus/Suas body until you are able to reach the barbell.

Grasp the bar as if you were grabbing a briefcase (palms facing you since the bar is sideways). You may need a wrist wrap if you are using a significant amount of peso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Use Seus/Suas pernas to help lift the barbell up while exhaling. Seus/Suas braços should extend fully as bring the barbell up until you are in a standing position.
Slowly bring the barbell costas down while inhaling. Tip: Make sure to bend Seus/Suas knees while lowering the peso to avoid any injury from occurring.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One-arm side laterals
instructions: Pick a dumbbell and place it in one of Seus/Suas mãos. Seus/Suas non lifting hand should be used to grab something steady such as an incline supino. Lean towards Seus/Suas lifting arm and away from the hand that is gripping the incline bench as this will allow you to keep Seus/Suas balance.
Stand with a straight torso and have the dumbbell by Seus/Suas side at arm's length com o/a palm of the hand facing you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbell to Seus/Suas side with a slight bend no/na elbow and Seus/Suas hand slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you arm is parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbell costas down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: One-legged cable kickback
instructions: Hook a leather ankle cuff to a low cable pulley and then attach the cuff to Seus/Suas ankle.
Face the peso stack from a distance of about two pés, grasping the steel frame for support.

While keeping Seus/Suas knees and hips bent slightly and Seus/Suas abdômen tight, contract Seus/Suas glúteos to slowly "kick" the working leg costas in a semicircular arc as high as it will comfortably go as you breathe out. Tip: At full extension, squeeze Seus/Suas glúteos for a second in order to achieve a peak contraction.
Now slowly bring Seus/Suas working leg forward, resisting the pull of the cable until you reach the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movement for the other side.

name: One arm against wall
instructions: From a standing position, place a bent arm against a wall or doorway.
Slowly lean toward Seus/Suas arm until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas lats.

name: One arm chin-up
instructions: For this exercise, start out by placing a towel around a chin up bar.
Grab the chin-up bar with Seus/Suas palm facing you. One hand will be grabbing the chin-up bar and the other will be grabbing the towel.
Bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.v

Pull Seus/Suas torso up until the bar touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second no/na contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One arm dumbbell supino
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand on top of Seus/Suas thigh.

By using Seus/Suas thigh to help you get the dumbbell up, clean the dumbbell up so that you can hold it in front of you at shoulder width. Use the hand you are not lifting with to help position the dumbbell over you properly.
Once at shoulder width, rotate Seus/Suas wrist forward so that the palm of Seus/Suas hand is facing away from you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Bring down the peso slowly to Seus/Suas side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbell at all times. Tip: Use the hand that you are not lifting with to help keep the dumbbell balance as you may struggle a bit at first. Only use Seus/Suas non-lifting hand if it is needed. Otherwise, keep it resting to the side.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, squeeze Seus/Suas peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One arm dumbbell preacher curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell com o/a right arm and place the upper arm on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbell should be held at shoulder length. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbell until Seus/Suas upper arm is extended and the bíceps is fully stretched.

As you exhale, use the bíceps to curl the peso up until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the bíceps hard for a second at the contracted position and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One arm floor press
instructions: Lie down on a flat surface with Seus/Suas costas pressing against the floor or an exercise mat. Make sure Seus/Suas knees are bent.

Have a partner hand you the bar on one hand. When starting, Seus/Suas arm should be just about fully extended, similar to the starting position of a barbell supino. However, this time Seus/Suas grip will be neutral (palms facing Seus/Suas torso).
Make sure the hand you are not using to lift the peso is placed by Seus/Suas side.
Begin the exercise by lowering the barbell until Seus/Suas elbow touches the ground. Make sure to breathe in as this is the eccentric (lowering part of the exercise).
Then start lifting the barbell costas up to the original starting position. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed Seus/Suas recommended repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One arm lat pulldown
instructions: Select an appropriate peso and adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handle with a pronated grip. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull the handle down, squeezing Seus/Suas elbow to Seus/Suas side as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handle to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to keep tension no/na muscles being worked.

name: One arm pronated dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: Lie flat on a bench while holding a dumbbell at braços length. Seus/Suas arm should be perpendicular to Seus/Suas body. The palm of Seus/Suas hand should be facing towards Seus/Suas pés as a pronated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place Seus/Suas non lifting hand on Seus/Suas bicep for support.
Slowly begin to lower the dumbbell down as you breathe in.
Then, begin lifting the dumbbell upward as you contract the tríceps. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed Seus/Suas set repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: One arm supinated dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: Lie flat on a bench while holding a dumbbell at braços length. Seus/Suas arm should be perpendicular to Seus/Suas body. The palm of Seus/Suas hand should be facing towards Seus/Suas face as a supinated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place Seus/Suas non lifting hand on Seus/Suas bicep for support.
Slowly begin to lower the dumbbell down as you breathe in.
Then, begin lifting the dumbbell upward as you contract the tríceps. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed Seus/Suas set repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movement.
Switch braços again and repeat the movement.

name: One half locust
instructions: Lie facedown no/na floor.
Put Seus/Suas left hand under Seus/Suas left hipbone to pad Seus/Suas hip and pubic bone.
Bend Seus/Suas right knee so you can hold the foot in Seus/Suas right hand.

Lift the foot in the air and simultaneously lift Seus/Suas ombros off the floor. This also stretches the right hip flexor and the peito and ombros. Switch sides. If it doesn't bother Seus/Suas costas, you can try it with both braços and pernas at the same time.

name: One handed hang
instructions: Grab onto a chinup bar with one hand, using a pronated grip. Keep Seus/Suas pés no/na floor or a step. Allow the majority of Seus/Suas peso to hang from that hand, while keeping Seus/Suas pés no/na ground. Hold for 10-20 seconds and switch sides.

name: One knee to peito
instructions: Start off by lying no/na floor.
Extend one leg straight and pull the other knee to Seus/Suas peito. Hold sob o/a knee joint to protect the kneecap.
Gently tug that knee toward Seus/Suas nose.
Switch sides. This stretches the buttocks and lower costas of the bent leg and the hip flexor of the straight leg.

name: One leg barbell agachamento
instructions: Start by standing about 2 to 3 pés in front of a flat bench with Seus/Suas costas facing the bench. Have a barbell in front of you no/na floor. Tip: Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.
Bend the knees and use a pronated grip with Seus/Suas mãos being wider than shoulder width apart from each other to lift the barbell up until you can rest it on Seus/Suas peito.

Then lift the barbell over Seus/Suas head and rest it no/na base of Seus/Suas neck. Move one foot costas so that Seus/Suas toe is resting no/na flat bench. Seus/Suas other foot should be stationary in front of you. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Tip: Make sure Seus/Suas costas is straight and peito is out while performing this exercise.

As you inhale, slowly lower Seus/Suas leg until Seus/Suas thigh is parallel to the floor. At this point, Seus/Suas knee should be over Seus/Suas toes. Seus/Suas peito should be directly above the middle of Seus/Suas thigh.
Leading com o/a peito and hips and contracting the quadriceps, elevate Seus/Suas leg costas to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movement.

name: Open palm kettlebell clean
instructions: Place one kettlebell between Seus/Suas pés. Clean the kettlebell by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards Seus/Suas ombros.
Release the kettlebell as it comes up, and let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palms of Seus/Suas mãos.
Release the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the handle with both mãos. Lower the kettlebell to the starting position and repeat.

name: Otis-up
instructions: Secure Seus/Suas pés and lay costas no/na floor. Seus/Suas knees should be bent. Hold a peso with both mãos to Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by flexing the hips and spine to raise Seus/Suas torso up from the ground.
As you move up, press the peso up so that it is above Seus/Suas head at the top of the movement.
Return the peso to Seus/Suas peito as you reverse the sit-up motion, ensuring not to go all the way down to the floor.

name: Overhead cable curl
instructions: To begin, set a peso that is comfortable on each side of the pulley machine. Note: Make sure that the amount of peso selected is the same on each side.
Now adjust the height of the pulleys on each side and make sure that they are positioned at a height higher than that of Seus/Suas ombros.

Stand in the middle of both sides and use an underhand grip (palms facing towards the ceiling) to grab each handle. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended and parallel to the floor with Seus/Suas pés positioned shoulder width apart from each other. Seus/Suas body should be evenly aligned the handles. This is the starting position.
While exhaling, slowly squeeze the bíceps on each side until Seus/Suas forearms and bíceps touch.
While inhaling, move Seus/Suas forearms costas to the starting position. Note: Seus/Suas entire body is stationary during this exercise except for the forearms.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições prescribed in Seus/Suas program.

name: Overhead lat
instructions: Sit upright no/na floor with Seus/Suas partner behind you. Raise one arm straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch Seus/Suas hand to Seus/Suas costas. Seus/Suas parner should hold Seus/Suas tricep and wrist. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to pull Seus/Suas upper arm to Seus/Suas side as Seus/Suas partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the arm and allow Seus/Suas partner to further stretch the lat by applying gentle pressure to the tricep. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Overhead slam
instructions: Hold a medine ball with both mãos and stand with Seus/Suas pés at shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above Seus/Suas head and fully extending Seus/Suas body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both mãos no/na bounce and repeat the movement.

name: Overhead agachamento
instructions: Start out by having a barbell in front of you no/na floor. Seus/Suas pés should be wider than shoulder width apart from each other.

Bend the knees and use a pronated grip (palms facing you) to grab the barbell. Seus/Suas mãos should be at a wider than shoulder width apart from each other before lifting. Once you are positioned, lift the barbell up until you can rest it on Seus/Suas peito.

Move the barbell over and slightly behind Seus/Suas head and make sure Seus/Suas braços are fully extended. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. Retract Seus/Suas shoulder blades. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Baixe o peso lentamente by bending Seus/Suas knees until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground while inhaling. Tip: Keep Seus/Suas costas straight while performing this exercise to avoid any injuries and Seus/Suas braços should remain extended and over Seus/Suas head at all times.
Now use Seus/Suas pés and pernas to help bring the peso costas up to the starting position while exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Overhead stretch
instructions: Standing straight up, lace Seus/Suas fingers together and open Seus/Suas palms to the ceiling. Keep Seus/Suas ombros down as you extend Seus/Suas braços up.
To create a full torso stretch, pull Seus/Suas tailbone down and stabilize Seus/Suas torso as you do this. Stretch the muscles on both the front and the costas of the torso.

name: Overhead tríceps
instructions: Sit upright no/na floor with Seus/Suas partner behind you. Raise one arm straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch Seus/Suas hand to Seus/Suas costas. Seus/Suas parner should hold Seus/Suas elbow and wrist. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to extend the arm straight into the air as Seus/Suas partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the arm and allow Seus/Suas partner to further stretch the tricep by applying gentle pressure to the wrist. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Pallof press
instructions: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and—if possible—position the cable to shoulder height. If not, a low pulley will suffice.
With Seus/Suas side to the cable, grab the handle with both mãos and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, com o/a tension of the peso no/na cable.
With Seus/Suas pés positioned hip-width apart and knees slightly bent, hold the cable to the middle of Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Press the cable away from Seus/Suas peito, fully extending both braços. You core should be tight and engaged.
Hold the repetition for several seconds before returning to the starting position.
At the conclusion of the set, repeat facing the other direction.

name: Pallof press with rotation
instructions: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and position the cable to shoulder height.

With Seus/Suas side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, com o/a tension of the peso no/na cable. Align outstretched arm with cable.
With Seus/Suas pés positioned hip-width apart, pull the cable into Seus/Suas peito and grab the handle with Seus/Suas other hand. Both mãos should be no/na handle at this time.
Facing forward, press the cable away from Seus/Suas peito. You core should be tight and engaged.
Keeping Seus/Suas hips straight, twist Seus/Suas torso away from the pulley until you get a full quarter rotation.
Maintain Seus/Suas rigid stance and straight braços. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner. Seus/Suas braços should be extended in front of you.
com o/a side tension still engaging Seus/Suas core, bring Seus/Suas mãos to Seus/Suas peito and immediately press outward to a fully extended position. This constitutes one rep.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: Palms-down dumbbell wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Start out by placing two dumbbells on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of Seus/Suas knees so that Seus/Suas body is facing the flat bench.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab both of the dumbbells with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against the flat bench. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Palms-down wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Start out by placing a barbell on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of Seus/Suas knees so that Seus/Suas body is facing the flat bench.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab the barbell with a pronated grip (palms down) and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against the flat bench. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Palms-up barbell wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Start out by placing a barbell on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of Seus/Suas knees so that Seus/Suas body is facing the flat bench.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab the barbell with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against the flat bench. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Palms-up dumbbell wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Start out by placing two dumbbells on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of Seus/Suas knees so that Seus/Suas body is facing the flat bench.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab both of the dumbbells with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against the flat bench. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise.
Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Parallel bar dip
instructions: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with Seus/Suas braços locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering Seus/Suas body until Seus/Suas braços break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself costas up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pelvic tilt into bridge
instructions: Lie down with Seus/Suas pés no/na floor, heels directly under Seus/Suas knees.
Lift only Seus/Suas tailbone to the ceiling to stretch Seus/Suas lower costas. (Don't lift the entire spine yet.) Pull in Seus/Suas stomach.
To go into a bridge, lift the entire spine except the neck.

name: Peroneals-smr
instructions: Lay on Seus/Suas side, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas forearm and on a foam roller placed no/na outside of Seus/Suas lower leg. Seus/Suas upper leg can either be on top of Seus/Suas lower leg, or you can cross it in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise Seus/Suas hips off of the ground and begin to roll from below the knee to above the ankle no/na side of Seus/Suas leg, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat no/na other leg.

name: Peroneals stretch
instructions: In a seated position, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. Esta será sua posição inicial.
com o/a leg extended and the heel off of the ground, pull no/na belt so that the foot is inverted, com o/a inside of the foot being pulled towards you. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Physioball hip bridge
instructions: Lay on a ball so that Seus/Suas upper costas is no/na ball with Seus/Suas hips unsupported. Both pés should be flat no/na floor, hip width apart or wider. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by extending the hips using Seus/Suas glúteos and hamstrings, raising Seus/Suas hips upward as you bridge.
Pause at the top of the motion and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Pin presses
instructions: Pin presses remove the eccentric phase of the supino, developing starting strength. They also allow you to train a desired range of motion.

The bench should be set up in a power rack. Set the pins to the desired point in Seus/Suas range of motion, whether it just be lockout or an inch off of Seus/Suas peito. The bar should be moved to the pins and prepared for lifting.

Begin by lying no/na bench, com o/a bar directly above the contact point during Seus/Suas regular bench. Tuck Seus/Suas pés underneath you and arch Seus/Suas costas. Using the bar to help support Seus/Suas peso, lift Seus/Suas shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use Seus/Suas pés to drive Seus/Suas traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.
You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus no/na tríceps. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
Return the bar to the pins, pausing before beginning the next repetition.

name: Piriformis-smr
instructions: Sit with Seus/Suas buttocks on top of a foam roll. Bend Seus/Suas knees, and then cross one leg so that the ankle is over the knee. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Shift Seus/Suas peso to the side of the crossed leg, rolling over the buttocks until you feel tension in Seus/Suas upper glute. You may assist the stretch by using one hand to pull the bent knee towards Seus/Suas peito. Hold this position for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Plank
instructions: Get into a prone position no/na floor, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas toes and Seus/Suas forearms. Seus/Suas braços are bent and directly below the shoulder.
Keep Seus/Suas body straight at all times, and hold this position as long as possible. To increase difficulty, an arm or leg can be raised.

name: Plate pinch
instructions: Grab two wide-rimmed plates and put them together com o/a smooth sides facing outward
Use Seus/Suas fingers to grip the outside part of the plate and Seus/Suas thumb for the other side thus holding both plates together. This is the starting position.
Squeeze the plate with Seus/Suas fingers and thumb. Hold this position for as long as you can.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets prescribed in Seus/Suas program.
Switch braços and repeat the movements.

name: Plate twist
instructions: Deite-se no chão or an exercise mat with Seus/Suas pernas fully extended and Seus/Suas upper body upright. Grab the plate by its sides with both mãos out in front of Seus/Suas abdominals with Seus/Suas braços slightly bent.

Slowly cross Seus/Suas pernas near Seus/Suas ankles and lift them up off the ground. Seus/Suas knees should also be bent slightly. Note: Move Seus/Suas upper body costas slightly to help keep you balanced turning this exercise. This is the starting position.
Move the plate to the left side and touch the floor with it. Breathe out as you perform that movement.

Come costas to the starting position as you breathe in and then repeat the movement but this time to the right side of the body. Tip: Use a slow controlled movement at all times. Jerking motions can injure the costas.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Platform hamstring slides
instructions: For this movement a wooden floor or similar is needed. Lay on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended. Place a gym towel or a light peso underneath Seus/Suas heel. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing the knee, keeping Seus/Suas other leg straight.
Continue bringing the heel closer to you, sliding it no/na floor.
At full knee flexion, reverse the movement to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Plie dumbbell agachamento
instructions: Hold a dumbbell at the base with both mãos and stand straight up. Move Seus/Suas pernas so that they are wider than shoulder width apart from each other with Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Seus/Suas toes should be facing out. Note: Seus/Suas braços should be stationary while performing the exercise. This is the starting position.
Slowly bend the knees and lower Seus/Suas pernas until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the floor. Make sure to inhale as this is the eccentric part of the exercise.
Press mainly com o/a heel of the foot to bring the body costas to the starting position while exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Plyo kettlebell pushups
instructions: Place a kettlebell no/na floor. Place yourself in a flexão position, on Seus/Suas toes with one hand no/na ground and one hand holding the kettlebell, with Seus/Suas elbows extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by lowering yourself as low as you can, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.

Quickly and forcefully reverse direction, pushing yourself up to the other side of the kettlebell, switching mãos as you do so. Continue the movement by descending and repeating the movement costas and forth.

name: Plyo push-up
instructions: Move into a prone position no/na floor, supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas mãos and toes.
Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended com o/a mãos around shoulder width. Keep Seus/Suas body straight throughout the movement. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering Seus/Suas peito towards the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible. Attempt to push Seus/Suas upper body up until Seus/Suas mãos leave the ground.
Retorne para a posição inicial and repeat the exercise.
For added difficulty, add claps into the movement while you are air borne.

name: Posterior tibialis stretch
instructions: In a seated position, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. Esta será sua posição inicial.
com o/a leg extended and the heel off of the ground, pull no/na belt so that the foot is everted, com o/a outside of the foot being pulled towards you. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Power clean
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés slightly wider than shoulder width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
agachamento down and grasp bar with a closed, pronated grip. Seus/Suas mãos should be slightly wider than shoulder width apart outside knees with elbows fully extended.
Place the bar about 1 inch in front of Seus/Suas shins and over the balls of Seus/Suas pés.
Seus/Suas costas should be flat or slightly arched, Seus/Suas peito held up and out and Seus/Suas shoulder blades should be retracted.
Keep Seus/Suas head in a neutral position (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with Seus/Suas eyes focused straight ahead. Inhale during this phase.

Lift the bar from the floor by forcefully extending the hips and the knees as you exhale. Tip: The upper torso should maintain the same angle. Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the hips rise before the ombros (this would have the effect of pushing the glúteos in the air and stretching the hamstrings.
Keep elbows fully extended com o/a head in a neutral position and the ombros over the bar.
As the bar raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
As the bar passes the knees, thrust Seus/Suas hips forward and slightly bend the knees to avoid locking them. Tip: At this point Seus/Suas thighs should be against the bar.
Keep the costas flat or slightly arched, elbows fully extended and Seus/Suas head neutral. Tip: You will hold Seus/Suas breath until the next phase.
Inhale and then forcefully and quickly extend Seus/Suas hips and knees and stand on Seus/Suas toes.

Keep the bar as close to Seus/Suas body as possible. Tip: Seus/Suas costas should be flat com o/a elbows pointed out to the sides and Seus/Suas head in a neutral position. Also, keep Seus/Suas ombros over the bar and braços straight as long as possible.
When Seus/Suas lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the ombros upward rapidly without letting the elbows flex yet. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
As the ombros reach their highest elevation flex Seus/Suas elbows to begin pulling Seus/Suas body sob o/a bar.

Continue to pull the braços as high and as long as possible. Tip: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, Seus/Suas torso will be erect or with an arched costas, Seus/Suas head will be tilted costas slightly and Seus/Suas pés may lose contact com o/a floor.
After the lower body has fully extended and the bar reaches near maximal height, pull Seus/Suas body sob o/a bar and rotate the braços around and sob o/a bar.
Simultaneously, flex the hips and knees into a quarter agachamento position.

Once the braços are sob o/a bar, inhale and then lift Seus/Suas elbows to position the upper braços parallel to the floor. Rack the bar across the front of Seus/Suas collar bones and front shoulder muscles.
Catch the bar with an erect and tight torso, a neutral head position and flat pés. Exhale during this movement.
Stand up by extending the hips and knees to a fully erect position.
Lower the bar by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the braços to allow a controlled descent of the bar to the thighs. Inhale during this movement.
Simultaneously flex the hips and knees to cushion the impact of the bar no/na thighs.
agachamento down com o/a elbows fully extended until the bar touches the floor.
Start over at Phase 1 and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Power clean from blocks
instructions: With a barbell on boxes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, com o/a braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself sob o/a bar far enough that it can be racked onto the ombros, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position, and complete the repetition by returning the peso to the boxes.

name: Power jerk
instructions: Standing com o/a peso racked no/na front of the ombros, begin com o/a dip. With Seus/Suas pés directly under Seus/Suas hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move Seus/Suas head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros.

At this moment as the pés leave the floor, the pés must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should be moved to a slightly wider stance, com o/a knees partially bent.
Receive the bar com o/a braços locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position.

name: Power partials
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright and a dumbbell on each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the mãos should be facing Seus/Suas torso. Seus/Suas pés should be about shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight and the torso stationary, lift the peso out to Seus/Suas sides until they are about shoulder level height while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the peso costas down to the starting position while inhaling. Tip: Keep the palms facing down com o/a little finger slightly higher while lifting and lowering the peso as it will concentrate the stress on Seus/Suas ombros mainly.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Power snatch
instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell no/na floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken no/na bar. The pés should be directly below the hips, com o/a pés turned out as needed. Lower the hips, com o/a peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The costas angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, a slightly wider position, pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The bar should be received in a partial agachamento. Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, receiving the bar locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position com o/a peso over head.

name: Power snatch from blocks
instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken no/na bar. The pés should be directly below the hips, com o/a pés turned out as needed. Lower the hips, com o/a peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar, com o/a elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar above a full agachamento and com o/a braços fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, Seus/Suas head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing position. Carefully return the peso to the boxes.

name: Power stairs
instructions: In the power stairs, implements are moved up a staircase. For training purposes, these can be performed with a tire or box.

Begin by taking the implement with both mãos. Set Seus/Suas pés wide, with Seus/Suas head and peito up. Drive through the ground with Seus/Suas heels, extending Seus/Suas knees and hips to raise the peso from the ground.
As you lean costas, attempt to swing the peso onto the stairs, which are usually around 16-18" high. You can use Seus/Suas pernas to help push the peso onto the stair.
Repeat for 3-5 repetitions, and continue with a heavier peso, moving as fast as possible.

name: Preacher curl
instructions: To perform this movement you will need a preacher bench and an E-Z bar. Grab the E-Z curl bar at the close inner handle (either have someone hand you the bar which is preferable or grab the bar from the front bar rest provided by most preacher benches). The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward and they should be slightly tilted inwards due to the shape of the bar.
com o/a upper braços positioned against the preacher bench pad and the peito against it, hold the E-Z Curl Bar at shoulder length. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the bar until Seus/Suas upper arm is extended and the bíceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the bíceps to curl the peso up until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder height. Squeeze the bíceps hard and hold this position for a second.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Preacher hammer dumbbell curl
instructions: Place the upper part of both braços on top of the preacher bench as you hold a dumbbell in each hand com o/a palms facing each other (neutral grip).
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells until Seus/Suas upper arm is extended and the bíceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the bíceps to curl the peso up until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the bíceps hard for a second at the contracted position and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Press sit-up
instructions: To begin, lie down on a bench with a barbell resting on Seus/Suas peito. Position Seus/Suas pernas so they are secure no/na extension of the abdominal bench. This is the starting position.

While inhaling, tighten Seus/Suas abdominals and glúteos. Simultaneously curl Seus/Suas torso as you do when performing a sit-up and press the barbell to an overhead position while exhaling. Tip: Use Seus/Suas braços to push the barbell out as you perform this exercise while still focusing no/na abdominal muscles.
Lower Seus/Suas upper body costas down to the starting position while bringing the barbell costas down to Seus/Suas torso. Remember to breathe in while lowering the body.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Prone manual hamstring
instructions: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lay face down with Seus/Suas pernas straight. Seus/Suas assistant will place their hand on Seus/Suas heel.

To begin, flex the knee to curl Seus/Suas leg up. Seus/Suas partner should provide resistência, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movement is completed. Communicate with Seus/Suas partner to monitor appropriate resistência levels.
Pause at the top, returning the leg to the starting position as Seus/Suas partner provides resistência going the other direction.

name: Prowler sprint
instructions: Place Seus/Suas sled on an appropriate surface, loaded to a suitable peso. The sled should provide enough resistência to require effort, but not so heavy that you are significantly slowed down.
You may use the upright or the low handles for this exercise. Coloque suas mãos no/na handles with Seus/Suas braços extended, leaning into the implement.
With good posture, drive through the ground with alternating, short steps. Move as fast as you can for a short distance.

name: Pull through
instructions: Begin standing a few pés in front of a low pulley with a rope or handle attached. Face away from the machine, straddling the cable, with Seus/Suas pés set wide apart.

Begin the movement by reaching through Seus/Suas pernas as far as possible, bending at the hips. Keep Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
