Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, extend through the hip to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the ombros; all of the motion should originate through the hips.

name: Pullups
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than Seus/Suas shoulder width. For a medium grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to Seus/Suas shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than Seus/Suas shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Pull Seus/Suas torso up until the bar touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second no/na contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Push-up wide
instructions: With Seus/Suas mãos wide apart, support Seus/Suas body on Seus/Suas toes and mãos in a plank position. Seus/Suas elbows should be extended and Seus/Suas body straight. Do not allow Seus/Suas hips to sag. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To begin, allow the elbows to flex, lowering Seus/Suas peito to the floor as you inhale.
Using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles, press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position by extending the elbows. Exhale as you perform this step.
After pausing at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Push-ups - close tríceps position
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and Coloque suas mãos closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços' length.
Lower yourself until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using Seus/Suas tríceps and some of Seus/Suas pectoral muscles, press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position and squeeze Seus/Suas peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Push-ups with pés elevated
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and Coloque suas mãos about 36 inches apart from each other holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços length.
Place Seus/Suas toes on top of a flat bench. This will allow Seus/Suas body to be elevated. Note: The higher the elevation of the flat bench, the higher the resistência of the exercise is.
Lower yourself until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles, press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position and squeeze Seus/Suas peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Push-ups with pés on an exercise ball
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and Coloque suas mãos about 36 inches apart from each other holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços length.
Place Seus/Suas toes on top of an exercise ball. This will allow Seus/Suas body to be elevated.
Lower yourself until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles, press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position and squeeze Seus/Suas peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Push press - behind the neck
instructions: Standing com o/a peso racked no/na costas of the ombros, begin com o/a dip. With Seus/Suas pés directly under Seus/Suas hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, moving the bar in a vertical path.
Using the momentum generated, finish pressing the peso overhead be extending through the braços.
Retorne para a posição inicial, using Seus/Suas pernas to absorb the impact.

name: Push up to side plank
instructions: Get into flexão position no/na toes with Seus/Suas mãos just outside of shoulder width.
Perform a flexão by allowing the elbows to flex. As you descend, keep Seus/Suas body straight.
Do one flexão and as you come up, shift Seus/Suas peso no/na left side of the body, twist to the side while bringing the right arm up towards the ceiling in a side plank.
Lower the arm costas to the floor for another flexão and then twist to the other side.
Repeat the series, alternating each side, for 10 or more reps.

name: Pushups
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and Coloque suas mãos about 36 inches apart while holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços length.
Next, lower yourself downward until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Now breathe out and press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position while squeezing Seus/Suas peito.
After a brief pause at the top contracted position, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.

name: Pushups (close and wide hand positions)
instructions: Lie no/na floor face down and body straight with Seus/Suas toes no/na floor and the mãos wider than shoulder width for a wide hand position and closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure you are holding Seus/Suas torso up at braços length.
Lower yourself until Seus/Suas peito almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using Seus/Suas pectoral muscles, press Seus/Suas upper body costas up to the starting position and squeeze Seus/Suas peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Pyramid
instructions: Start off by rolling Seus/Suas torso forward onto the ball so Seus/Suas hips rest on top of the ball and become the highest point of Seus/Suas body.

Rest Seus/Suas mãos and pés no/na floor. Seus/Suas braços and pernas can be slightly bent or straight, depending no/na size of the ball, Seus/Suas flexibility, and the length of Seus/Suas limbs. This also helps develop stabilizing strength in Seus/Suas torso and ombros.

name: Quad stretch
instructions: Lay on Seus/Suas side. Loop a belt, rope, or band around Seus/Suas top foot. Flex the knee and extend Seus/Suas hip, attempting to touch Seus/Suas glúteos with Seus/Suas foot, and holding the belt with Seus/Suas mãos. Esta será sua posição inicial.
com o/a belt being held over the shoulder or overhead, gently pull to increase the stretch in the quadriceps. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

name: Quadriceps-smr
instructions: Lay facedown no/na floor with Seus/Suas peso supported by Seus/Suas mãos or forearms. Place a foam roll underneath one leg no/na quadriceps, and keep the foot off of the ground. Make sure to relax the leg as much as possible. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Shifting as much peso onto the leg to be stretched as is tolerable, roll over the foam from above the knee to below the hip, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Switch sides.

name: Quick leap
instructions: You will need a box for this exerise.
Begin facing the box standing 1-2 pés from its edge.
By utilizing Seus/Suas hips, hop onto the box, landing on both pernas. Ensure that you land with Seus/Suas pernas bent and Seus/Suas pés flat.
Immediately upon landing, fully extend through the entire body and swing Seus/Suas braços overhead to explode off of the box. Use Seus/Suas pernas to absorb the impact of landing.

name: Rack delivery
instructions: This drill teaches the delivery of the barbell to the rack position no/na ombros. Begin holding a bar in the scarecrow position, com o/a upper braços parallel to the floor, and the forearms hanging down. Use a hook grip, with Seus/Suas fingers wrapped over Seus/Suas thumbs.

Begin by rotating the elbows around the bar, delivering the bar to the ombros. As Seus/Suas elbows come forward, relax Seus/Suas grip. The ombros should be protracted, providing a shelf for the bar, which should lightly contact the throat.

It is important that the bar stay close to the body at all times, as with a heavier load any distance will result in an unwanted collision. As the movement becomes smoother, speed and load can be increased before progressing further.

name: Rack pull with bands
instructions: Set up in a power rack com o/a bar no/na pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the knees, just above, or in the mid thigh position. Attach bands to the base of the rack, or secure them with dumbbells. Attach the other end to the bar. You may need to choke the bands to provide tension.

Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting position. Seus/Suas pés should be under Seus/Suas hips, Seus/Suas grip shoulder width, costas arched, and hips costas to engage the hamstrings. Since the peso is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the peso.

With Seus/Suas head looking forward, extend through the hips and knees, pulling the peso up and costas until lockout. Be sure to pull Seus/Suas ombros costas as you complete the movement. Return the peso to the pins and repeat.

name: Rack pulls
instructions: Set up in a power rack com o/a bar no/na pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the knees, just above, or in the mid thigh position. Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting position. Seus/Suas pés should be under Seus/Suas hips, Seus/Suas grip shoulder width, costas arched, and hips costas to engage the hamstrings. Since the peso is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the peso.
With Seus/Suas head looking forward, extend through the hips and knees, pulling the peso up and costas until lockout. Be sure to pull Seus/Suas ombros costas as you complete the movement.
Return the peso to the pins and repeat.

name: Rear leg raises
instructions: Place yourself on Seus/Suas mãos knees on an exercise mat. Seus/Suas head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Extend one leg up and behind you. The knee and hip should both extend. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Recumbent bike
instructions: To begin, seat yourself no/na bike and adjust the seat to Seus/Suas height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistência can be changed throughout the workout. The handles can be used to monitor Seus/Suas heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Recumbent bikes offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and have less impact than other activities. A 150 lb person will burn about 230 calories cycling at a moderate rate for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories or more running.

name: Return push from stance
instructions: You will need a partner for this drill.
Begin in an athletic 2 or 3 point stance.
At the signal, move into a position to receive the pass from Seus/Suas partner.
Catch the medicine ball with both mãos and immediately throw it costas to Seus/Suas partner.
You can modify this drill by running different routes.

name: Reverse band supino
instructions: Position a bench inside a power rack, com o/a bar set to the correct height. Begin by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be position properly sob o/a bands. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Lie no/na bench, tuck Seus/Suas pés underneath you and arch Seus/Suas costas. Using the bar to help support Seus/Suas peso, lift Seus/Suas shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use Seus/Suas pés to drive Seus/Suas traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide Seus/Suas grip, it should cover the ring no/na bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting Seus/Suas ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to Seus/Suas lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches Seus/Suas torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

name: Reverse band box agachamento
instructions: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands either on band pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the bar during the agachamento. Attach the other end to the bar.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wider for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.

name: Reverse band levantamento terra
instructions: Set the bar up in a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either bands pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over Seus/Suas pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing Seus/Suas shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With Seus/Suas pés, and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and bend the knees until Seus/Suas shins contact the bar. Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

name: Reverse band power agachamento
instructions: Begin in a power rack com o/a pins and bar set at the appropriate height. After loading the bar, attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wide for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings.

Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward. With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips as much as possible. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line com o/a top of the knee.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

name: Reverse band sumo levantamento terra
instructions: Begin with a bar loaded no/na floor inside of a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens Seus/Suas braços.

Take a breath, and then lower Seus/Suas hips, looking forward with Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas peito up. Drive through the floor, spreading Seus/Suas pés apart, with Seus/Suas peso no/na costas half of Seus/Suas pés. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean costas and drive the hips into the bar, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the peso no/na way down.

name: Reverse barbell curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding a barbell at shoulder width com o/a elbows close to the torso. The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing down (pronated grip). Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse barbell preacher curls
instructions: Grab an EZ-bar using a shoulder width and palms down (pronated) grip.
Now place the upper part of both braços on top of the preacher bench and have Seus/Suas braços extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you exhale, use the bíceps to curl the peso up until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder height. Squeeze the bíceps hard for a second at the contracted position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the barbell until Seus/Suas upper braços are extended and the bíceps is fully stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse cable curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding a bar attachment that is attached to a low pulley using a pronated (palms down) and shoulder width grip. Make sure also that you keep the elbows close to the torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse crunch
instructions: Deite-se no chão with Seus/Suas pernas fully extended and braços to the side of Seus/Suas torso com o/a palms no/na floor. Seus/Suas braços should be stationary for the entire exercise.
Move Seus/Suas pernas up so that Seus/Suas thighs are perpendicular to the floor and pés are together and parallel to the floor. This is the starting position.

While inhaling, move Seus/Suas pernas towards the torso as you roll Seus/Suas pelvis backwards and you raise Seus/Suas hips off the floor. At the end of this movement Seus/Suas knees will be touching Seus/Suas peito.
Hold the contraction for a second and move Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting position while exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse flyes
instructions: To begin, lie down on an incline bench com o/a peito and stomach pressing against the incline. Have the dumbbells in each hand com o/a palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Extend the braços in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. The pernas should be stationary while applying pressure com o/a ball of Seus/Suas toes. This is the starting position.

Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the peso out and away from each other (to the side) in an arc motion while exhaling. Tip: Try to squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The braços should be elevated until they are parallel to the floor.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the peso costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse flyes with external rotation
instructions: To begin, lie down on an incline bench set at a 30-degree angle com o/a peito and stomach pressing against the incline.

Have the dumbbells in each hand com o/a palms facing down to the floor. Seus/Suas braços should be in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should have a slight bend. The pernas should be stationary while applying pressure com o/a ball of Seus/Suas toes (Seus/Suas heels should not be touching the floor). This is the starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the peso out and away from each other in an arc motion while exhaling.

As you lift the peso, Seus/Suas wrist should externally rotate by 90-degrees so that you go from a palms down (pronated) grip to a palms facing each other (neutral) grip. Tip: Try to squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The braços should be elevated until they are level com o/a head.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the peso costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse grip bent-over rows
instructions: Stand erect while holding a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up).

Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barbell should hang directly in front of you as Seus/Suas braços hang perpendicular to the floor and Seus/Suas torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the barbell as you breathe out, keeping the elbows close to the body and not doing any force com o/a forearm other than holding the peso. no/na top contracted position, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Baixe o peso lentamente again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse grip tríceps pushdown
instructions: Start by setting a bar attachment (straight or e-z) on a high pulley machine.

Facing the bar attachment, grab it com o/a palms facing up (supinated grip) at shoulder width. Lower the bar by using Seus/Suas lats until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended by Seus/Suas sides. Tip: Elbows should be in by Seus/Suas sides and Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.

Slowly elevate the bar attachment up as you inhale so it is aligned with Seus/Suas peito. Only the forearms should move and the elbows/upper braços should be stationary by Seus/Suas side at all times.
Then begin to lower the cable bar costas down to the original staring position while exhaling and contracting the tríceps hard.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse hyperextension
instructions: Place Seus/Suas pés between the pads after loading an appropriate peso. Lay no/na top pad, allowing Seus/Suas hips to hang off the costas, while grasping the handles to hold Seus/Suas position.
To begin the movement, flex the hips, pulling the pernas forward.
Reverse the motion by extending the hips, kicking the leg costas. It is very important not to over-extend the hip on this movement, stopping short of Seus/Suas full range of motion.
Return by again flexing the hip, pulling the carriage forward as far as you can.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Reverse machine flyes
instructions: Adjust the handles so that they are fully to the rear. Make an appropriate peso selection and adjust the seat height so the handles are at shoulder level. Grasp the handles with Seus/Suas mãos facing inwards. Esta será sua posição inicial.
In a semicircular motion, pull Seus/Suas mãos out to Seus/Suas side and costas, contracting Seus/Suas rear delts.
Keep Seus/Suas braços slightly bent throughout the movement, with all of the motion occurring at the shoulder joint.
Pause at the rear of the movement, and slowly return the peso to the starting position.

name: Reverse plate curls
instructions: Start by standing straight with a weighted plate held by both mãos and braços fully extended. Use a pronated grip (palms facing down) and make sure Seus/Suas fingers grab the rough side of the plate while Seus/Suas thumb grabs the smooth side. Note: For the best results, grab the weighted plate at an 11:00 and 1:00 o'clock position.
Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other and the weighted plate should be near the groin area. This is the starting position.

Slowly lift the plate up while keeping the elbows in and the upper braços stationary until Seus/Suas bíceps and forearms touch while exhaling. The plate should be evenly aligned with Seus/Suas torso at this point.
Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the peso costas down to the starting position while inhaling
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Reverse tríceps supino
instructions: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a close, supinated grip (around shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked extended in front of you and perpendicular to the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas middle peito. Tip: Make sure that as opposed to a regular supino, you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize tríceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas tríceps muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Rhomboids-smr
instructions: Lay down with Seus/Suas costas no/na floor. Place a foam roll underneath Seus/Suas upper costas, and cross Seus/Suas braços in front of you, protracting Seus/Suas ombros. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas hips off of the ground, placing Seus/Suas peso onto the foam roll. Shift Seus/Suas peso to one side at a time, rolling over Seus/Suas middle and upper costas. Pause at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

name: Rickshaw carry
instructions: Position the frame at the starting point, and load com o/a appropriate peso. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through Seus/Suas heels to lift the frame. Ensure Seus/Suas peito and head are up and Seus/Suas costas is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep Seus/Suas peito up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.

name: Rickshaw levantamento terra
instructions: Load the frame com o/a desired peso. Center yourself between the handles. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing Seus/Suas shoulder blades to protract.

With Seus/Suas pés and Seus/Suas grip set, take a big breath and then lower Seus/Suas hips and flex the knees. Look forward with Seus/Suas head, keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. As the peso comes up, pull Seus/Suas shoulder blades together as you drive Seus/Suas hips forward.
Lower the peso by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.

name: Ring dips
instructions: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with Seus/Suas braços locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering Seus/Suas body until Seus/Suas braços break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself costas up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Rocket jump
instructions: Begin in a relaxed stance with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart and hold Seus/Suas braços close to the body.
To initiate the move, agachamento down halfway and explode costas up as high as possible.
Fully extend Seus/Suas entire body, reaching overhead as far as possible. As you land, absorb Seus/Suas impact through the pernas.

name: Rocking standing calf raise
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place it no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance. Also maintain a straight costas and keep the knees with a slight bend; never locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas heels as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas ankles as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending (other than the slight initial bend we created during positioning) at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering Seus/Suas heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Now lift Seus/Suas toes by contracting the tibia muscles in the front of the calves as you breathe out.
Hold for a second and bring them costas down as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Rocky pull-ups/pulldowns
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Pull Seus/Suas torso up until the bar touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second no/na contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.

Now repeat the same movements as described above except this time Seus/Suas torso will remain straight as you go up and the bar will touch the costas of the neck instead of the upper peito. Tip: Use the head to lean forward slightly as it will help you properly execute this portion of the exercise.
Once you have lowered yourself costas down to the starting position, repeat the exercise for the prescribed amount of repetitions in Seus/Suas program.

name: Romanian levantamento terra
instructions: Put a barbell in front of you no/na ground and grab it using a pronated (palms facing down) grip that a little wider than shoulder width. Tip: Depending no/na peso used, you may need wrist wraps to perform the exercise and also a raised platform in order to allow for better range of motion.
Bend the knees slightly and keep the shins vertical, hips costas and costas straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas costas and braços completely straight at all times, use Seus/Suas hips to lift the bar as you exhale. Tip: The movement should not be fast but steady and under control.

Once you are standing completely straight up, lower the bar by pushing the hips costas, only slightly bending the knees, unlike when squatting. Tip: Take a deep breath at the start of the movement and keep Seus/Suas peito up. Hold Seus/Suas breath as you lower and exhale as you complete the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Romanian levantamento terra from deficit
instructions: Begin standing while holding a bar at arm's length in front of you. You can stand on a raised platform to increase the range of motion.

Begin by flexing the knees slightly, and then flex at the hip, moving Seus/Suas butt costas as far as possible, lowering the torso as far as flexibility allows. The costas should remain in absolute extension at all times, and the bar should remain in contact com o/a pernas. If done properly, there should be heavy tension felt in the hamstrings.
Reverse the motion to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Rope climb
instructions: Grab the rope with both mãos above Seus/Suas head. Pull down no/na rope as you take a small jump.
Wrap the rope around one leg, using Seus/Suas pés to pinch the rope. Reach up as high as possible with Seus/Suas braços, gripping the rope tightly.
Release the rope from Seus/Suas pés as you pull yourself up with Seus/Suas braços, bringing Seus/Suas knees towards Seus/Suas peito.
Resecure Seus/Suas pés no/na rope, and then stand up to take another high hold no/na rope. Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, loosen the grip of Seus/Suas pés no/na rope as you slide down using a hand over hand motion.

name: Rope crunch
instructions: Kneel 1-2 pés in front of a cable system with a rope attached.
After selecting an appropriate peso, grasp the rope with both mãos reaching overhead. Seus/Suas torso should be upright in the starting position.
To begin, flex at the spine, attempting to bring Seus/Suas rib cage to Seus/Suas pernas as you pull the cable down.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
These can be done with twists or to the side to hit the obliques.

name: Rope jumping
instructions: Hold an end of the rope in each hand. Position the rope behind you no/na ground. Raise Seus/Suas braços up and turn the rope over Seus/Suas head bringing it down in front of you. When it reaches the ground, jump over it. Find a good turning pace that can be maintained. Different speeds and techniques can be used to introduce variation.

Rope jumping is exciting, challenges Seus/Suas coordination, and requires a lot of energy. A 150 lb person will burn about 350 calories jumping rope for 30 minutes, compared to over 450 calories running.

name: Rope straight-arm pulldown
instructions: Attach a rope to a high pulley and make Seus/Suas peso selection. Stand a couple pés costas from the pulley with Seus/Suas pés staggered and take the rope with both mãos. Lean forward from the hip, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight, with Seus/Suas braços extended up in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, extend the shoulder to pull the rope down to Seus/Suas thighs.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, squeezing Seus/Suas lats.
Retorne para a posição inicial without allowing the peso to fully rest no/na stack.

name: Round the world shoulder stretch
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pernas together, holding a bodybar or broomstick.
Hold the pole behind Seus/Suas hips with a wider than shoulder width grip. Seus/Suas palms should be down and Seus/Suas thumbs facing out.
Slowly lift Seus/Suas braços up behind Seus/Suas head. Don't force it if it gets hard to lift further.

name: Rowing, stationary
instructions: To begin, seat yourself no/na rower. Make sure that Seus/Suas heels are resting comfortably against the base of the foot pedals and that the straps are secured. Select the program that you wish to use, if applicable. Sit up straight and bend forward at the hips.

There are three phases of movement when using a rower. The first phase is when you come forward no/na rower. Seus/Suas knees are bent and against Seus/Suas peito. Seus/Suas upper body is leaning slightly forward while still maintaining good posture. Next, push against the foot pedals and extend Seus/Suas pernas while bringing Seus/Suas mãos to Seus/Suas upper abdominal area, squeezing Seus/Suas ombros costas as you do so. To avoid straining Seus/Suas costas, use primarily Seus/Suas leg and hip muscles.
The recovery phase simply involves straightening Seus/Suas braços, bending the knees, and bringing Seus/Suas body forward again as you transition costas into the first phase.

name: Runner's stretch
instructions: It's easiest to get into this stretch if you start standing up, put one leg behind you, and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso down to the floor.
Keep the front heel no/na floor (if it lifts up, scoot Seus/Suas other leg further costas).

Coloque suas mãos on either side of Seus/Suas front leg. To get more out of this stretch, push Seus/Suas butt up toward the ceiling, and then gradually lower it costas toward the floor. You'll Stretch the hip flexor of the costas leg and the hamstring and buttocks of the front.

name: Running, treadmill
instructions: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. A 150 lb person will burn over 450 calories running 8 miles per hour for 30 minutes. Maintain proper posture as you run, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking Seus/Suas heart rate.

name: Russian twist
instructions: Deite-se no chão placing Seus/Suas pés either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Seus/Suas pernas should be bent at the knees.

Elevate Seus/Suas upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended in front of you perpendicular to Seus/Suas torso and com o/a mãos clasped. This is the starting position.
Twist Seus/Suas torso to the right side until Seus/Suas braços are parallel com o/a floor while breathing out.
Hold the contraction for a second and move costas to the starting position while breathing out. Now move to the opposite side performing the same techniques you applied to the right side.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Sandbag load
instructions: To load sandbags or other objects, begin com o/a implements placed a distance from the loading platform, typically 50 pés.

Begin by lifting the sandbag. Sandbags are extremely awkward, and the manner of lifting them can vary depending no/na particular sandbag used. Reach as far around it as possible, extending through the hips and knees to pull it up high. Shouldering is usually not allowed.
Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible. Place it onto the platform, ensuring it doesn't fall off.
Retorne para a posição inicial to retrieve the next sandbag, and repeat until the event is completed.

name: Scapular pull-up
instructions: Take a pronated grip on a pull-up bar.
From a hanging position, raise yourself a few inches without using Seus/Suas braços. Do this by depressing Seus/Suas shoulder girdle in a reverse shrugging motion.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial before performing more repetitions.

name: Scissor kick
instructions: To begin, lie down with Seus/Suas costas pressed against the floor or on an exercise mat (optional). Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended to the sides with Seus/Suas palms facing down. Note: The braços should be stationary the entire time.
With a slight bend at the knees, lift Seus/Suas pernas up so that Seus/Suas heels are about 6 inches off the ground. This is the starting position.
Now lift Seus/Suas left leg up to about a 45 degree angle while Seus/Suas right leg is lowered until the heel is about 2-3 inches from the ground.
Switch movements by raising Seus/Suas right leg up and lowering Seus/Suas left leg. Remember to breathe while performing this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Scissors jump
instructions: Assume a lunge stance position with one foot forward com o/a knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot. Extending through both pernas, jump as high as possible, swinging Seus/Suas braços to gain lift.
As you jump as high as you can, switch the position of Seus/Suas pernas, moving Seus/Suas front leg to the costas and the rear leg to the front.
As you land, absorb the impact through the pernas by adopting the lunge position, and repeat.

name: Seated band hamstring curl
instructions: Secure a band close to the ground and place a bench a couple pés away from it.
Seat yourself no/na bench and secure the band behind Seus/Suas ankles, beginning with Seus/Suas pernas straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Flex the knees, bringing Seus/Suas pés towards the bench. You may need to lean costas slightly to keep Seus/Suas pés from striking the floor.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Seated barbell military press
instructions: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar behind Seus/Suas head and either have a spotter give you the bar (better no/na rotator cuff this way) or pick it up yourself carefully with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Tip: Seus/Suas grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm as the barbell goes down.

Once you pick up the barbell com o/a correct grip length, lift the bar up over Seus/Suas head by locking Seus/Suas braços. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of Seus/Suas head. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Lower the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar costas up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated barbell twist
instructions: Start out by sitting at the end of a flat bench with a barbell placed on top of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.

Grip the bar with Seus/Suas palms facing down and make sure Seus/Suas mãos are wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Begin to lift the barbell up over Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended.
Now lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head until it is resting along the base of Seus/Suas neck. This is the starting position.

While keeping Seus/Suas pés and head stationary, move Seus/Suas waist from side to side so that Seus/Suas oblique muscles feel the contraction. Only move from side to side as far as Seus/Suas waist will allow you to go. Stretching or moving too far can cause an injury to occur. Tip: Use a slow and controlled motion.
Remember to breathe out while twisting Seus/Suas body to the side and in when moving costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated bent-over one-arm dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: Sit down at the end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in one arm using a neutral grip (palms of the hand facing you).

Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm com o/a dumbbell should be close to the torso and aligned with it (lifted up until it is parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the mãos hold the peso). Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the upper arm stationary, use the tríceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forearm is parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Seated bent-over rear delt raise
instructions: Place a couple of dumbbells looking forward in front of a flat bench.
Sit no/na end of the bench with Seus/Suas pernas together and the dumbbells behind Seus/Suas calves.
Bend at the waist while keeping the costas straight in order to pick up the dumbbells. The palms of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing each other as you pick them. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas torso forward and stationary, and the braços slightly bent at the elbows, lift the dumbbells straight to the side until both braços are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the peso. (Note: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the braços costas as opposed to the side.)
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated bent-over two-arm dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: Sit down at the end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in both braços using a neutral grip (palms of the hand facing you).

Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper braços com o/a dumbbells should be close to the torso and aligned with it (lifted up until they are parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the mãos hold the peso). Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the upper braços stationary, use the tríceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Seated bíceps
instructions: Sit no/na floor with Seus/Suas knees bent and Seus/Suas partner standing behind you. Extend Seus/Suas braços straight behind you with Seus/Suas palms facing each other. Seus/Suas partner will hold Seus/Suas wrists for you. This will be the starting position.
Attempt to flex Seus/Suas elbows, while Seus/Suas partner prevents any actual movement.

After 10-20 seconds, relax Seus/Suas braços while Seus/Suas partner gently pulls Seus/Suas wrists up to stretch Seus/Suas bíceps. Be sure to let Seus/Suas partner know when the stretch is appropriate to prevent injury or overstretching.

name: Seated cable rows
instructions: For this exercise you will need access to a low pulley row machine with a V-bar. Note: The V-bar will enable you to have a neutral grip where the palms of Seus/Suas mãos face each other. To get into the starting position, first sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pés no/na front platform or crossbar provided making sure that Seus/Suas knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of Seus/Suas costas and grab the V-bar handles.

With Seus/Suas braços extended pull costas until Seus/Suas torso is at a 90-degree angle from Seus/Suas pernas. Seus/Suas costas should be slightly arched and Seus/Suas peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on Seus/Suas lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles costas towards Seus/Suas torso while keeping the braços close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing Seus/Suas costas muscles hard. Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original position while breathing in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated cable desenvolvimento
instructions: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Seus/Suas upper braços should be about 90 degrees to the body, with Seus/Suas head and peito up. The elbows should also be bent to about 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together above Seus/Suas head.
After pausing at the top, return the handles to the starting position. Ensure that you maintain tension no/na cables.
You can also execute this movement with Seus/Suas costas off the pad and alternate mãos.

name: Seated calf raise
instructions: Sit no/na machine and place Seus/Suas toes no/na lower portion of the platform provided com o/a heels extending off. Choose the toe positioning of Seus/Suas choice (forward, in, or out) as per the beginning of this chapter.

Place Seus/Suas lower thighs sob o/a lever pad, which will need to be adjusted according to the height of Seus/Suas thighs. Now Coloque suas mãos on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping forward.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing Seus/Suas heels up and release the safety bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas heels by bending at the ankles until the calves are fully stretched. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Raise the heels by extending the ankles as high as possible as you contract the calves and breathe out. Hold the top contraction for a second.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated calf stretch
instructions: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Bend one knee and put that foot no/na floor to stabilize the torso.
Straighten Seus/Suas other leg and flex Seus/Suas ankle.
Using a band, towel, or Seus/Suas hand if you can reach, pull the toes toward you. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

name: Seated close-grip concentration barbell curl
instructions: Sit down on a flat bench with a barbell or E-Z Bar in front of you in between Seus/Suas pernas. Seus/Suas pernas should be spread com o/a knees bent and the pés no/na floor.

Use Seus/Suas braços to pick the barbell up and place the costas of Seus/Suas upper braços on top of Seus/Suas inner thighs (around three and a half inches away from the front of the knee). A supinated grip closer than shoulder width is needed to perform this exercise. Tip: Seus/Suas arm should be extended at braços length and the barbell should be above the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly begin to bring the barbell costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. Tip: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated dumbbell curl
instructions: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell on each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the peso and start twisting the wrists once the dumbbells pass Seus/Suas thighs so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos face forward at the end of the movement. Make sure that you contract the bíceps as you breathe out and make sure that only the forearms move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to the starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in and as you rotate the wrists costas to a neutral grip.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated dumbbell inner bíceps curl
instructions: Sit no/na end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing inward in a neutral position. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the dumbbells out and up, turning the palms out as you lift and keeping Seus/Suas forearms in line with Seus/Suas outer deltoids. Tips:

Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.

Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to the starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. Remember to rotate Seus/Suas braços as you lower the dumbbells so that you can switch costas to a neutral grip.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated dumbbell palms-down wrist curl
instructions: Start out by placing two dumbbells no/na floor in front of a flat bench.
Sit down no/na edge of the flat bench with Seus/Suas pernas at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab both of the dumbbells and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against Seus/Suas thighs com o/a palms of the mãos facing down. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge of Seus/Suas thighs.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.

Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Tip: Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, simply lower the dumbbells to the floor.

name: Seated dumbbell palms-up wrist curl
instructions: Start out by placing two dumbbells no/na floor in front of a flat bench.
Sit down no/na edge of the flat bench with Seus/Suas pernas at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.

Use Seus/Suas braços to grab both of the dumbbells and bring them up so that Seus/Suas forearms are resting against Seus/Suas thighs com o/a palms of the mãos facing up. Seus/Suas wrists should be hanging over the edge of Seus/Suas thighs.
Start out by curling Seus/Suas wrist upwards and exhaling.

Slowly lower Seus/Suas wrists costas down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Tip: Seus/Suas forearms should be stationary as Seus/Suas wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, simply lower the dumbbells to the floor.

name: Seated dumbbell press
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of Seus/Suas thighs.
Clean the dumbbells up one at a time by using Seus/Suas thighs to bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing forward. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
As you exhale, push the dumbbells up until they touch at the top.
After a second pause, slowly come down costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated flat bench leg pull-in
instructions: Sit on a bench com o/a pernas stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and Seus/Suas braços holding on to the sides of the bench. Seus/Suas torso should be leaning backwards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Bring the knees in toward you as you move Seus/Suas torso closer to them at the same time. Expire ao realizar este movimento.
After a second pause, go costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated floor hamstring stretch
instructions: Sit on a mat with Seus/Suas right leg extended in front of you and Seus/Suas left leg bent with Seus/Suas foot against Seus/Suas right inner thigh.
Lean forward from Seus/Suas hips and reach for Seus/Suas ankle until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas hamstring. Hold for 15 seconds, then repeat for Seus/Suas other side.

name: Seated front deltoid
instructions: Sit upright no/na floor with Seus/Suas pernas bent, Seus/Suas partner standing behind you. Stick Seus/Suas braços straight out to Seus/Suas sides, with Seus/Suas palms facing the ground. Attempt to move them as far behind you as possible, as Seus/Suas assistant holds Seus/Suas wrists. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas elbows straight, attempt to move Seus/Suas braços to the front, with Seus/Suas partner gently restraining you to prevent any actual movement for 10-20 seconds.
Now, relax Seus/Suas muscles and allow Seus/Suas partner to gently increase the stretch no/na ombros and peito. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

name: Seated glute
instructions: In a seated position with Seus/Suas knees bent, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Seus/Suas partner will stand behind you. Now, lean forward as Seus/Suas partner braces Seus/Suas ombros with their mãos. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to push Seus/Suas torso costas for 10-20 seconds, as Seus/Suas partner prevents any actual movement of Seus/Suas torso.
Now relax Seus/Suas muscles as Seus/Suas partner increases the stretch by gently pushing Seus/Suas torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

name: Seated good mornings
instructions: Set up a box in a power rack. The pins should be set at an appropriate height. Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros, not on top of Seus/Suas traps. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros.

Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward. With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the bar tight, bend forward at the hips as much as possible. If you set the pins to what would be parallel, you not only have a safety if you fail, but know when to stop.
Pause just above the pins and reverse the motion until Seus/Suas torso it upright.

name: Seated hamstring
instructions: In a seated position with Seus/Suas pernas extended, have Seus/Suas partner stand behind you. Now, lean forward as Seus/Suas partner braces Seus/Suas ombros with their mãos. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Attempt to push Seus/Suas torso costas for 10-20 seconds, as Seus/Suas partner prevents any actual movement of Seus/Suas torso.
Now relax Seus/Suas muscles as Seus/Suas partner increases the stretch by gently pushing Seus/Suas torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

name: Seated hamstring and calf stretch
instructions: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. Sit down with both pernas extended . Esta será sua posição inicial.
Leaning forward slightly, pull no/na belt to draw the toes of Seus/Suas foot costas. Hold this position for 10-20 seconds and then repeat com o/a other leg.

name: Seated head harness neck resistência
instructions: Place a neck strap no/na floor at the end of a flat bench. Once you have selected the peso, sit at the end of the flat bench with Seus/Suas pés wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Seus/Suas toes should be pointed out.

Slowly move Seus/Suas torso forward until it is almost parallel com o/a floor. Using both mãos, securely position the neck strap around Seus/Suas head. Tip: Make sure the peso are still lying no/na floor to prevent any strain no/na neck. Now grab the peso with both mãos while elevating Seus/Suas torso costas until it is almost perpendicular to the floor. Note: Seus/Suas head and torso needs to be slightly tilted forward to perform this exercise.
Now place both mãos on top of Seus/Suas knees. This is the starting position.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas neck down until Seus/Suas chin touches the upper part of Seus/Suas peito while breathing in.
While exhaling, bring Seus/Suas neck costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated leg curl
instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit Seus/Suas height and sit no/na machine with Seus/Suas costas against the costas support pad.

Place the costas of lower leg on top of padded lever (just a few inches sob o/a calves) and secure the lap pad against Seus/Suas thighs, just above the knees. Then grasp the side handles no/na machine as you point Seus/Suas toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances) and ensure that the pernas are fully straight right in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you exhale, pull the machine lever as far as possible to the costas of Seus/Suas thighs by flexing at the knees. Keep Seus/Suas torso stationary at all times. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial as you breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated leg tucks
instructions: Sit on a bench com o/a pernas stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and Seus/Suas braços holding on to the sides of the bench. Seus/Suas torso should be leaning backwards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Bring the knees in toward you as you move Seus/Suas torso closer to them at the same time. Expire ao realizar este movimento.
After a second pause, go costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated one-arm dumbbell palms-down wrist curl
instructions: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in Seus/Suas right hand.
Place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place Seus/Suas right forearm on top of Seus/Suas upper right thigh with Seus/Suas palm down. Tip: Make sure that the costas of the wrist lies on top of Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the dumbbell as far as possible as you keep a tight grip no/na dumbbell. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Now curl the dumbbell as high as possible as you contract the forearms and as you exhale. Keep the contraction for a second before you lower again. Tip: The only movement should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: Seated one-arm dumbbell palms-up wrist curl
instructions: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in Seus/Suas right hand.
Place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place Seus/Suas right forearm on top of Seus/Suas upper right thigh with Seus/Suas palm up. Tip: Make sure that the front of the wrist lies on top of Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the dumbbell as far as possible as you keep a tight grip no/na dumbbell. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Now curl the dumbbell as high as possible as you contract the forearms and as you exhale. Keep the contraction for a second before you lower again. Tip: The only movement should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch braços and repeat the movement.

name: Seated one-arm cable pulley rows
instructions: To get into the starting position, first sit down no/na machine and place Seus/Suas pés no/na front platform or crossbar provided making sure that Seus/Suas knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of Seus/Suas costas and grab the single handle attachment with Seus/Suas left arm using a palms-down grip.

With Seus/Suas arm extended pull costas until Seus/Suas torso is at a 90-degree angle from Seus/Suas pernas. Seus/Suas costas should be slightly arched and Seus/Suas peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on Seus/Suas lat as you hold the bar in front of you. The right arm can be kept by the waist. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles costas towards Seus/Suas torso while keeping the braços close to it as you rotate the wrist, so that by the time Seus/Suas hand is by Seus/Suas abdominals it is in a neutral position (palms facing the torso). Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing Seus/Suas costas muscles hard.

Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original position while breathing in. Tip: Remember to rotate the wrist as you go costas to the starting position so that the palms are facing down again.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições and then perform the same movement com o/a right hand.

name: Seated overhead stretch
instructions: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Touch the soles of Seus/Suas pés together with Seus/Suas pés six to eight inches in front of Seus/Suas hips.
Place one hand no/na floor beside you and Seus/Suas other hand behind Seus/Suas head.
Lift Seus/Suas elbow to the ceiling as you incline Seus/Suas torso to the other side. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

name: Seated palm-up barbell wrist curl
instructions: Hold a barbell with both mãos and Seus/Suas palms facing up; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place Seus/Suas forearms on top of Seus/Suas upper thighs with Seus/Suas palms up. Tip: Make sure that the front of the wrists lay on top of Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forearms and exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top for a second and Tip: Only the wrist should move.

name: Seated palms-down barbell wrist curl
instructions: Hold a barbell with both mãos and Seus/Suas palms facing down; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place Seus/Suas forearms on top of Seus/Suas upper thighs with Seus/Suas palms down. Tip: Make sure that the costas of the wrists lay on top of Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forearms and exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top for a second and Tip: Only the wrist should move.

name: Seated side lateral raise
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and sit at the end of a flat bench with Seus/Suas pés firmly no/na floor. Hold the dumbbells with Seus/Suas palms facing in and Seus/Suas braços straight down at Seus/Suas sides at braços' length. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to Seus/Suas side with a slight bend no/na elbow and the mãos slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you braços are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbells costas down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated tríceps press
instructions: Sit down on a bench with costas support and grasp a dumbbell with both mãos and hold it overhead at arm's length. Tip: a better way is to have somebody hand it to you especially if it is very heavy. The resistência should be resting in the palms of Seus/Suas mãos with Seus/Suas thumbs around it. The palm of the hand should be facing inward. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semi-circular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Tip: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Seated two-arm palms-up low-pulley wrist curl
instructions: Put a bench in front of a low pulley machine that has a barbell or EZ Curl attachment on it.
Move the bench far enough away so that when you bring the handle to the top of Seus/Suas thighs tension is created no/na cable due to the peso stack being moved up.
Now hold the handle with both mãos, palms up, using a shoulder-width grip.
Step costas and sit no/na bench with Seus/Suas pés about shoulder width apart, firmly no/na floor.
Lean forward and place the forearms on Seus/Suas thighs com o/a costas of Seus/Suas wrists over Seus/Suas knees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the bar as far as possible, while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl the bar up as high as possible while contracting the forearms. Tip: Only the wrist should move; not the forearms.
After a second contraction at the top go costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: See-saw press (alternating side press)
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with each hand and stand up erect.

Clean (lift) the dumbbells to the peito/shoulder level and then rotate Seus/Suas wrists so that Seus/Suas palms are facing towards you as if you were getting ready to perform an Arnold Press. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now start extending Seus/Suas left arm overhead as you rotate the wrist so that the palm of Seus/Suas hand faces forward as you go up. Seus/Suas elbows should come out also as you lift the peso. Simultaneously, you will also be bending from Seus/Suas hip to Seus/Suas opposite side. Tip: If you perform the exercise correctly, is should look as if you are trying to reach for something overhead no/na right hand side of Seus/Suas body, but with Seus/Suas left arm. Expire ao realizar este movimento.
Once you reach the top position breathe in. Then, com o/a peso fully extended overhead and you bent over to Seus/Suas right hand side, begin the movement to the left side.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Shotgun row
instructions: Attach a single handle to a low cable.
After selecting the correct peso, stand a couple pés costas with a wide-split stance. Seus/Suas arm should be extended and Seus/Suas shoulder forward. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. As you pull, supinate the wrist, turning the palm upward as you go.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Shoulder circles
instructions: With ombros relaxed and braços resting loosely at Seus/Suas sides (or in Seus/Suas lap if you're seated), gently roll Seus/Suas ombros forward, up, costas, and down.
Reverse direction. You can do this exercise alternating ombros or both at the same time.

name: Desenvolvimento - with bands
instructions: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles and lift them so that the mãos are at shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of Seus/Suas mãos are facing forward. Seus/Suas elbows should be bent, com o/a upper braços and forearms in line to the torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
As you exhale, lift the handles up until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended overhead.

name: Shoulder raise
instructions: Relax Seus/Suas braços to Seus/Suas sides and raise Seus/Suas ombros up toward Seus/Suas ears, then costas down.

name: Shoulder stretch
instructions: Reach Seus/Suas left arm across Seus/Suas body and hold it straight.

name: Side-lying floor stretch
instructions: First lie on Seus/Suas left side, bending Seus/Suas left knee in front of you to stabilize Seus/Suas torso (use Seus/Suas abdominal muscles as well to hold you upright).

Straighten Seus/Suas right leg and rest the right foot no/na floor behind Seus/Suas left. Straighten Seus/Suas right arm over Seus/Suas head and gently pull on Seus/Suas right wrist to stretch the entire right side of the body. Switch sides.

name: Side hop-sprint
instructions: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle.
Begin this drill by hopping sideways over the obstacle, rebounding out of Seus/Suas landing to hop costas to where you started.
Hop for a prescribed number or repetitions as quickly as possible, and finish this drill by sprinting a short distance upon landing the last hop.

name: Side lateral raise
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells by Seus/Suas side at braços length com o/a palms of the hand facing you. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While maintaining the torso in a stationary position (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to Seus/Suas side with a slight bend no/na elbow and the mãos slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you braços are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbells costas down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Side laterals to front raise
instructions: In a standing position, hold a pair of dumbbells at Seus/Suas side. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent, raise the peso directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
At the top of the exercise move the peso out in front of you, keeping Seus/Suas braços extended.
Lower the peso with a controlled motion.
no/na next repetition, raise the peso in front of you to shoulder height before moving the peso laterally to Seus/Suas sides.
Lower the peso to the starting position.

name: Side leg raises
instructions: Stand next to a chair, which you may hold onto as a support. Stand on one leg. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas leg straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible, and swing it costas down, allowing it to cross the opposite leg.
Repeat this swinging motion 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion as you do so.

name: Side lying groin stretch
instructions: Start off by lying on Seus/Suas right side and bend Seus/Suas right knee in front of you to stabilize the torso.
Rest Seus/Suas head on Seus/Suas right hand or shoulder. Lift Seus/Suas left leg upward and hold it by the costas of the knee (easier) or the foot (harder).
Pull Seus/Suas left knee in toward Seus/Suas left shoulder and simultaneously press Seus/Suas foot or knee down to the floor. To intensify this stretch, straighten Seus/Suas left leg. Switch sides.

name: Side neck stretch
instructions: Start with Seus/Suas ombros relaxed, gently tilt Seus/Suas head towards Seus/Suas shoulder.
Assist stretch with a gentle pull no/na side of the head.

name: Side standing long jump
instructions: Begin standing with Seus/Suas pés hip width apart in an athletic stance. Seus/Suas head and peito should be up, knees and hips slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Leaning to Seus/Suas right, extend through Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles to jump into the air. Block com o/a braços to lead the movement, jumping as far to Seus/Suas right as you can.
Land facing the same direction with Seus/Suas pés hip width apart, absorbing the impact through Seus/Suas lower body.

name: Side to side chins
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at a wide grip, bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Pull Seus/Suas torso up while leaning to the left hand side until the bar almost touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space (no swinging) and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go costas to the starting position.

Now, pull Seus/Suas torso up while leaning to the right hand side until the bar almost touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go costas to the starting position.
Repeat steps 3-6 until you have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions for each side.

name: Side wrist pull
instructions: This stretch works best standing. Cross Seus/Suas left arm over the midline of Seus/Suas body and hold the left wrist in Seus/Suas right hand down at the level of Seus/Suas hips. Start the stretch with a bent left arm.

Slowly straighten, pull, and lift it up to shoulder height, as pictured. Feel this stretch originate in Seus/Suas costas, not Seus/Suas ombros, and don't pull too hard no/na ombros joint. Switch sides.

name: Side to side box shuffle
instructions: Stand to one side of the box with Seus/Suas left foot resting no/na middle of it.
