To begin, jump up and over to the other side of the box, landing with Seus/Suas right foot on top of the box and Seus/Suas left foot no/na floor. Swing Seus/Suas braços to aid Seus/Suas movement.
Continue shuffling costas and forth across the box.

name: Single-arm cable crossover
instructions: Begin by moving the pulleys to the high position, select the resistência to be used, and take a handle in each hand.

Step forward in front of both pulleys with Seus/Suas braços extended in front of you, bringing Seus/Suas mãos together. Seus/Suas head and peito should be up as you lean forward, while Seus/Suas pés should be staggered. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas left arm in place, allow Seus/Suas right arm to extend out to the side, maintaining a slight bend at the elbow. The right arm should be perpendicular to the body at approximately shoulder level.
Return Seus/Suas arm costas to the starting position by pulling Seus/Suas hand costas to the midline of the body.
Hold for a second at the starting position and repeat the movement no/na opposite side. Continue alternating costas and forth for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Single-arm linear jammer
instructions: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking it to Seus/Suas ombros with one or both mãos. Adopt a wide stance. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by extending the elbow, pressing the peso up. Move explosively, extending the hips and knees fully to produce maximal force.
Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Single-arm push-up
instructions: Begin laying prone no/na ground. Move yourself into a position supporting Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas toes and one arm. Seus/Suas working arm should be placed directly sob o/a shoulder, fully extended. Seus/Suas pernas should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing Seus/Suas pés further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place Seus/Suas free hand behind Seus/Suas costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Single-cone sprint drill
instructions: This drill teaches quick foot action. You need a single cone. Begin standing next to the cone with one arm costas and one arm forward.
Chop the pés as quickly as possible, blocking com o/a braços. Circle the cone, keep Seus/Suas knees up, with violent foot action.
Rest after three trips around the cone.

name: Single-leg high box agachamento
instructions: Position a box in a rack. Secure a band or rope in place above the box.
Standing in front of it, step onto the box to a full standing position, letting Seus/Suas other leg remain unsupported. Hold onto the band for balance
. Continue stepping up and down no/na same leg before switching to the opposite side.

name: Single-leg hop progression
instructions: Arrange a line of cones in front of you. Assume a relaxed standing position, balanced on one leg. Raise the knee of Seus/Suas opposite leg. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Hop forward, jumping and landing com o/a same leg over the cone.
Use a countermovement jump to hop from cone to cone.
At the end, turn around and go costas no/na other leg.

name: Single-leg lateral hop
instructions: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle. To get into the start position, stand on one leg with Seus/Suas knee slightly bent.
To begin, execute a counterjump to hop sideways over the cone.
Land on Seus/Suas jumping leg, and immediately rebound out of it by jumping costas to the start position.
Continue hopping costas and forth.

name: Single-leg leg extension
instructions: Seat yourself in the machine and adjust it so that you are positioned properly. The pad should be against the lower part of the shin but not in contact com o/a ankle. Adjust the seat so that the pivot point is in line with Seus/Suas knee. Select a peso appropriate for Seus/Suas abilities.
Maintaining good posture, fully extend one leg, pausing at the top of the motion.
Retorne para a posição inicial without letting the peso stop, keeping tension no/na muscle.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Single-leg stride jump
instructions: Stand to the side of a box with Seus/Suas inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the braços upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the same position that you started, using Seus/Suas inside leg to decelerate the impact.

name: Single dumbbell raise
instructions: With a wide stance, hold a dumbell with both mãos, grasping the head of the dumbbell instead of the handle. Seus/Suas braços should be extended and hanging at the waist. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise the peso until it is above shoulder level, keeping Seus/Suas braços extended. Seus/Suas torso and hips should remain stationary throughout the movement.
Retorne para a posição inicial and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Single leg butt kick
instructions: Begin by standing on one leg, com o/a bent knee raised. This will be Seus/Suas start position.
Using a countermovement jump, take off upward by extending the hip, knee, and ankle of the grounded leg.
Immediately flex the knee and attempt to touch Seus/Suas butt com o/a heel of Seus/Suas jumping leg.
Return the leg to a partially bent position underneath the hips and land. Seus/Suas opposite leg should stay in relatively the same position throughout the drill.

name: Single leg glute bridge
instructions: Lay no/na floor with Seus/Suas pés flat and knees bent.
Raise one leg off of the ground, pulling the knee to Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Execute the movement by driving through the heel, extending Seus/Suas hip upward and raising Seus/Suas glúteos off of the ground.
Extend as far as possible, pause and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Single leg push-off
instructions: Stand no/na ground with one foot resting no/na box, heel close to the edge.
Push off with Seus/Suas foot on top of the box, trying to gain as much height as possible by extending through the hip and knee.
Land com o/a same foot on top of the box, returning Seus/Suas other foot costas to the start position.

name: Sit-up
instructions: Deite-se no chão placing Seus/Suas pés either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Seus/Suas pernas should be bent at the knees.
Coloque suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head and lock them together by clasping Seus/Suas fingers. This is the starting position.
Elevate Seus/Suas upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with Seus/Suas thighs. Breathe out when performing this part of the exercise.
Once you feel the contraction for a second, lower Seus/Suas upper body costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Sit squats
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing Seus/Suas knees and hips, sitting costas with Seus/Suas hips.
Continue until you have squatted a portion of the way down, but are above parallel, and quickly reverse the motion until you Retorne para a posição inicial. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions.

name: Skating
instructions: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating — speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.

name: Sled drag - harness
instructions: To begin, load the sled com o/a desired peso and attach the pulling strap. You can pull with handles, use a harness, or attach the pulling strap to a peso belt.
Whether pulling forwards or backwards, lean in the direction of travel and progress by extending through the hips and knees.

name: Sled overhead backward walk
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light peso.
Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Hold Seus/Suas mãos directly above Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas elbows extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Walk backwards, keeping Seus/Suas braços raised above Seus/Suas head. Avoid jerky movements.

name: Sled overhead tríceps extension
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled using a chain or rope. Load the sled to an appropriate load.

Facing away from the sled, step away until there is tension in the line. Raise Seus/Suas mãos above Seus/Suas head, keeping them together, palms facing each other. Seus/Suas elbows should be pointed upward com o/a elbows flexed. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Extend through the elbow to straighten the arm. Ensure that Seus/Suas upper arm stays in position to isolate the tríceps.
Upon full extension, step forward to take the slack out of the line. You may keep Seus/Suas pés staggered for more stability.

name: Sled push
instructions: Load Seus/Suas pushing sled com o/a desired peso.

Take an athletic posture, leaning into the sled with Seus/Suas braços fully extended, grasping the handles. Push the sled as fast as possible, focusing on extending Seus/Suas hips and knees to strengthen Seus/Suas posterior chain.

name: Sled reverse flye
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light peso.

Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Take both handles at braços length at about waist level. Bend the knees slightly and keep Seus/Suas peito and head up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Without flexing the elbow, pull the handles upward and apart, performing a reverse fly with some external rotation. Seus/Suas palms should be facing forward as you do this.
Retorne para a posição inicial, taking a couple steps costas to take the slack out of the line.

name: Sled row
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to an appropriate peso. Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line.
With a handle in each hand, bend the knees slightly, keep Seus/Suas head and peito up, and begin with Seus/Suas braços extended.
To initiate the movement, flex the elbow as you retract Seus/Suas shoulder blades, pulling the sled towards you.
Take a step or two costas to get tension in the line and repeat.

name: Sledgehammer swings
instructions: You will need a tire and a sledgehammer for this exercise. Stand in front of the tire about two pés away from it with a staggered stance. Grip the sledgehammer.
If you are right handed, Seus/Suas left hand should be at the bottom of the handle, and Seus/Suas right hand should be choking up closer to the head.

As you bring the sledge up, Seus/Suas right hand slides toward the head; as you swing down, Seus/Suas right hand will slide down to join Seus/Suas left hand. Slam it down as hard as you can against the tire. Control the bounce of the hammer off of the tire.
Repeat no/na other side.

name: Smith incline shoulder raise
instructions: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and Seus/Suas braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down no/na incline bench and make sure Seus/Suas ombros are aligned right sob o/a barbell.
Using a shoulder width pronated (palms forward) grip, lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with a slight bend at the elbows. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe out, lift the bar up until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended. Note: The contraction should be felt around the ombros.
After a second pause, bring the bar costas down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Smith machine behind the costas shrug
instructions: com o/a bar at thigh level, load an appropriate peso.

Stand com o/a bar behind you, taking a shoulder-width, pronated grip no/na bar and unhook the peso. You should be standing up straight with Seus/Suas head and peito up and Seus/Suas braços extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by shrugging Seus/Suas ombros straight up. Do not flex the braços or wrist during the movement.
After a brief pause return the peso to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions before engaging the hooks to rack the peso.

name: Smith machine supino
instructions: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Now place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and Seus/Suas braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down no/na flat bench. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas middle peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar costas in the rack.

name: Smith machine bent over row
instructions: Set the barbell attached to the smith machine to a height that is about 2 inches below Seus/Suas knees.

Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up.

Now grasp the barbell using an overhand (pronated) grip and unlock it from the smith machine rack. Then let it hang directly in front of you as Seus/Suas braços hang extended perpendicular to the floor and Seus/Suas torso. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the barbell as you breathe out, keeping the elbows close to the body and not doing any force com o/a forearm other than holding the peso. no/na top contracted position, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Baixe o peso lentamente again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine calf raise
instructions: Place a block or peso plate below the bar no/na Smith machine. Set the bar to a position that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step onto the plates com o/a balls of Seus/Suas pés and place the bar no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros.
Take the bar with both mãos facing forward. Rotate the bar to unrack it. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of Seus/Suas pés, flexing Seus/Suas calf at the top of the contraction. Seus/Suas knees should remain extended. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go costas down.
Return slowly to the starting position as you breathe in while lowering Seus/Suas heels.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine close-grip supino
instructions: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and Seus/Suas braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down no/na flat bench. Using a close and pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is around shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas middle peito. Tip: Make sure that as opposed to a regular supino, you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize tríceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas tríceps muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar costas in the rack.

name: Smith machine decline press
instructions: Position a decline bench in the rack so that the bar will be above Seus/Suas peito. Load an appropriate peso and take Seus/Suas place no/na bench.
Rotate the bar to unhook it from the rack and fully extend Seus/Suas braços. Seus/Suas costas should be slightly arched and Seus/Suas shoulder blades retracted. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing Seus/Suas braços, lowering the bar to Seus/Suas peito.
Pause briefly, and then extend Seus/Suas braços to push the peso costas to the starting position.
After completing the desired number of repetitions, rotate the bar to rack the peso.

name: Smith machine hang power clean
instructions: Position the bar at knee height and load it to an appropriate peso.

Take a pronated grip no/na bar outside of shoulder width and unhook the bar from the machine. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended with Seus/Suas head and peito up. Seus/Suas elbows should be pointed out with Seus/Suas ombros costas and down. Seus/Suas hips should be costas, loading the tension into the hamstrings. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initate the movement by forcefully extending the hips and knees, accelerating into the bar. Ensure that you keep Seus/Suas braços straight during this part of the motion.
Upon full extension, rebend the hips and knees to lower Seus/Suas receiving position.
Allow the braços to flex at this point, rotating the elbows around the bar to receive it on Seus/Suas ombros.
Extend through the hips and knees to come to a standing position com o/a bar racked on Seus/Suas ombros to complete the movement.

name: Smith machine hip raise
instructions: Position a bench in the rack and load the bar to an appropriate peso. Lie down no/na bench, placing the bottom of Seus/Suas pés against the bar. Unlock the bar and extend Seus/Suas pernas. You may need to use Seus/Suas mãos to assist you. For added stability grasp the sides of the Smith Machine. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by rotating Seus/Suas pelvis, flexing Seus/Suas spine to raise Seus/Suas hips off of the bench. Maintain a slight bend in the knees throughout the motion.
After a brief pause, return the hips to the bench.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Smith machine incline supino
instructions: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and Seus/Suas braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down no/na incline bench and make sure Seus/Suas upper peito is aligned com o/a barbell. Using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas upper peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.

name: Smith machine leg press
instructions: Position a Smith machine bar a couple pés off of the ground. Ensure that it is resting no/na safeties. After loading the bar to an appropriate peso, lie underneath the bar. Place the middle of Seus/Suas pés no/na bar, tucking Seus/Suas knees to Seus/Suas peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by driving through Seus/Suas pés to move the bar upward, extending the hips and knees. Do not lock out Seus/Suas knees.
At the top of the motion, pause briefly before returning to the starting position.

name: Smith machine one-arm upright row
instructions: com o/a bar at thigh level, load an appropriate peso.

Take a wide grip no/na bar and unhook the peso, removing Seus/Suas off hand from the bar. Seus/Suas arm should be extended as you stand up straight with Seus/Suas head and peito up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing the elbow, raising the upper arm com o/a elbow pointed out. Continue until Seus/Suas upper arm is parallel to the floor.
After a brief pause, return the peso to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions before engaging the hooks to rack the peso.

name: Smith machine overhead desenvolvimento
instructions: To begin, place a flat bench (or preferably one with costas support) underneath a smith machine. Position the barbell at a height so that when seated no/na flat bench, the braços must be almost fully extended to reach the barbell.

Once you have the correct height, sit slightly in behind the barbell so that there is an imaginary straight line from the tip of Seus/Suas nose to the barbell. Seus/Suas pés should be stationary. Grab the barbell com o/a palms facing forward, unlock it and lift it up so that Seus/Suas braços are fully extended. This is the starting position.
Slowly begin to lower the barbell until it is level with Seus/Suas chin while inhaling.
Then lift the barbell costas to the starting position using Seus/Suas ombros while exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine pistol agachamento
instructions: To begin, first set the bar to a position that best matches Seus/Suas height. Step under it and position the bar across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros.
Take the bar with Seus/Suas mãos facing forward, unlock it and lift it off the rack by extending Seus/Suas pernas. 3

Move one foot forward about 12 inches in front of the bar. Extend the other leg out in front of you, holding it off the ground. Look forward at all times and maintain a neutral or slightly arched spine. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Maintaining good posture, lower yourself by flexing the knee and hip, going down as far as flexibility allows.
Pause briefly at the bottom and then Retorne para a posição inicial by driving through the heel of Seus/Suas foot, extending the knee and hip.

name: Smith machine reverse calf raises
instructions: Adjust the barbell no/na smith machine to fit Seus/Suas height and align a raised platform right sob o/a bar.
Stand no/na platform com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés secured on top of it com o/a balls of Seus/Suas pés extending off it. Position Seus/Suas toes facing forward with a shoulder width stance.

Now, place Seus/Suas ombros sob o/a barbell while maintaining the foot positioning described and push the barbell up by extending Seus/Suas hips and knees until Seus/Suas torso is standing erect. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: The barbell on Seus/Suas costas is only for balance purposes.

Raise the balls of Seus/Suas pés as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas toes as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go costas down.
Slowly go costas down to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering the balls of Seus/Suas pés and toes.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine agachamento
instructions: To begin, first set the bar no/na height that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine stiff-legged levantamento terra
instructions: To begin, set the bar no/na smith machine to a height that is around the middle of Seus/Suas thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.

Lift the bar up by fully extending Seus/Suas braços while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight. Stand with Seus/Suas torso straight and Seus/Suas pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the barbell to over the top of Seus/Suas pés by bending at the waist while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch no/na hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movement

Start bringing Seus/Suas torso up straight again as soon as you feel the hamstrings stretch by extending Seus/Suas hips and waist until you are costas at the starting position. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith machine upright row
instructions: To begin, set the bar no/na smith machine to a height that is around the middle of Seus/Suas thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.
Lift the barbell up and fully extend Seus/Suas braços with Seus/Suas costas straight. There should be a slight bend at the elbows. This is the starting position.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, Seus/Suas elbows should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearms. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Smith single-leg split agachamento
instructions: To begin, place a flat bench 2-3 pés behind the smith machine. Then, set the bar no/na height that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.
Position Seus/Suas pernas by placing one foot slightly forward sob o/a bar and extending Seus/Suas other leg costas and place the top of Seus/Suas foot no/na bench. Esta será sua posição inicial

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knee as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calf becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knee should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knee is past that imaginary line (if it is past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten Seus/Suas leg again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movement.

name: Snatch
instructions: Place Seus/Suas pés at a shoulder width stance com o/a barbell resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the knees and keeping the costas flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the hips down and make sure that Seus/Suas body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Start pushing the floor as if it were a moving platform with Seus/Suas pés and simultaneously start lifting the barbell keeping it close to Seus/Suas pernas.
As the bar reaches the middle of Seus/Suas thighs, push the floor with Seus/Suas pernas and lift Seus/Suas body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Lift Seus/Suas ombros costas in a shrugging movement as you bring the bar up while lifting Seus/Suas elbows out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get Seus/Suas body sob o/a barbell when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking Seus/Suas braços and holding the barbell overhead as you assume a agachamento position.
Finalize the movement by rising up out of the agachamento position to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both pés should be on line and the braços fully extended holding the barbell overhead.

name: Snatch balance
instructions: Begin com o/a pés in the pulling position, the bar racked across the costas of the ombros, and the mãos placed in a wide snatch grip.
Pop the bar with an abrupt dip and drive of the knees, and aggressively drive sob o/a bar, transitioning the pés into the receiving position.
Receive the bar locked out overhead near the bottom of the agachamento. The torso should remain vertical, lowering the hips between the pernas.
Continue to descend to full depth, and return to a standing position. Carefully lower the peso.

name: Snatch levantamento terra
instructions: The snatch levantamento terra strengthens the first pull of the snatch. Begin with a wide snatch grip com o/a barbell placed no/na platform. The pés should be directly sob o/a hips, com o/a pés turned out. agachamento down to the bar, keeping the costas in absolute extension com o/a head facing forward.
Initiate the movement by driving through the heels, raising the hips. The costas angle should remain the same until the bar passes the knees.
At that point, drive Seus/Suas hips through the bar as you lay costas. Return the bar to the platform by reversing the motion.

name: Snatch pull
instructions: With a barbell no/na floor close to the shins, take a wide snatch grip. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the pull. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward.

There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.

name: Snatch shrug
instructions: Begin with a wide grip, com o/a bar hanging at the mid thigh position. You can use a hook or overhand grip. Seus/Suas costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug Seus/Suas ombros towards Seus/Suas ears. While this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier peso than a snatch, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.

name: Snatch from blocks
instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken no/na bar. The pés should be directly below the hips, com o/a pés turned out as needed. Lower the hips, com o/a peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar, com o/a elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with Seus/Suas body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, Seus/Suas head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing position. Carefully return the peso to the boxes.

name: Speed band overhead tríceps
instructions: For this exercise anchor a band to the ground. We used an incline bench and anchored the band to the base, standing over the bench. Alternatively, this could be performed standing no/na band.
To begin, pull the band behind Seus/Suas head, holding it with a pronated grip and Seus/Suas elbows up. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To perform the movement, extend through the elbow to to straighten Seus/Suas braços, ensuring that you keep Seus/Suas upper arm in place.
Pause, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Speed box agachamento
instructions: Attach bands to the bar that are securely anchored near the ground. You may need to choke the bands to get adequate tension.

Use a box of an appropriate height for this exercise. Load the bar to a peso that still requires effort, but isn't so heavy that speed is compromised. Typically, that will be between 50-70% of Seus/Suas one rep max.
Position the bar on Seus/Suas upper costas, shoulder blades retracted, costas arched and everything tight head to toe. This will be the starting position.
Unrack the bar and position yourself in front of the box. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips until you are seated no/na box, ensuring that you descend under control and don't crash onto the surface.
Pause briefly, and explode off of the box, extending through the hips and knees.

name: Speed squats
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Begin to raise the bar as fast as possible without involving momentum as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position. Note: You should perform these exercises as fast as possible but without breaking perfect form and without involving momentum.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Spell caster
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated grip. Seus/Suas pés should be wide with Seus/Suas hips and knees extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by pulling both of the dumbbells to one side next to Seus/Suas hip, rotating Seus/Suas torso.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight and the dumbbells parallel to the ground, rotate Seus/Suas torso to swing the peso to Seus/Suas opposite side.
Continue alternating, rotating from one side to the other until the set is complete.

name: Spider crawl
instructions: Begin in a prone position no/na floor. Support Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas mãos and toes, with Seus/Suas pés together and Seus/Suas body straight. Seus/Suas braços should be bent to 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement by raising one foot off of the ground. Externally rotate the leg and bring the knee toward Seus/Suas elbow, as far forward as possible.
Return this leg to the starting position and repeat no/na opposite side.

name: Spider curl
instructions: Start out by setting the bar no/na part of the preacher bench that you would normally sit on. Make sure to align the barbell properly so that it is balanced and will not fall off.

Move to the front side of the preacher bench (the part where the braços usually lay) and position yourself to lay at a 45 degree slant with Seus/Suas torso and stomach pressed against the front side of the preacher bench.
Make sure that Seus/Suas pés (especially the toes) are well positioned no/na floor and place Seus/Suas upper braços on top of the pad located no/na inside part of the preacher bench.
Use Seus/Suas braços to grab the barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up) at about shoulder width apart or slightly closer from each other.
Slowly begin to lift the barbell upwards and exhale. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly begin to bring the barbell costas to the starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. .
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Spinal stretch
instructions: Sit in a chair so Seus/Suas costas is straight and Seus/Suas pés planted no/na floor.
Interlace Seus/Suas fingers behind Seus/Suas head, elbows out and Seus/Suas chin down.
Twist Seus/Suas upper body to one side about 3 times as far as you can. Then lean forward and twist Seus/Suas torso to reach Seus/Suas elbow to the floor no/na inside of Seus/Suas knee.
Return to upright position and then repeat for Seus/Suas other side.

name: Split clean
instructions: With a barbell no/na floor close to the shins, take an overhand grip just outside the pernas. Lower Seus/Suas hips com o/a peso focused no/na heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with Seus/Suas ombros just in front of the bar. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending Seus/Suas knees. Seus/Suas costas angle should stay the same, and Seus/Suas braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, com o/a braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços com o/a elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating Seus/Suas elbows sob o/a bar as you do so.

Receive the bar com o/a pés split, aggressively moving one foot forward and one foot costas. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat com o/a mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Bring the pés together as you stand up.

name: Split jerk
instructions: Standing com o/a peso racked no/na front of the ombros, begin com o/a dip. With Seus/Suas pés directly under Seus/Suas hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move Seus/Suas head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros. At this moment as the pés leave the floor, the pés must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should be moved to a split stance, one foot forward, one foot costas, com o/a knees partially bent. Receive the bar com o/a braços locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position, bringing the pés together.

name: Split jump
instructions: Assume a lunge stance position with one foot forward com o/a knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot.
Extending through both pernas, jump as high as possible, swinging Seus/Suas braços to gain lift.
As you jump, bring Seus/Suas pés together, and move them costas to their initial positions as you land.
Absorb the impact by reverting costas to the starting position.

name: Split snatch
instructions: Begin with a loaded barbell no/na floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken no/na bar. The pés should be directly below the hips, com o/a pés turned out as needed. Lower the hips, com o/a peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The costas angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move Seus/Suas pés into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move forcefully to a split position, one foot forward one foot costas. Receive the bar with Seus/Suas body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, Seus/Suas head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing position, bringing Seus/Suas pés together.
Carefully return the peso to floor.

name: Split agachamento with dumbbells
instructions: Position yourself into a staggered stance com o/a rear foot elevated and front foot forward.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, letting them hang at the sides. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by descending, flexing Seus/Suas knee and hip to lower Seus/Suas body down. Maintain good posture througout the movement. Keep the front knee in line com o/a foot as you perform the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, drive through the heel to extend the knee and hip to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Split squats
instructions: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg costas, flexing the knees and lowering Seus/Suas hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing costas up and jumping, reversing the position of Seus/Suas pernas. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.

name: Agachamento jerk
instructions: Standing com o/a peso racked no/na front of the ombros, begin com o/a dip. With Seus/Suas pés directly under Seus/Suas hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move Seus/Suas head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros.

At this moment as the pés leave the floor, the pés must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should move forcefully to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with Seus/Suas body in a full agachamento and the braços fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, Seus/Suas head and peito up, drive throught heels of the pés to move to a standing position. Carefully return the peso to floor.

name: Agachamento with bands
instructions: Set up the bands no/na sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or dumbbells so that there is appropriate tension.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wide for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips as much as possible. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line com o/a top of the knee.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

name: Agachamento with chains
instructions: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still no/na floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping sob o/a bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades together and rotate Seus/Suas elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across Seus/Suas ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in Seus/Suas lower costas, and step costas into position. Place Seus/Suas pés wide for more emphasis no/na costas, glúteos, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep Seus/Suas head facing forward.

With Seus/Suas costas, ombros, and core tight, push Seus/Suas knees and butt out and you begin Seus/Suas descent. Sit costas with Seus/Suas hips as much as possible. Ideally, Seus/Suas shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line com o/a top of the knee.

Keeping the peso on Seus/Suas heels and pushing Seus/Suas pés and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with Seus/Suas head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

name: Agachamento with plate movers
instructions: To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Position a peso plate no/na ground a couple pés costas from the rack. Once the bar is loaded, step under it and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros across it.
Hold on to the bar with both mãos and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straighten Seus/Suas torso.
Step away from the rack and adopt a wide stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out, with one foot no/na peso plate. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees.
Raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heels of Seus/Suas pés as you extend the hips and knees.
At the top of the movement, side step, bringing Seus/Suas pés together no/na opposite side of the plate.
Using Seus/Suas inside foot, push the peso plate, sliding it across the floor to where you were just standing.
Place Seus/Suas inside foot no/na peso plate, adopting a wide stance for the next repetition.

name: Squats - with bands
instructions: To start out, make sure that the exercise band is at an even split between both the left and right side of the body. To do this, use Seus/Suas mãos to grab both sides of the band and place both pés in the middle of the band. Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.

When holding the bands, they should be the same height on each side. You should be using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) and have the handles of the bands next to Seus/Suas face for this exercise. This is the starting position.
Slowly start to bend the knees and lower the pernas so that Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the floor while exhaling.
Use the heel of Seus/Suas pés to push Seus/Suas body up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Stairmaster
instructions: To begin, step onto the stairmaster and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise.

Pump Seus/Suas pernas up and down in an established rhythm, driving the pedals down but not all the way to the floor. It is recommended that you maintain Seus/Suas grip no/na handles so that you don't fall. The handles can be used to monitor Seus/Suas heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Stairmasters offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.

name: Standing alternating dumbbell press
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand. Raise the dumbbells to Seus/Suas ombros with Seus/Suas palms facing forward and Seus/Suas elbows pointed out. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Extend one arm to press the dumbbell straight up, keeping Seus/Suas off hand in place. Do not lean or jerk the peso during the movement.
After a brief pause, return the peso to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side, continuing to alternate between braços.

name: Standing barbell calf raise
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the bar no/na costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. Esta será sua posição inicial. Tip: For better range of motion you may also place the ball of Seus/Suas pés on a wooden block but be careful as this option requires more balance and a sturdy block.

Raise Seus/Suas heels as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas ankles as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering Seus/Suas heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing barbell press behind neck
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for easier pick up of the bar. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Seus/Suas costas should be kept straight while performing this exercise. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Elevate the barbell overhead by fully extending Seus/Suas braços while breathing out.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barbell costas down to the starting position by inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing bent-over one-arm dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: With a dumbbell in one hand and the palm facing Seus/Suas torso, bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearm is pointing towards the floor as the hand holds the peso. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the upper braços stationary, use the tríceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell costas to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Standing bent-over two-arm dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: With a dumbbell in each hand and the palms facing Seus/Suas torso, bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and bring Seus/Suas torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up. The upper braços should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the mãos hold the peso. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the upper braços stationary, use the tríceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole braços are extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells costas to their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Standing bíceps cable curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding a cable curl bar that is attached to a low pulley. Grab the cable bar at shoulder width and keep the elbows close to the torso. The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing up (supinated grip). Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the curl bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing bíceps stretch
instructions: Clasp Seus/Suas mãos behind Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas palms together, straighten braços and then rotate them so Seus/Suas palms face downward.
Raise Seus/Suas braços up and hold until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas bíceps.

name: Standing bradford press
instructions: Place a loaded bar at shoulder level in a rack. With a pronated grip at shoulder width, begin com o/a bar racked across the front of Seus/Suas ombros. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Initiate the lift by extending the elbows to press the bar overhead. Avoid locking out the elbow as you move the peso behind Seus/Suas head.
Lower the bar down to the costas of the head until Seus/Suas elbow forms a right angle.
Lift the bar costas over Seus/Suas head by extending the elbows
Lower the bar down to the starting position.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Standing cable peito press
instructions: Position dual pulleys to peito height and select an appropriate peso. Stand a foot or two in front of the cables, holding one in each hand. You can stagger Seus/Suas stance for better stability.
Position the upper arm at a 90 degree angle com o/a shoulder blades together. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping the rest of the body stationary, extend through the elbows to press the handles forward, drawing them together in front of you.
Pause at the top of the motion, and Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Standing cable lift
instructions: Connect a standard handle on a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley position.

With Seus/Suas side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, com o/a tension of the peso no/na cable. Seus/Suas outstretched arm should be aligned com o/a cable.
With Seus/Suas pés positioned shoulder width apart, agachamento down and grab the handle with both mãos. Seus/Suas braços should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the handle up and across Seus/Suas body until Seus/Suas braços are in a fully-extended position above Seus/Suas head.
Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas braços close to Seus/Suas body as you pivot Seus/Suas costas foot and straighten Seus/Suas pernas to get a full range of motion.
Retract Seus/Suas braços and then Seus/Suas body. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: Standing cable wood chop
instructions: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and move the cable to the highest pulley position.

With Seus/Suas side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, com o/a tension of the peso no/na cable. Seus/Suas outstretched arm should be aligned com o/a cable.
With Seus/Suas pés positioned shoulder width apart, reach upward with Seus/Suas other hand and grab the handle with both mãos. Seus/Suas braços should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the handle down and across Seus/Suas body to Seus/Suas front knee while rotating Seus/Suas torso.
Keep Seus/Suas costas and braços straight and core tight while you pivot Seus/Suas costas foot and bend Seus/Suas knees to get a full range of motion.
Maintain Seus/Suas stance and straight braços. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements no/na opposite side.

name: Standing calf raises
instructions: Adjust the padded lever of the calf raise machine to fit Seus/Suas height.

Place Seus/Suas ombros sob o/a pads provided and position Seus/Suas toes facing forward (or using any of the two other positions described at the beginning of the chapter). The balls of Seus/Suas pés should be secured on top of the calf block com o/a heels extending off it. Push the lever up by extending Seus/Suas hips and knees until Seus/Suas torso is standing erect. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. Toes should be facing forward, outwards or inwards as described at the beginning of the chapter. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Raise Seus/Suas heels as you breathe out by extending Seus/Suas ankles as high as possible and flexing Seus/Suas calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering Seus/Suas heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing concentration curl
instructions: Taking a dumbbell in Seus/Suas working hand, lean forward. Allow Seus/Suas working arm to hang perpendicular to the ground com o/a elbow pointing out. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Flex the elbow to curl the peso, keeping the upper arm stationary. At the top of the repetition, flex the bíceps and pause.
Lower the dumbbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Standing dumbbell calf raise
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas torso upright holding two dumbbells in Seus/Suas mãos by Seus/Suas sides. Place the ball of the foot on a sturdy and stable wooden board (that is around 2-3 inches tall) while Seus/Suas heels extend off and touch the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.

com o/a toes pointing either straight (to hit all parts equally), inwards (for emphasis no/na outer head) or outwards (for emphasis no/na inner head), raise the heels off the floor as you exhale by contracting the calves. Hold the top contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go costas to the starting position by slowly lowering the heels.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

name: Standing dumbbell press
instructions: Standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart, take a dumbbell in each hand. Raise the dumbbells to head height, the elbows out and about 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Maintaining strict technique with no leg drive or leaning costas, extend through the elbow to raise the peso together directly above Seus/Suas head.
Pause, and slowly return the peso to the starting position.

name: Standing dumbbell reverse curl
instructions: To begin, stand straight with a dumbbell in each hand using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended while Seus/Suas pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing dumbbell straight-arm front delt raise above head
instructions: Hold the dumbbells in front of Seus/Suas thighs, palms facing Seus/Suas thighs.
Keep Seus/Suas braços straight with a slight bend at the elbows but keep them locked. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Raise the dumbbells in a semicircular motion to arm's length overhead as you exhale.
Slowly Retorne para a posição inicial using the same path as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: To begin, stand up with a dumbbell held by both mãos. Seus/Suas pés should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Slowly use both mãos to grab the dumbbell and lift it over Seus/Suas head until both braços are fully extended.
The resistência should be resting in the palms of Seus/Suas mãos with Seus/Suas thumbs around it. The palm of the mãos should be facing up towards the ceiling. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head with elbows in and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Tip: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing dumbbell upright row
instructions: Grasp a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated (palms forward) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The dumbbells should be resting on top of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas braços should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas should be straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the dumbbells as you exhale. The dumbbells should be close to the body as you move it up and the elbows should drive the motion. Continue to lift them until they nearly touch Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbells, Seus/Suas elbows should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearms. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbells costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing elevated quad stretch
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas costas about two to three pés away from a bench or step.
Lift one leg behind you and rest Seus/Suas foot no/na step,either on Seus/Suas instep or the ball of Seus/Suas foot, whichever you find most comfortable.
Keep Seus/Suas supporting knee slightly bent and avoid letting that knee extend out beyond Seus/Suas toes. Switch sides.

name: Standing front barbell raise over head
instructions: To begin, stand straight with a barbell in Seus/Suas mãos. You should grip the bar with palms facing down and a closer than shoulder width grip apart from each other.
Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Seus/Suas elbows should be slightly bent. This is the starting position.
Lift the barbell up until it is directly over Seus/Suas head while exhaling. Make sure to keep Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent when performing each repetition.
Once you feel the contraction, begin to lower the barbell costas down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing gastrocnemius calf stretch
instructions: Place Seus/Suas right heel on a step with Seus/Suas knee extended and lean forward to grab Seus/Suas right toe with Seus/Suas right hand. Seus/Suas left knee should be slightly bent and Seus/Suas costas should be straight.
Support Seus/Suas peso on Seus/Suas left leg and place Seus/Suas left hand on Seus/Suas left thigh.
Pull Seus/Suas right toes toward Seus/Suas knee until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas calf.

name: Standing hamstring and calf stretch
instructions: Being by looping a belt, band, or rope around one foot. While standing, place that foot forward.
Bend Seus/Suas costas leg, while keeping the front one straight. Now raise the toes of Seus/Suas front foot off of the ground and lean forward.
Using the belt, pull no/na top of the foot to increase the stretch in the calf. Hold for 10-20 seconds and repeat com o/a other foot.

name: Standing hip circles
instructions: Begin standing on one leg, holding to a vertical support.
Raise the unsupported knee to 90 degrees. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Open the hip as far as possible, attempting to make a big circle with Seus/Suas knee.
Perform this movement slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat no/na other side.

name: Standing hip flexors
instructions: Stand up straight com o/a spine vertical, the left foot slightly in front of the right.

Bend both knees and lift the costas heel off the floor as you press the right hip forward. You can't get a thorough, deep stretch in this position, however, because it's hard to relax the hip flexor and stand on it at the same time. Switch sides.

name: Standing inner-bíceps curl
instructions: Stand up with a dumbbell in each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso. Seus/Suas pernas should be at about shoulder's width apart from each other.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing inward in a neutral position. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso out while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Seus/Suas wrist should turn so that when the peso are fully elevated you have supinated grip (palms facing up).
Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Tip: Keep the forearms aligned with Seus/Suas outer deltoids.
Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to the starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in. Remember to rotate the wrists as you lower the peso in order to switch costas to a neutral grip.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing lateral stretch
instructions: Take a slightly wider than hip distance stance with Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Place Seus/Suas right hand on Seus/Suas right hip to support the spine.
Raise Seus/Suas left arm in a vertical line and place Seus/Suas left hand behind Seus/Suas head. Keep it there as you incline Seus/Suas torso to the right.
Keep Seus/Suas peso evenly distributed between both pernas (don't lean into Seus/Suas left hip). Switch sides.

name: Standing leg curl
instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit Seus/Suas height and lie with Seus/Suas torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) com o/a pad of the lever no/na costas of Seus/Suas right leg (just a few inches sob o/a calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure Seus/Suas leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine. Position Seus/Suas toes straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you exhale, curl Seus/Suas right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the pernas costas to the initial position. Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.

name: Standing long jump
instructions: This drill is best done in sand or other soft landing surface. Ensure that you are able to measure distance. Stand in a partial agachamento stance with pés shoulder width apart.
Utilizing a big arm swing and a countermovement of the pernas, jump forward as far as you can.
Attempt to land with Seus/Suas pés out in front you, reaching as far as possible with Seus/Suas pernas.
Measure the distance from Seus/Suas landing point to the starting point and track results.

name: Standing low-pulley deltoid raise
instructions: Start by standing to the right side of a low pulley row. Use Seus/Suas left hand to come across the body and grab a single handle attached to the low pulley with a pronated grip (palms facing down). Rest Seus/Suas arm in front of you. Seus/Suas right hand should grab the machine for better support and balance.
Make sure that Seus/Suas costas is erect and Seus/Suas pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
Begin to use the left hand and come across Seus/Suas body out until it is elevated to shoulder height while exhaling.
Feel the contraction at the top for a second and begin to slowly lower the handle costas down to the original starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Standing low-pulley one-arm tríceps extension
instructions: Grab a single handle with Seus/Suas left arm next to the low pulley machine. Turn away from the machine keeping the handle to the side of Seus/Suas body with Seus/Suas arm fully extended. Now use both mãos to elevate the single handle directly above the head com o/a palm facing forward. Keep Seus/Suas upper arm completely vertical (perpendicular to the floor) and put Seus/Suas right hand on Seus/Suas left elbow to help keep it steady. This is the starting position.

Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Tip: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the single handle. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Standing military press
instructions: Start by placing a barbell that is about peito high on a agachamento rack. Once you have selected the peso, grab the barbell using a pronated (palms facing forward) grip. Make sure to grip the bar wider than shoulder width apart from each other.

Slightly bend the knees and place the barbell on Seus/Suas collar bone. Lift the barbell up keeping it lying on Seus/Suas peito. Take a step costas and position Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart from each other.

Once you pick up the barbell com o/a correct grip length, lift the bar up over Seus/Suas head by locking Seus/Suas braços. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of Seus/Suas head. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Lower the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar costas up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing olympic plate hand squeeze
instructions: To begin, stand straight while holding a peso plate by the ridge at arm's length in each hand using a neutral grip (palms facing in). You pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lower the plates until the fingers are nearly extended but can still hold peso. Inhale as you lower the plates.
Now raise the plates costas to the starting position as you exhale by closing Seus/Suas mãos.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições prescribed in Seus/Suas program.

name: Standing one-arm cable curl
instructions: Start out by grabbing single handle next to the low pulley machine. Make sure you are far enough from the machine so that Seus/Suas arm is supporting the peso.

Make sure that Seus/Suas upper arm is stationary, perpendicular to the floor with elbows in and palms facing forward. Seus/Suas non lifting arm should be grabbing Seus/Suas waist. This will allow you to keep Seus/Suas balance.
Slowly begin to curl the single handle upwards while keeping the upper arm stationary until Seus/Suas forearm touches Seus/Suas bicep while exhaling. Tip: Only the forearm should move.
Hold the contraction position as you squeeze the bicep and then lower the single handle costas down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços while performing this exercise.

name: Standing one-arm dumbbell curl over incline bench
instructions: Stand no/na costas side of an incline bench as if you were going to be a spotter for someone. Have a dumbbell in one hand and rest it across the incline bench with a supinated (palms up) grip.

Position Seus/Suas non lifting hand at the corner or side of the incline bench. The peito should be pressed against the top part of the incline and Seus/Suas pés should be pressed against the floor at a wide stance. This is the starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell upward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços while performing this exercise.

name: Standing one-arm dumbbell tríceps extension
instructions: To begin, stand up with a dumbbell held in one hand. Seus/Suas pés should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Now fully extend the arm com o/a dumbbell over Seus/Suas head. Tip: The small finger of Seus/Suas hand should be facing the ceiling and the palm of Seus/Suas hand should be facing forward. The dumbbell should be above Seus/Suas head.
Esta será sua posição inicial.
