Keeping Seus/Suas upper arm close to Seus/Suas head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearm touch Seus/Suas bicep. Tip: The upper arm should remain stationary and only the forearm should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Standing overhead barbell tríceps extension
instructions: To begin, stand up holding a barbell or e-z bar using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) with Seus/Suas mãos closer than shoulder width apart from each other. Seus/Suas pés should be about shoulder width apart.
Now elevate the barbell above Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended. Keep Seus/Suas elbows in. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head and elbows in, perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Tip: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the barbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing palm-in one-arm dumbbell press
instructions: Start by having a dumbbell in one hand with Seus/Suas arm fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Use Seus/Suas other arm to hold on to an incline bench to keep Seus/Suas balance.

Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the dumbbell up until you create a 90 degree angle with Seus/Suas arm. Note: Seus/Suas forearm should be perpendicular to the floor. Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise.
Slowly lift the dumbbell up until Seus/Suas arm is fully extended. This the starting position.
While inhaling lower the peso down until Seus/Suas arm is at a 90 degree angle again.

Feel the contraction for a second and then lift the peso costas up towards the starting position while exhaling. Remember to hold on to the incline bench and keep Seus/Suas pés positioned to keep balance during the exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.

name: Standing palms-in dumbbell press
instructions: Start by having a dumbbell in each hand with Seus/Suas arm fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the dumbbells up until you create a 90 degree angle with Seus/Suas braços. Note: Seus/Suas forearms should be perpendicular to the floor. This the starting position.
Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise. Slowly lift the dumbbells up until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended.
While inhaling lower the peso down until Seus/Suas arm is at a 90 degree angle again.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing palms-up barbell behind the costas wrist curl
instructions: Start by standing straight and holding a barbell behind Seus/Suas glúteos at arm's length while using a pronated grip (palms will be facing costas away from the glúteos) and having Seus/Suas mãos shoulder width apart from each other.
You should be looking straight forward while Seus/Suas pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
While exhaling, slowly elevate the barbell up by curling Seus/Suas wrist in a semi-circular motion towards the ceiling. Note: Seus/Suas wrist should be the only body part moving for this exercise.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barbell costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, lower the barbell down to the agachamento rack or the floor by bending the knees. Tip: It is easiest to either pick it up from a agachamento rack or have a partner hand it to you.

name: Standing pelvic tilt
instructions: Start off with Seus/Suas pés hip-distance apart.
Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly to keep them soft and springy.
You may want to move Seus/Suas pelvis forward and backward and costas few times before holding the tailbone forward in this stretch.

name: Standing rope crunch
instructions: Attach a rope to a high pulley and select an appropriate peso.
Stand with Seus/Suas costas to the cable tower. Take the rope with both mãos over Seus/Suas ombros, holding it to Seus/Suas upper peito. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Perform the movement by flexing the spine, crunching the peso down as far as you can.
Hold the peak contraction for a moment before returning to the starting position.

name: Standing soleus and achilles stretch
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés hip-distance apart, one foot slightly in front of the other.
Bend both knees, keeping Seus/Suas costas heel no/na floor. Switch sides.

name: Standing toe touches
instructions: Stand with some space in front and behind you.

Bend at the waist, keeping Seus/Suas pernas straight, until you can relax and let Seus/Suas upper body hang down in front of you. Let Seus/Suas braços and mãos hang down naturally. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

name: Standing towel tríceps extension
instructions: To begin, stand up with both braços fully extended above the head holding one end of a towel with both mãos. Seus/Suas elbows should be in and the braços perpendicular to the floor com o/a palms facing each other while Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.

Now communicate with Seus/Suas partner so that he/she can grip the other side of the towel to apply resistência. Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistência in a semicircular motion behind Seus/Suas head until Seus/Suas forearms touch Seus/Suas bíceps. Tip: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the starting position by using the tríceps to raise the towel. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Standing two-arm overhead throw
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart holding a medicine ball in both mãos. To begin, reach the medicine ball deep behind Seus/Suas head as you bend the knees slightly and lean costas.
Violently throw the ball forward, flexing at the hip and using Seus/Suas whole body to complete the movement.
The medicine ball can be thrown to a partner or to a wall, receiving it as it bounces costas.

name: Star jump
instructions: Begin in a relaxed stance with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart and hold Seus/Suas braços close to the body.
To initiate the move, agachamento down halfway and explode costas up as high as possible. Fully extend Seus/Suas entire body, spreading Seus/Suas pernas and braços away from the body.
As you land, bring Seus/Suas limbs costas in and absorb Seus/Suas impact through the pernas.

name: Step-up with knee raise
instructions: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with Seus/Suas pés together. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting Seus/Suas left foot no/na top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of Seus/Suas front leg to stand up no/na box. As you stand no/na box with Seus/Suas left leg, flex Seus/Suas right knee and hip, bringing Seus/Suas knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence no/na opposite leg.

name: Step mill
instructions: To begin, step onto the stepmill and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Use caution so that you don't trip as you climb the stairs. It is recommended that you maintain Seus/Suas grip no/na handles so that you don't fall.

Stepmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside while offering a similar rate of calories burned. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.

name: Stiff-legged barbell levantamento terra
instructions: Grasp a bar using an overhand grip (palms facing down). You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.
Stand with Seus/Suas torso straight and Seus/Suas pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the barbell to over the top of Seus/Suas pés by bending at the hips while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch no/na hamstrings. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Start bringing Seus/Suas torso up straight again by extending Seus/Suas hips until you are costas at the starting position. Exhale as you perform this movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Stiff-legged dumbbell levantamento terra
instructions: Grasp a couple of dumbbells holding them by Seus/Suas side at arm's length.
Stand with Seus/Suas torso straight and Seus/Suas pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the dumbbells to over the top of Seus/Suas pés by bending at the waist while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch no/na hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movement
Start bringing Seus/Suas torso up straight again by extending Seus/Suas hips and waist until you are costas at the starting position. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Stiff leg barbell good morning
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Keeping Seus/Suas pernas stationary, move Seus/Suas torso forward by bending at the hips while inhaling. Lower Seus/Suas torso until it is parallel com o/a floor.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by elevating Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Stomach vacuum
instructions: To begin, stand straight with Seus/Suas pés shoulder width apart from each other. Coloque suas mãos on Seus/Suas hips. This is the starting position.

Now slowly inhale as much air as possible and then start to exhale as much as possible while bringing Seus/Suas stomach in as much as possible and hold this position. Try to visualize Seus/Suas navel touching Seus/Suas backbone.
One isometric contraction is around 20 seconds. During the 20 second hold, try to breathe normally. Then inhale and bring Seus/Suas stomach costas to the starting position.
Once you have practiced this exercise, try to perform this exercise for longer than 20 seconds. Tip: You can work Seus/Suas way up to 40-60 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets.

name: Straight-arm dumbbell pullover
instructions: Place a dumbbell standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the dumbbell stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (torso across it as in forming a cross) with only Seus/Suas ombros lying no/na surface. Hips should be below the bench and pernas bent with pés firmly no/na floor. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the dumbbell with both mãos and hold it straight over Seus/Suas peito at braços length. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the dumbbell. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Caution: Always ensure that the dumbbell used for this exercise is secure. Using a dumbbell with loose plates can result in the dumbbell falling apart and falling on Seus/Suas face.
While keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind Seus/Suas head while breathing in until you feel a stretch no/na peito.
At that point, bring the dumbbell costas to the starting position using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the peso no/na initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Straight-arm pulldown
instructions: You will start by grabbing the wide bar from the top pulley of a pulldown machine and using a wider than shoulder-width pronated (palms down) grip. Step backwards two pés or so.

Bend Seus/Suas torso forward at the waist by around 30-degrees with Seus/Suas braços fully extended in front of you and a slight bend at the elbows. If Seus/Suas braços are not fully extended then you need to step a bit more backwards until they are. Once Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and Seus/Suas torso is slightly bent at the waist, tighten the lats and then you are ready to begin.
While keeping the braços straight, pull the bar down by contracting the lats until Seus/Suas mãos are next to the side of the thighs. Breathe out as you perform this step.
While keeping the braços straight, go costas to the starting position while breathing in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Straight bar bench mid rows
instructions: Place a loaded barbell no/na end of a bench. Standing no/na bench behind the bar, take a medium, pronated grip. Stand with Seus/Suas hips costas and peito up, maintaining a neutral spine. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Row the bar to Seus/Suas torso by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Use a controlled movement with no jerking.
After a brief pause, slowly return the bar to the starting position, ensuring to go all the way down.

name: Straight raises on incline bench
instructions: Place a bar no/na ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay no/na bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barbell up from the floor, keeping Seus/Suas braços straight. Allow the bar to hang straight down. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To begin, raise the barbell out in front of Seus/Suas head while keeping Seus/Suas braços extended.
Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Stride jump crossover
instructions: Stand to the side of a box with Seus/Suas inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the braços upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the opposite position that you started, no/na opposite side of the box. The foot that was initially no/na box will now be no/na ground, com o/a opposite foot now no/na box.
Repeat the movement, crossing costas over to the other side.

name: Sumo levantamento terra
instructions: Begin with a bar loaded no/na ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens Seus/Suas braços.

Take a breath, and then lower Seus/Suas hips, looking forward with Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas peito up. Drive through the floor, spreading Seus/Suas pés apart, with Seus/Suas peso no/na costas half of Seus/Suas pés. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean costas and drive the hips into the bar, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the peso no/na way down.

name: Sumo levantamento terra with bands
instructions: To levantamento terra with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. Ensure that they sob o/a costas half of Seus/Suas foot, directly where you are driving into the floor.

Begin with a bar loaded no/na ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip.

Take a breath, and then lower Seus/Suas hips, looking forward with Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas peito up. Drive through the floor, spreading Seus/Suas pés apart, with Seus/Suas peso no/na costas half of Seus/Suas pés. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean costas and drive the hips into the bar, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the peso no/na way down.

name: Sumo levantamento terra with chains
instructions: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater peso increase as you lift. Attempt to keep the ends of the chains away from the plates so you don't hit them when you lower the peso.

Begin with a bar loaded no/na ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens Seus/Suas braços.

Take a breath, and then lower Seus/Suas hips, looking forward with Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas peito up. Drive through the floor, spreading Seus/Suas pés apart, with Seus/Suas peso no/na costas half of Seus/Suas pés. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean costas and drive the hips into the bar, pulling Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the peso no/na way down.

name: Superman
instructions: To begin, lie straight and face down no/na floor or exercise mat. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended in front of you. This is the starting position.

Simultaneously raise Seus/Suas braços, pernas, and peito off of the floor and hold this contraction for 2 seconds. Tip: Squeeze Seus/Suas lower costas to get the best results from this exercise. Remember to exhale during this movement. Note: When holding the contracted position, you should look like superman when he is flying.
Slowly begin to lower Seus/Suas braços, pernas and peito costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições prescribed in Seus/Suas program.

name: Supine peito throw
instructions: This drill is great for peito passes when you lack a partner or a wall of sufficient strength. Lay no/na ground on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas knees bent.
Begin com o/a ball on Seus/Suas peito, held with both mãos no/na bottom.
Explode up, extending through the elbow to throw the ball directly above you as high as possible.
Catch the ball with both mãos as it comes down.

name: Supine one-arm overhead throw
instructions: Lay no/na ground on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas knees bent. Hold the ball with one hand, extending the arm fully behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

name: Supine two-arm overhead throw
instructions: Lay no/na ground on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas knees bent.
Hold the ball with both mãos, extending the braços fully behind Seus/Suas head. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

name: Suspended fallout
instructions: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing Seus/Suas body closer to the ground, allowing Seus/Suas ombros to extend, raising Seus/Suas braços up and over Seus/Suas head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of Seus/Suas body straight, Seus/Suas ombros being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Suspended push-up
instructions: Anchor Seus/Suas suspension straps securely to the top of a rack or other object.

Leaning into the straps, take a handle in each hand and move into a push-up plank position. You should be as close to parallel to the ground as you can manage with Seus/Suas braços fully extended, maintaining good posture.
Maintaining a straight, rigid torso, descend slowly by allowing the elbows to flex.
Continue until Seus/Suas elbows break 90 degrees, pausing before you extend to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Suspended reverse crunch
instructions: Secure a set of suspension straps com o/a handles hanging about a foot off of the ground. Move yourself into a flexão plank position facing away from the rack.
Place Seus/Suas pés into the handles. You should maintain a straight posture, not allowing the hips to sag. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin the movement by flexing the knees and hips, drawing the knees to Seus/Suas torso. As you do so, anteriorly tilt Seus/Suas pelvis, allowing Seus/Suas spine to flex.
At the top of the controlled motion, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Suspended row
instructions: Suspend Seus/Suas straps at around peito height. Take a handle in each hand and lean costas. Keep Seus/Suas body erect and Seus/Suas head and peito up. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by flexing the elbow to initiate the movement. Protract Seus/Suas shoulder blades as you do so.
At the completion of the motion pause, and then Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Suspended split agachamento
instructions: Suspend Seus/Suas straps so the handles are 18-30 inches from the floor.

Facing away from the setup, place Seus/Suas rear foot into the handle behind you. Keep Seus/Suas head looking forward and Seus/Suas peito up, with Seus/Suas knee slightly bent. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Descend by flexing the knee and hips, lowering yourself to the ground. Keep Seus/Suas peso no/na heel of Seus/Suas foot and maintain Seus/Suas posture throughout the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, reverse the motion, extending through the hip and knee to Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Svend press
instructions: Begin in a standing position.

Press two lightweight plates together with Seus/Suas mãos. Hold the plates together close to Seus/Suas peito to create an isometric contraction in Seus/Suas peito muscles. Seus/Suas fingers should be pointed forward. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Squeeze the plates between Seus/Suas palms and extend Seus/Suas braços directly out in front of you in a controlled motion.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: T-bar row with handle
instructions: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate peso onto Seus/Suas end.
Stand over the bar, and position a Double D row handle around the bar next to the collar. Using Seus/Suas hips and pernas, rise to a standing position.
Assume a wide stance with Seus/Suas hips costas and Seus/Suas peito up. Seus/Suas braços should be extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Pull the peso to Seus/Suas upper abdomen by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Do not jerk the peso or cheat during the movement.
After a brief pause, Retorne para a posição inicial.

name: Tate press
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand on top of Seus/Suas thighs. The palms of Seus/Suas hand will be facing each other.

By using Seus/Suas thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Note: when holding the dumbbells in front of you, make sure Seus/Suas braços are wider than shoulder width apart from each other using a pronated (palms forward) grip. Allow Seus/Suas elbows to point out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Keeping the upper braços stationary, slowly move the dumbbells in and down in a semi circular motion until they touch the upper peito while inhaling. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times and do not move the upper braços nor rest the dumbbells no/na peito.

As you breathe out, move the dumbbells up using Seus/Suas tríceps and the same semi-circular motion but in reverse. Attempt to keep the dumbbells together as they move up. Lock Seus/Suas braços in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down again slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.

name: The straddle
instructions: Begin in a seated, upright position. Start by extending Seus/Suas pernas in front of you in a V.
With Seus/Suas mãos no/na floor, lean forward as far as possible. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

name: Thigh abductor
instructions: To begin, sit down no/na abductor machine and select a peso you are comfortable with. When Seus/Suas pernas are positioned properly, grip the handles on each side. Seus/Suas entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the starting position.
Slowly press against the machine with Seus/Suas pernas to move them away from each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting position while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep Seus/Suas upper body stationary to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Thigh adductor
instructions: To begin, sit down no/na adductor machine and select a peso you are comfortable with. When Seus/Suas pernas are positioned properly no/na leg pads of the machine, grip the handles on each side. Seus/Suas entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the starting position.
Slowly press against the machine with Seus/Suas pernas to move them towards each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting position while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep Seus/Suas upper body stationary and avoid fast jerking motions in order to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Tire flip
instructions: Begin by gripping the bottom of the tire no/na tread, and position Seus/Suas pés costas a bit. Seus/Suas peito should be driving into the tire.
To lift the tire, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles, driving into the tire and up.

As the tire reaches a 45 degree angle, step forward and drive a knee into the tire. As you do so adjust Seus/Suas grip to the upper portion of the tire and push it forward as hard as possible to complete the turn. Repeat as necessary.

name: Toe touchers
instructions: To begin, Deite-se no chão or an exercise mat with Seus/Suas costas pressed against the floor. Seus/Suas braços should be lying across Seus/Suas sides com o/a palms facing down.

Seus/Suas pernas should be touching each other. Slowly elevate Seus/Suas pernas up in the air until they are almost perpendicular to the floor with a slight bend at the knees. Seus/Suas pés should be parallel to the floor.
Move Seus/Suas braços so that they are fully extended at a 45 degree angle from the floor. This is the starting position.

While keeping Seus/Suas lower costas pressed against the floor, slowly lift Seus/Suas torso and use Seus/Suas mãos to try and touch Seus/Suas toes. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Slowly begin to lower Seus/Suas torso and braços costas down to the starting position while inhaling. Remember to keep Seus/Suas braços straight out pointing towards Seus/Suas toes.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Torso rotation
instructions: Stand upright holding an exercise ball with both mãos. Extend Seus/Suas braços so the ball is straight out in front of you. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Rotate Seus/Suas torso to one side, keeping Seus/Suas eyes no/na ball as you move. Now, rotate costas to the opposite direction. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

name: Trail running/walking
instructions: Running or hiking on trails will get the blood pumping and heart beating almost immediately. Make sure you have good shoes. While you use the muscles in Seus/Suas calves and buttocks to pull yourself up a hill, the knees, joints and ankles absorb the bulk of the pounding coming costas down. Take smaller steps as you walk downhill, keep Seus/Suas knees bent to reduce the impact and slow down to avoid falling.
A 150 lb person can burn over 200 calories for 30 minutes walking uphill, compared to 175 on a flat surface. If running the trail, a 150 lb person can burn well over 500 calories in 30 minutes.

name: Trap bar levantamento terra
instructions: For this exercise load a trap bar, also known as a hex bar, to an appropriate peso resting no/na ground. Stand in the center of the apparatus and grasp both handles.
Lower Seus/Suas hips, look forward with Seus/Suas head and keep Seus/Suas peito up.
Begin the movement by driving through the heels and extend Seus/Suas hips and knees. Avoid rounding Seus/Suas costas at all times.
At the completion of the movement, lower the peso costas to the ground under control.

name: Tricep dumbbell kickback
instructions: Start with a dumbbell in each hand and Seus/Suas palms facing Seus/Suas torso. Keep Seus/Suas costas straight with a slight bend in the knees and bend forward at the waist. Seus/Suas torso should be almost parallel to the floor. Make sure to keep Seus/Suas head up. Seus/Suas upper braços should be close to Seus/Suas torso and parallel to the floor. Seus/Suas forearms should be pointed towards the floor as you hold the peso. There should be a 90-degree angle formed between Seus/Suas forearm and upper arm. This is Seus/Suas starting position.
Now, while keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and use Seus/Suas tríceps to lift the peso until the arm is fully extended. Focus on moving the forearm.
After a brief pause at the top contraction, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells costas down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Tricep side stretch
instructions: Bring right arm across Seus/Suas body and over Seus/Suas left shoulder, holding Seus/Suas elbow with Seus/Suas left hand, until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas tricep. Then repeat for Seus/Suas other arm.

name: Tríceps overhead extension with rope
instructions: Attach a rope to a low pulley. After selecting an appropriate peso, grasp the rope with both mãos and face away from the cable.

Position Seus/Suas mãos behind Seus/Suas head with Seus/Suas elbows point straight up. Seus/Suas elbows should start out flexed, and you can stagger Seus/Suas stance and lean gently away from the machine to create greater stability. Esta será sua posição inicial.
To perform the movement, extend through the elbow while keeping the upper arm in position, raising Seus/Suas mãos above Seus/Suas head.
Squeeze Seus/Suas tríceps at the top of the movement, and Baixe o peso lentamente costas to the start position.

name: Tríceps pushdown
instructions: Attach a straight or angled bar to a high pulley and grab with an overhand grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright com o/a torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to Seus/Suas body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Using the tríceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of Seus/Suas thighs and the braços are fully extended perpendicular to the floor. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to Seus/Suas torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After a second hold at the contracted position, bring the bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Tríceps pushdown - rope attachment
instructions: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley and grab with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).

Standing upright com o/a torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to Seus/Suas body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the rope com o/a palms facing each other. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Using the tríceps, bring the rope down as you bring each side of the rope to the side of Seus/Suas thighs. At the end of the movement the braços are fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to Seus/Suas torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After holding for a second, at the contracted position, bring the rope slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Tríceps pushdown - v-bar attachment
instructions: Attach a V-Bar to a high pulley and grab with an overhand grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright com o/a torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to Seus/Suas body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. The thumbs should be higher than the small finger. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Using the tríceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of Seus/Suas thighs and the braços are fully extended perpendicular to the floor. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to Seus/Suas torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After a second hold at the contracted position, bring the V-Bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Tríceps stretch
instructions: Reach Seus/Suas hand behind Seus/Suas head, grasp Seus/Suas elbow and gently pull. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

name: Tuck crunch
instructions: To begin, Deite-se no chão or an exercise mat with Seus/Suas costas pressed against the floor. Seus/Suas braços should be lying across Seus/Suas sides com o/a palms facing down.

Seus/Suas pernas should be crossed by wrapping one ankle around the other. Slowly elevate Seus/Suas pernas up in the air until Seus/Suas thighs are perpendicular to the floor with a slight bend at the knees. Note: Seus/Suas knees and toes should be parallel to the floor as opposed to the thighs.
Move Seus/Suas braços from the floor and cross them so they are resting on Seus/Suas peito. This is the starting position.
While keeping Seus/Suas lower costas pressed against the floor, slowly lift Seus/Suas torso. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Slowly begin to lower Seus/Suas torso costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Two-arm dumbbell preacher curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with each arm and place the upper braços on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbell should be held at shoulder length. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells until Seus/Suas upper arm is extended and the bíceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the bíceps to curl the peso up until Seus/Suas bíceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the bíceps hard for a second at the contracted position and Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Two-arm kettlebell clean
instructions: Place two kettlebells between Seus/Suas pés. To get in the starting position, push Seus/Suas butt costas and look straight ahead.
Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you raise the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so.
Lower the kettlebells costas to the starting position and repeat.

name: Two-arm kettlebell jerk
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros. Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you swing the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. agachamento down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly driving both kettlebells overhead. Immediately after the initial push, agachamento down again and get sob o/a kettlebells. Once the kettlebells are locked out, stand upright to complete the exercise.

name: Two-arm kettlebell military press
instructions: Clean two kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros. Clean the kettlebells to Seus/Suas ombros by extending through the pernas and hips as you swing the kettlebells towards Seus/Suas ombros. Rotate Seus/Suas wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward.

Press the kettlebells up and out. As the kettlebells pass Seus/Suas head, lean into the peso so that the kettlebells are racked behind Seus/Suas head. Make sure to contract Seus/Suas lats, butt, and stomach for added stability.

name: Two-arm kettlebell row
instructions: Place two kettlebells in front of Seus/Suas pés. Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and then push Seus/Suas butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the starting position.
Grab both kettlebells and pull them to Seus/Suas stomach, retracting Seus/Suas shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Keep Seus/Suas costas straight. Lower and repeat.

name: Underhand cable pulldowns
instructions: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit Seus/Suas height. These pads will prevent Seus/Suas body from being raised by the resistência attached to the bar.
Grab the pull-down bar com o/a palms facing Seus/Suas torso (a supinated grip). Make sure that the mãos are placed closer than the shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

As you breathe out, pull the bar down until it touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the fully contracted position and keep the elbows close to Seus/Suas body. The upper torso should remain stationary as Seus/Suas bring the bar to you and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second no/na contracted position, while breathing in, slowly bring the bar costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Upper costas-leg grab
instructions: While seated, bend forward to hug Seus/Suas thighs from underneath with both braços.

Keep Seus/Suas knees together and Seus/Suas pernas extended out as you bring Seus/Suas peito down to Seus/Suas knees. You can also stretch Seus/Suas middle costas by pulling Seus/Suas costas away from Seus/Suas knees as Seus/Suas hugging them.

name: Upper costas stretch
instructions: Clasp fingers together with Seus/Suas thumbs pointing down, round Seus/Suas ombros as you reach Seus/Suas mãos forward.

name: Upright barbell row
instructions: Grasp a barbell with an overhand grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting no/na top of Seus/Suas thighs with Seus/Suas braços extended and a slight bend in Seus/Suas elbows. Seus/Suas costas should also be straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Now exhale and use the sides of Seus/Suas ombros to lift the bar, raising Seus/Suas elbows up and to the side. Keep the bar close to Seus/Suas body as you raise it. Continue to lift the bar until it nearly touches Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion, and should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearms. Remember to keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Upright cable row
instructions: Grasp a straight bar cable attachment that is attached to a low pulley with a pronated (palms facing Seus/Suas thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting on top of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas braços should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas should be straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the cable bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, Seus/Suas elbows should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearms. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Upright row - with bands
instructions: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles using a pronated (palms facing Seus/Suas thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The handles should be resting on top of Seus/Suas thighs. Seus/Suas braços should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and Seus/Suas costas should be straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Use Seus/Suas side ombros to lift the handles as you exhale. The handles should be close to the body as you move them up. Continue to lift the handles until they nearly touches Seus/Suas chin. Tip: Seus/Suas elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the handles, Seus/Suas elbows should always be higher than Seus/Suas forearms. Also, keep Seus/Suas torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the handles costas down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Upward stretch
instructions: Extend both mãos straight above Seus/Suas head, palms touching.
Slowly push Seus/Suas mãos up and costas, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.

name: V-bar pulldown
instructions: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a V-Bar attached to the top pulley.
Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit Seus/Suas height. These pads will prevent Seus/Suas body from being raised by the resistência attached to the bar.

Grab the V-bar com o/a palms facing each other (a neutral grip). Stick Seus/Suas peito out and lean yourself costas slightly (around 30-degrees) in order to better engage the lats. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Using Seus/Suas lats, pull the bar down as you squeeze Seus/Suas shoulder blades. Continue until Seus/Suas peito nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion. Tip: Keep the torso stationary throughout the movement.
After a second hold no/na contracted position, slowly bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: V-bar barra fixa
instructions: Start by placing the middle of the V-bar in the middle of the pull-up bar (assuming that the pull-up station you are using does not have neutral grip handles). The V-Bar handles will be facing down so that you can hang from the pull-up bar through the use of the handles.

Once you securely place the V-bar, take a hold of the bar from each side and hang from it. Stick Seus/Suas peito out and lean yourself costas slightly in order to better engage the lats. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Using Seus/Suas lats, pull Seus/Suas torso up while leaning Seus/Suas head costas slightly so that you do not hit yourself com o/a chin-up bar. Continue until Seus/Suas peito nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion.
After a second hold no/na contracted position, slowly lower Seus/Suas body costas to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions.

name: Vertical swing
instructions: Allow the dumbbell to hang at braços length between Seus/Suas pernas, holding it with both mãos. Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas head up.
Swing the dumbbell between Seus/Suas pernas, flexing at the hips and bending the knees slightly.
Powerfully reverse the motion by extending at the hips, knees, and ankles to propel yourself upward, swinging the dumbell over Seus/Suas head.
As you land, absorb the impact through Seus/Suas pernas and draw the dumbbell to Seus/Suas torso before the next repetition.

name: Walking, treadmill
instructions: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter Seus/Suas age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than walking outside. When walking, you should move at a moderate to fast pace, not a leisurely one. Being an activity of lower intensity, walking doesn't burn as many calories as some other activities, but still provides great benefit. A 150 lb person will burn about 175 calories walking 4 miles per hour for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories running twice as fast. Maintain proper posture as you walk, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking Seus/Suas heart rate.

name: Weighted ball hyperextension
instructions: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with Seus/Suas torso pressing against the ball and parallel to the floor. The ball of Seus/Suas pés should be pressed against the floor to help keep you balanced. Place a weighted plate under Seus/Suas chin or behind Seus/Suas neck. This is the starting position.
Slowly raise Seus/Suas torso up by bending at the waist and lower costas. Remember to exhale during this movement.
Hold the contraction on Seus/Suas lower costas for a second and lower Seus/Suas torso costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições prescribed in Seus/Suas program.

name: Weighted ball side bend
instructions: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with Seus/Suas left side of the torso (waist, hips and shoulder) pressed against the ball.

Seus/Suas pés should be no/na floor while Seus/Suas pernas are crossed and hanging from the ball. Hold a weighted plate with Seus/Suas right hand directly to the right side of Seus/Suas head. Tip: Make sure the smooth side of the plate is resting against Seus/Suas head.

Place Seus/Suas left arm across Seus/Suas torso so that Seus/Suas palm is on Seus/Suas obliques. There should be a right angle between Seus/Suas left forearm and upper arm. This is the starting position.
Raise the side of Seus/Suas torso up by laterally flexing at the waist while exhaling.
Hold the contraction for a second and slowly lower yourself costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise.

name: Weighted bench dip
instructions: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind Seus/Suas costas and another one in front of you. com o/a benches perpendicular to Seus/Suas body, hold on to one bench on its edge com o/a mãos close to Seus/Suas body, separated at shoulder width. Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended.

The pernas will be extended forward on top of the other bench. Seus/Suas pernas should be parallel to the floor while Seus/Suas torso is to be perpendicular to the floor. Have Seus/Suas partner place the dumbbell on Seus/Suas lap. Note: This exercise is best performed with a partner as placing the peso on Seus/Suas lap can be challenging and cause injury without assistance. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Slowly lower Seus/Suas body as you inhale by bending at the elbows until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the elbows as close as possible throughout the movement. Forearms should always be pointing down.
Using Seus/Suas tríceps to bring Seus/Suas torso up again, lift yourself costas to the starting position while exhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Weighted crunches
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground or resting on a bench with Seus/Suas knees dobrados em um ângulo de 90 graus.
Hold a peso to Seus/Suas peito, or you may hold it extended above Seus/Suas torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now, exhale and slowly begin to roll Seus/Suas ombros off the floor. Seus/Suas ombros should come up off the floor about 4 inches while Seus/Suas lower costas remains no/na floor.
At the top of the movement, flex Seus/Suas abdominals and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower yourself costas down to the starting position.

name: Weighted jump agachamento
instructions: Position a lightly loaded barbell across the costas of Seus/Suas ombros. You could also use a weighted vest, sandbag, or other type of resistência for this exercise.
The peso should be light enough that it doesn't slow you down significantly. Seus/Suas pés should be just outside of shoulder width with Seus/Suas head and peito up. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Using a countermovement, agachamento partially down and immediately reverse Seus/Suas direction to explode off of the ground, extending through Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles. Maintain good posture throughout the jump.
As you return to the ground, absorb the impact through Seus/Suas pernas.

name: Weighted pull ups
instructions: Attach a peso to a dip belt and secure it around Seus/Suas waist. Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing forward. For a medium grip, Seus/Suas mãos should be spaced at shoulder width. Both braços should be extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip.
You'll want to bring Seus/Suas torso costas about 30 degrees while creating a curvature in Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Now, exhale and pull Seus/Suas torso up until Seus/Suas head is above Seus/Suas mãos. Concentrate on squeezing yourshoulder blades costas and down as you reach the top contracted position.
After a brief moment at the top contracted position, inhale and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position with Seus/Suas braços extended and Seus/Suas lats fully stretched.

name: Weighted sissy agachamento
instructions: Standing upright, with pés at shoulder width and toes raised, use one hand to hold onto the beams of a agachamento rack and the opposite arm to hold a plate on top of Seus/Suas peito. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

As you use one arm to hold yourself, bend at the knees and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso toward the ground by bringing Seus/Suas pelvis and knees forward. Inhale as you go down and stop when Seus/Suas upper and lower pernas almost create a 90-degree angle. Hold the stretch position for a second.
After Seus/Suas one second hold, use Seus/Suas thigh muscles to bring Seus/Suas torso costas up to the starting position. Exhale as you move up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

name: Weighted sit-ups - with bands
instructions: Start out by strapping the bands around the base of the decline bench. Place the handles towards the inside of the decline bench so that when lying down, you can reach for both of them.

Position Seus/Suas pernas through the decline machine until they are secured. Now reach for the exercise bands with both mãos. Use a pronated (palms forward) grip to grasp the handles. Position them near Seus/Suas collar bone and rotate Seus/Suas wrist to a neutral grip (palms facing the torso). Note: Seus/Suas braços should remain stationary throughout the exercise. This is the starting position.

Move Seus/Suas torso upward until Seus/Suas upper body is perpendicular to the floor while exhaling. Hold the contraction for a second and lower Seus/Suas upper body costas down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Weighted agachamento
instructions: Start by positioning two flat benches shoulder width apart from each other. Stand on top of them and wrap the weighted belt around Seus/Suas waist com o/a amount of peso you feel comfortable with. Make sure Seus/Suas toes are facing out.

Once you are standing straight up com o/a peso hanging in between Seus/Suas pernas, position Seus/Suas braços so that they are fully extended to the side of Seus/Suas body. This is the starting position.

Begin by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that are perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Begin to move the body costas up by pushing the floor of the flat bench com o/a ball of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Wide-grip barbell supino
instructions: Lie costas on a flat bench with pés firm no/na floor. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas middle peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Wide-grip decline barbell supino
instructions: Lie costas on a decline bench com o/a pés securely locked at the front of the bench. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with Seus/Suas braços locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on Seus/Suas lower peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using Seus/Suas peito muscles. Lock Seus/Suas braços and squeeze Seus/Suas peito in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Wide-grip decline barbell pullover
instructions: Lie down on a decline bench with both pernas securely locked in position. Reach for the barbell behind the head using a pronated grip (palms facing out). Make sure to grab the barbell wider than shoulder width apart for this exercise. Slowly lift the barbell up from the floor by using Seus/Suas braços.
When positioned properly, Seus/Suas braços should be fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. This is the starting position.

Begin by moving the barbell costas down in a semicircular motion as if you were going to place it no/na floor, but instead, stop when the braços are parallel to the floor. Tip: Keep the braços fully extended at all times. The movement should only happen at the shoulder joint. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Now bring the barbell up while exhaling until you are costas at the starting position. Remember to keep full control of the barbell at all times.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of Seus/Suas training program.
When finished with Seus/Suas set, slowly lower the barbell costas down until it is level with Seus/Suas head and release it.

name: Wide-grip lat pulldown
instructions: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit Seus/Suas height. These pads will prevent Seus/Suas body from being raised by the resistência attached to the bar.

Grab the bar com o/a palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than shoulder width. For a medium grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to Seus/Suas shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than Seus/Suas shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring Seus/Suas torso costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on Seus/Suas lower costas and sticking Seus/Suas peito out. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

As you breathe out, bring the bar down until it touches Seus/Suas upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forearms.

After a second at the contracted position squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movement.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Wide-grip pulldown behind the neck
instructions: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit Seus/Suas height. These pads will prevent Seus/Suas body from being raised by the resistência attached to the bar.

Grab the bar com o/a palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than Seus/Suas shoulder width. For a medium grip, Seus/Suas mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to Seus/Suas shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than Seus/Suas shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring Seus/Suas torso and head forward. Think of an imaginary line from the center of the bar down to the costas of Seus/Suas neck. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

As you breathe out, bring the bar down until it touches the costas of Seus/Suas neck by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forearms.

After a second no/na contracted position squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movement.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Wide-grip rear pull-up
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar com o/a palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar, bring Seus/Suas torso forward and head so that there is an imaginary line from the pull-up bar to the costas of Seus/Suas neck. This is Seus/Suas starting position.

Pull Seus/Suas torso up until the bar is near the costas of Seus/Suas neck. To do this, draw the ombros and upper braços down and costas while slightly leaning Seus/Suas head forward. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second no/na contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower Seus/Suas torso costas to the starting position when Seus/Suas braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: Wide-grip standing barbell curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright while holding a barbell at the wide outer handle. The palm of Seus/Suas mãos should be facing forward. The elbows should be close to the torso. Esta será sua posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the peso forward while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the bíceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar costas to starting position as Seus/Suas breathe in.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Wide stance barbell agachamento
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step sob o/a bar and place the costas of Seus/Suas ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with Seus/Suas pernas and at the same time straightening Seus/Suas torso.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a wider-than-shoulder-width stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance, and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a heel of Seus/Suas foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Wide stance stiff pernas
instructions: Begin with a barbell loaded no/na floor. Adopt a wide stance, and then bend at the hips to grab the bar. Seus/Suas hips should be as far costas as possible, and Seus/Suas pernas nearly straight. Keep Seus/Suas costas straight, and Seus/Suas head and peito up. Esta será sua posição inicial.

Begin the movement be engaging the hips, driving them forward as you allow the braços to hang straight. Continue until you are standing straight up, and then slowly return the peso to the starting position. For successive reps, the peso need not touch the floor.

name: Wind sprints
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar using a pronated grip. Seus/Suas braços and pernas should be extended. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Begin by quickly raising one knee as high as you can. Do not swing Seus/Suas body or Seus/Suas pernas. 3
Immediately reverse the motion, returning that leg to the starting position. Simultaneously raise the opposite knee as high as possible.
Continue alternating between pernas until the set is complete.

name: Windmills
instructions: Lie on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas braços extended out to the sides and Seus/Suas pernas straight. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Lift one leg and quickly cross it over Seus/Suas body, attempting to touch the ground near the opposite hand.
Retorne para a posição inicial, and repeat com o/a opposite leg. Continue to alternate for 10-20 repetitions.

name: World's greatest stretch
instructions: This is a three-part stretch. Begin by lunging forward, with Seus/Suas front foot flat no/na ground and no/na toes of Seus/Suas costas foot. With Seus/Suas knees bent, agachamento down until Seus/Suas knee is almost touching the ground. Keep Seus/Suas torso erect, and hold this position for 10-20 seconds.

Now, place the arm no/na same side as Seus/Suas front leg no/na ground, com o/a elbow next to the foot. Seus/Suas other hand should be placed no/na ground, parallel to Seus/Suas lead leg, to help support you during this portion of the stretch.

After 10-20 seconds, Coloque suas mãos on either side of Seus/Suas front foot. Raise the toes of the front foot off of the ground, and straighten Seus/Suas leg. You may need to reposition Seus/Suas rear leg to do so. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then repeat the entire sequence for the other side.

name: Wrist circles
instructions: Start by standing straight with Seus/Suas pés being shoulder width apart from each other. Elevate Seus/Suas braços to the side of you until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor at a height that is evenly aligned with Seus/Suas ombros. Tip: Seus/Suas torso and braços should form the letter "T: Seus/Suas palms should be facing down. This is the starting position.

Keeping Seus/Suas entire body stationary except for the wrists, begin to rotate both wrists forward in a circular motion. Tip: Pretend that you are trying to draw circles by using Seus/Suas mãos as the brush. Breathe normally as you perform this exercise.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Wrist roller
instructions: To begin, stand straight up grabbing a wrist roller using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Seus/Suas pés should be shoulder width apart.

Slowly lift both braços until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor in front of you. Note: Make sure the rope is not wrapped around the roller. Seus/Suas entire body should be stationary except for the forearms. This is the starting position.
Rotate one wrist at a time in an upward motion to bring the peso up to the bar by rolling the rope around the roller.
Once the peso has reached the bar, slowly begin to lower the peso costas down by rotating the wrist in a downward motion until the peso reaches the starting position.
Repita o número prescrito de repetições in Seus/Suas program.

name: Wrist rotations with straight bar
instructions: Hold a barbell with both mãos and Seus/Suas palms facing down; mãos spaced about shoulder width. Esta será sua posição inicial.
Alternating between each of Seus/Suas mãos, perform the movement by extending the wrist as though you were rolling up a newspaper. Continue alternating costas and forth until failure.
Reverse the motion by flexing the wrist, rolling the opposite direction. Continue the alternating motion until failure.

name: Yoke walk
instructions: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the costas of the ombros. With Seus/Suas head looking forward and costas arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 pés.

name: Zercher squats
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a agachamento rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches Seus/Suas height. The correct height should be anywhere above the waist but below the peito. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, lock Seus/Suas mãos together and place the bar on top of Seus/Suas braços in between the forearm and upper arm.
Lift the bar up so that it is resting on top of Seus/Suas forearms. If you are holding the bar properly, it should look as if you have Seus/Suas braços crossed but with a bar running across them.

Step away from the rack and position Seus/Suas pernas using a shoulder width medium stance com o/a toes slightly pointed out. Keep Seus/Suas head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Esta será sua posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture com o/a head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line com o/a toes that is perpendicular to the front. If Seus/Suas knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past Seus/Suas toes) then you are placing undue stress no/na knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor com o/a ball of Seus/Suas foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the starting position.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Zottman curl
instructions: Stand up with Seus/Suas torso upright and a dumbbell in each hand being held at braços length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Make sure the palms of the mãos are facing each other. Esta será sua posição inicial.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the peso while contracting the bíceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Seus/Suas wrist should rotate so that you have a supinated (palms up) grip. Continue the movement until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bíceps.
Now during the contracted position, rotate Seus/Suas wrist until you now have a pronated (palms facing down) grip com o/a thumb at a higher position than the pinky.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells costas down using the pronated grip.
As the dumbbells close Seus/Suas thighs, start rotating the wrist so that you go costas to a neutral (palms facing Seus/Suas body) grip.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: Zottman preacher curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and place Seus/Suas upper braços on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbells should be held at shoulder height and the elbows should be flexed. Hold the dumbbells com o/a palms of Seus/Suas mãos facing down. Esta será sua posição inicial.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells keeping the palms down until Seus/Suas upper arm is extended and Seus/Suas bíceps are fully stretched.
Now rotate Seus/Suas wrists once you are at the bottom of the movement so that the palms of the mãos are facing up.

As you exhale, use Seus/Suas bíceps to curl the peso up until they are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the bíceps hard for a second at the contracted position and rotate Seus/Suas wrists so that the palms are facing down again.
Repita o número recomendado de repetições.

name: 45° side bend
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and Seus/Suas braços extended straight down by Seus/Suas sides.
Keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas core engaged, slowly bend Seus/Suas torso to one side, lowering Seus/Suas hand towards Seus/Suas knee.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat no/na other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Alternate lateral pulldown
instructions: Sit no/na cable machine with Seus/Suas costas straight and pés flat no/na ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean costas slightly and pull the handles towards Seus/Suas peito, squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted peito dip (kneeling)
instructions: Adjust the machine to Seus/Suas desired height and secure Seus/Suas knees no/na pad.
Grasp the handles with Seus/Suas palms facing down and Seus/Suas braços fully extended.
Lower Seus/Suas body by bending Seus/Suas elbows until Seus/Suas upper braços are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted hanging knee raise with throw down
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with Seus/Suas braços fully extended and Seus/Suas palms facing away from you.
Engage Seus/Suas core and lift Seus/Suas knees towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas pernas together.
Once Seus/Suas knees are at peito level, explosively throw Seus/Suas pernas down towards the ground, extending them fully.
Allow Seus/Suas pernas to swing costas up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted hanging knee raise
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with Seus/Suas braços fully extended and Seus/Suas palms facing away from you.
Engage Seus/Suas core muscles and lift Seus/Suas knees towards Seus/Suas peito, bending at the hips and knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing Seus/Suas abdômen.
Slowly lower Seus/Suas pernas costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted lying leg raise with lateral throw down
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended and Seus/Suas braços by Seus/Suas sides.
Coloque suas mãos under Seus/Suas glúteos for support.
Engage Seus/Suas abdômen and lift Seus/Suas pernas off the ground, keeping them straight.
While keeping Seus/Suas pernas together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground.
Pause for a moment, then lift Seus/Suas pernas costas to the starting position.
Repeat the movement to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted lying leg raise with throw down
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas with Seus/Suas pernas extended and Seus/Suas braços by Seus/Suas sides.
Coloque suas mãos under Seus/Suas glúteos for support.
Engage Seus/Suas core and lift Seus/Suas pernas off the ground, keeping them straight.
Raise Seus/Suas pernas until they are perpendicular to the ground.
Lower Seus/Suas pernas costas down to the starting position.
Simultaneously, throw Seus/Suas pernas down towards the ground, keeping them straight.
Raise Seus/Suas pernas costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted motion russian twist
instructions: Sit no/na ground with Seus/Suas knees bent and pés flat no/na floor.
Hold the medicine ball with both mãos in front of Seus/Suas peito.
Lean costas slightly, engaging Seus/Suas abdômen and keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.
Slowly twist Seus/Suas torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of Seus/Suas body.
Pause for a moment, then twist Seus/Suas torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of Seus/Suas body.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted parallel close grip pull-up
instructions: Adjust the machine to Seus/Suas desired peso and height.
Coloque suas mãos no/na parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Hang from the bars with Seus/Suas braços fully extended and Seus/Suas pés off the ground.
Engage Seus/Suas costas muscles and pull Seus/Suas body up towards the bars, keeping Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas body.
Continue pulling until Seus/Suas chin is above the bars.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower Seus/Suas body costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted prone hamstring
instructions: Lie face down on a mat or bench with Seus/Suas pernas fully extended.
Have a partner or use a resistência band to secure Seus/Suas ankles.
Engage Seus/Suas hamstrings and lift Seus/Suas pernas towards Seus/Suas glúteos, keeping Seus/Suas knees straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower Seus/Suas pernas costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted pull-up
instructions: Adjust the machine to Seus/Suas desired peso and height settings.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with Seus/Suas braços fully extended and Seus/Suas pés off the ground.
Engage Seus/Suas costas muscles and pull Seus/Suas body up towards the handles, keeping Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas body.
Continue pulling until Seus/Suas chin is above the handles.
