Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower Seus/Suas body costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted standing tríceps extension (with towel)
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both mãos behind Seus/Suas head.
Keep Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas ears and Seus/Suas upper braços stationary.
Slowly extend Seus/Suas forearms upward, squeezing Seus/Suas tríceps at the top.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Assisted tríceps dip (kneeling)
instructions: Adjust the machine to Seus/Suas desired peso and height.
Kneel down no/na pad facing the machine, with Seus/Suas mãos gripping the handles.
Lower Seus/Suas body by bending Seus/Suas elbows, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and close to the machine.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell pullover to press
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas head at one end and Seus/Suas pés no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend Seus/Suas braços straight above Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas lats.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell costas to the starting position above Seus/Suas peito.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell alternate bíceps curl
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep Seus/Suas upper braços stationary and exhale as you curl the peso while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Continue to raise the barbells until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating braços.

name: Barbell bench front agachamento
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on Seus/Suas upper peito, just below Seus/Suas collarbone.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping Seus/Suas elbows up and Seus/Suas upper braços parallel to the ground.
Lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas peito up.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the agachamento, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell supino
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas costas pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above Seus/Suas peito with Seus/Suas braços fully extended.
Lower the barbell slowly towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches Seus/Suas peito.
Push the barbell costas up to the starting position by extending Seus/Suas braços.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell bench agachamento
instructions: Set up a barbell on a agachamento rack at peito height.
Stand facing away from the rack, with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart.
Bend Seus/Suas knees and lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and step costas, ensuring Seus/Suas pés are still shoulder-width apart.
Lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento, keeping Seus/Suas knees in line with Seus/Suas toes.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell bent over row
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Bend forward at the hips while keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Pull the barbell towards Seus/Suas lower peito by retracting Seus/Suas shoulder blades and squeezing Seus/Suas costas muscles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell clean and press
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and the barbell no/na floor in front of you.
Bend Seus/Suas knees and hinge at the hips to lower down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Drive through Seus/Suas heels and extend Seus/Suas hips and knees to lift the barbell off the floor, keeping it close to Seus/Suas body.
As the barbell reaches Seus/Suas thighs, explosively extend Seus/Suas hips, shrug Seus/Suas ombros, and pull the barbell up towards Seus/Suas peito.
As the barbell reaches peito height, quickly drop under it and catch it at shoulder level, with Seus/Suas elbows pointing forward and Seus/Suas palms facing up.
From the catch position, press the barbell overhead by extending Seus/Suas braços and pushing the barbell straight up.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell clean-grip front agachamento
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on Seus/Suas upper peito, with Seus/Suas elbows pointing forward.
Lower Seus/Suas body by bending Seus/Suas knees and pushing Seus/Suas hips costas, as if you are sitting costas into a chair.
Keep Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas straight as you lower down, making sure Seus/Suas knees do not go past Seus/Suas toes.
Continue lowering until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to stand costas up, extending Seus/Suas hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell close-grip supino
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas costas pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches Seus/Suas peito.
Push the barbell costas up to the starting position, fully extending Seus/Suas braços.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell decline supino
instructions: Lie on a decline bench with Seus/Suas pés secured and Seus/Suas head lower than Seus/Suas hips.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell decline bent arm pullover
instructions: Lie down on a decline bench with Seus/Suas head lower than Seus/Suas hips and Seus/Suas pés secured.
Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend Seus/Suas braços straight above Seus/Suas peito.
Lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head in a controlled manner, keeping Seus/Suas braços slightly bent.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell costas to the starting position by contracting Seus/Suas lats.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell decline close grip to skull press
instructions: Lie on a decline bench with Seus/Suas head lower than Seus/Suas pés and hold a barbell with a close grip.
Lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas forehead by bending Seus/Suas elbows, keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary.
Pause for a moment, then extend Seus/Suas braços to press the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell decline wide-grip press
instructions: Lie on a decline bench with Seus/Suas pés secured and Seus/Suas head lower than Seus/Suas hips.
Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell to Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows out to the sides.
Push the barbell costas up to the starting position, fully extending Seus/Suas braços.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell decline wide-grip pullover
instructions: Lie on a decline bench with Seus/Suas head lower than Seus/Suas hips and Seus/Suas pés secured.
Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend Seus/Suas braços straight above Seus/Suas peito.
Lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head in a controlled manner, keeping Seus/Suas braços straight.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell drag curl
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of Seus/Suas thighs.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, curl the barbell up towards Seus/Suas peito by contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell front peito agachamento
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in front of Seus/Suas peito with Seus/Suas mãos shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward.
Engage Seus/Suas core and keep Seus/Suas peito up as you lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, pushing Seus/Suas hips costas and bending Seus/Suas knees.
Lower until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell front raise and pullover
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep Seus/Suas braços straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Next, lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head, keeping Seus/Suas braços straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell front raise
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of Seus/Suas thighs with an overhand grip.
Keep Seus/Suas braços straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell front agachamento
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in front of Seus/Suas ombros, resting it on Seus/Suas collarbone and ombros.
Engage Seus/Suas core and keep Seus/Suas peito up as you lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, pushing Seus/Suas hips costas and bending Seus/Suas knees.
Lower until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell good morning
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on Seus/Suas upper costas.
Keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing Seus/Suas buttocks costas as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with Seus/Suas glúteos.
Lower Seus/Suas torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in Seus/Suas hamstrings.
Pause for a moment, then Retorne para a posição inicial by squeezing Seus/Suas glúteos and pushing Seus/Suas hips forward.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell incline supino
instructions: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie down no/na bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell incline reverse-grip press
instructions: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie costas no/na bench and grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it towards Seus/Suas upper peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell incline row
instructions: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down no/na bench with Seus/Suas peito against the pad and Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas core engaged.
Pull the barbell towards Seus/Suas peito, squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell jefferson agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it no/na front of Seus/Suas body, just below Seus/Suas waist.
Step Seus/Suas left foot forward and Seus/Suas right foot costas, keeping Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart.
Bend Seus/Suas knees and lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up.
Push through Seus/Suas heels to stand costas up to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, alternating Seus/Suas forward and costas foot with each repetition.

name: Barbell jm supino
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas costas pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell to Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows tucked in close to Seus/Suas body.
Push the barbell costas up to the starting position, fully extending Seus/Suas braços.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell jump agachamento
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas.
Lower Seus/Suas body into a agachamento position by bending Seus/Suas knees and pushing Seus/Suas hips costas.
Once you reach the bottom of the agachamento, explode upwards by jumping off the ground.
As you jump, extend Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through Seus/Suas toes.
Land softly costas into the agachamento position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying close-grip press
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas costas pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards Seus/Suas pés.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above Seus/Suas peito with Seus/Suas braços fully extended.
Slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches Seus/Suas peito, then push it costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying close-grip tríceps extension
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas head at the end of the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, palms facing up.
Extend Seus/Suas braços fully, lifting the barbell above Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas forehead by bending Seus/Suas elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend Seus/Suas braços costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying extension
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, and extend Seus/Suas braços straight up over Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas forehead by bending Seus/Suas elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend Seus/Suas braços costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying lifting (on hip)
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas knees bent.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on Seus/Suas hips.
Engaging Seus/Suas glúteos, lift Seus/Suas hips off the bench until Seus/Suas body forms a straight line from Seus/Suas knees to Seus/Suas ombros.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower Seus/Suas hips costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying preacher curl
instructions: Sit on a preacher bench with Seus/Suas peito against the pad and Seus/Suas braços extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the peso while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Continue to raise the bar until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying tríceps extension skull crusher
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, and extend Seus/Suas braços straight up over Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas forehead by bending Seus/Suas elbows.
Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above Seus/Suas forehead, then extend Seus/Suas braços costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell lying tríceps extension
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, and extend Seus/Suas braços straight up over Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas forehead by bending Seus/Suas elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend Seus/Suas braços costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell narrow stance agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold the barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas, resting it on Seus/Suas traps or rear delts.
Engage Seus/Suas core and keep Seus/Suas peito up as you slowly lower Seus/Suas body by bending Seus/Suas knees and pushing Seus/Suas hips costas.
Continue lowering until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell one arm bent over row
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with one hand using an overhand grip.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas head in a neutral position.
Pull the barbell up towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbow close to Seus/Suas body and squeezing Seus/Suas shoulder blades together.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Barbell one arm floor press
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas no/na floor with Seus/Suas knees bent and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend Seus/Suas arm straight up over Seus/Suas peito.
Slowly lower the barbell towards Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbow close to Seus/Suas body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell costas up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch braços.

name: Barbell one arm side levantamento terra
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas core engaged.
Bend at the hips and lower the barbell towards the outside of Seus/Suas leg, keeping Seus/Suas arm straight and Seus/Suas peito up.
Lower the barbell as far as you can while maintaining good form.
Pause for a moment, then slowly Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Barbell one arm snatch
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend Seus/Suas knees and lower Seus/Suas hips into a agachamento position, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up.
Explosively extend Seus/Suas hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards.
As the barbell reaches peito level, pull it upwards with Seus/Suas arm, keeping it close to Seus/Suas body.
Rotate Seus/Suas elbow sob o/a barbell and extend Seus/Suas arm fully overhead, locking out Seus/Suas elbow.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch braços.

name: Barbell one leg agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas.
Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Bend Seus/Suas standing leg and lower Seus/Suas body down as if sitting costas into a chair, keeping Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas straight.
Lower yourself until Seus/Suas thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through Seus/Suas heel to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch pernas and repeat.

name: Barbell overhead agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with Seus/Suas braços fully extended.
Engage Seus/Suas core and lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, keeping Seus/Suas peito up and knees tracking over Seus/Suas toes.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell preacher curl
instructions: Sit on a preacher bench with Seus/Suas upper braços resting no/na pad and Seus/Suas peito against the support.
Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards Seus/Suas ombros.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell press sit-up
instructions: Lie flat on Seus/Suas costas on a mat with Seus/Suas knees bent and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on Seus/Suas peito.
Engaging Seus/Suas abdômen, slowly lift Seus/Suas upper body off the ground, curling forward until Seus/Suas torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower Seus/Suas upper body costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell prone incline curl
instructions: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down no/na bench with Seus/Suas peito and stomach resting against it.
Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Extend Seus/Suas braços fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the peso while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell pullover
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with Seus/Suas head at one end and Seus/Suas pés no/na floor.
Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend Seus/Suas braços straight above Seus/Suas peito.
Keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas lats.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell rack pull
instructions: Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height.
Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart.
Engage Seus/Suas core and lift the barbell by extending Seus/Suas hips and knees, pulling Seus/Suas ombros costas and squeezing Seus/Suas glúteos at the top.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell rear delt raise
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.
Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping Seus/Suas braços straight, until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell rear lunge v. 2
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas.
Take a step backward with Seus/Suas right foot, landing no/na ball of Seus/Suas foot.
Bend both knees to lower Seus/Suas body until Seus/Suas left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through Seus/Suas left heel to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat com o/a other leg.

name: Barbell rear lunge
instructions: Start by standing with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on Seus/Suas upper costas.
Take a step backward with Seus/Suas right foot, landing no/na ball of Seus/Suas foot.
Bend both knees to lower Seus/Suas body until Seus/Suas left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through Seus/Suas left heel to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat com o/a other leg.

name: Barbell reverse wrist curl v. 2
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas knees bent.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and Seus/Suas mãos shoulder-width apart.
Rest Seus/Suas forearms on Seus/Suas thighs, allowing Seus/Suas wrists to hang off the edge.
Keeping Seus/Suas forearms stationary, exhale and curl Seus/Suas wrists upward as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell reverse curl
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep Seus/Suas upper braços stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position, keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell reverse preacher curl
instructions: Sit on a preacher bench with Seus/Suas peito against the pad and Seus/Suas braços extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell reverse wrist curl
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Rest Seus/Suas forearms on Seus/Suas thighs, allowing Seus/Suas wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl Seus/Suas wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards Seus/Suas body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell rollerout from bench
instructions: Start by kneeling no/na floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keeping Seus/Suas core engaged and Seus/Suas costas straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending Seus/Suas braços in front of you.
Continue rolling the barbell forward until Seus/Suas body is fully extended and Seus/Suas braços are overhead.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell costas towards Seus/Suas body, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell rollerout
instructions: Kneel no/na floor and hold a barbell with both mãos, shoulder-width apart.
Roll the barbell forward, extending Seus/Suas braços and keeping Seus/Suas core engaged.
Continue rolling forward until Seus/Suas body is fully extended and Seus/Suas braços are overhead.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell costas towards Seus/Suas knees, maintaining control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell romanian levantamento terra
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and Seus/Suas toes pointing forward.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the hips, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas knees slightly bent.
Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to Seus/Suas body.
Feel the stretch in Seus/Suas hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Once you feel a stretch in Seus/Suas hamstrings, push Seus/Suas hips forward and stand up straight.
Squeeze Seus/Suas glúteos at the top of the movement.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated behind head military press
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas costas straight and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind Seus/Suas head.
Press the barbell upward until Seus/Suas braços are fully extended.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated bradford rocky press
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas costas straight and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent and pointing forward.
Press the barbell overhead, fully extending Seus/Suas braços.
Lower the barbell costas to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated close-grip concentration curl
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na floor and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart.
Rest Seus/Suas upper braços against Seus/Suas inner thighs, just above Seus/Suas knees, and let the barbell hang down in front of you.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards Seus/Suas ombros, contracting Seus/Suas bíceps.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated good morning
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and a barbell resting on Seus/Suas upper costas.
Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas peito up.
Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering Seus/Suas torso towards the ground.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated overhead press
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas costas straight and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with Seus/Suas elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the barbell overhead by extending Seus/Suas braços fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell costas to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated overhead tríceps extension
instructions: Sit on a bench with Seus/Suas costas straight and pés flat no/na ground.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, mãos shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead.
Lower the barbell behind Seus/Suas head by bending Seus/Suas elbows, keeping Seus/Suas upper braços close to Seus/Suas head.
Pause for a moment, then extend Seus/Suas braços to raise the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell seated twist
instructions: Sit on a flat bench with Seus/Suas pés flat no/na ground and Seus/Suas knees bent.
Hold a barbell with both mãos in front of Seus/Suas peito, keeping Seus/Suas elbows slightly bent.
Engage Seus/Suas core and slowly twist Seus/Suas torso to one side, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.
Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate costas to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell side bent v. 2
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both mãos, palms facing down.
Keep Seus/Suas costas straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Slowly bend Seus/Suas torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards Seus/Suas right knee.
Pause for a moment, then Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat the movement no/na left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell side split agachamento v. 2
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Hold a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas, resting it on Seus/Suas ombros.
Take a big step to the side with Seus/Suas right foot, keeping Seus/Suas left foot planted.
Bend Seus/Suas right knee and lower Seus/Suas body down into a agachamento position, keeping Seus/Suas peito up and Seus/Suas costas straight.
Push through Seus/Suas right heel to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat no/na other side, stepping out with Seus/Suas left foot.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell single leg split agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas.
Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping Seus/Suas torso upright.
Lower Seus/Suas body by bending Seus/Suas front knee and hip, while keeping Seus/Suas costas leg straight.
Continue lowering until Seus/Suas front thigh is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through Seus/Suas front heel to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch pernas.

name: Barbell skier
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of Seus/Suas thighs with an overhand grip.
Bend Seus/Suas knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and peito up.
Simultaneously lift the barbell up towards Seus/Suas ombros while jumping slightly off the ground.
As you reach the top of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell speed agachamento
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell across Seus/Suas upper costas, resting it on Seus/Suas traps or rear delts.
Engage Seus/Suas core and keep Seus/Suas peito up as you lower Seus/Suas hips costas and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Lower until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Drive through Seus/Suas heels to stand costas up, squeezing Seus/Suas glúteos at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell agachamento (on knees)
instructions: Start by kneeling no/na ground with Seus/Suas knees hip-width apart and Seus/Suas toes pointing forward.
Place a barbell across Seus/Suas ombros, gripping it with an overhand grip and Seus/Suas mãos slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage Seus/Suas core and keep Seus/Suas peito lifted as you slowly lower Seus/Suas body down by bending Seus/Suas knees, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight.
Continue lowering until Seus/Suas thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through Seus/Suas heels to Retorne para a posição inicial.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell standing ab rollerout
instructions: Stand upright with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both mãos in front of Seus/Suas thighs.
Engage Seus/Suas core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping Seus/Suas costas straight and Seus/Suas braços extended.
Continue rolling the barbell forward until Seus/Suas body is fully extended and Seus/Suas mãos are directly above Seus/Suas head.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell costas towards Seus/Suas thighs, maintaining control and keeping Seus/Suas core engaged.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell standing costas wrist curl
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Rest the barbell no/na costas of Seus/Suas mãos with Seus/Suas palms facing down and Seus/Suas fingers pointing towards Seus/Suas body.
Keeping Seus/Suas upper braços stationary, exhale and curl Seus/Suas wrists upwards as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell standing bradford press
instructions: Stand with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of Seus/Suas ombros with an overhand grip.
Press the barbell overhead, fully extending Seus/Suas braços.
Lower the barbell costas down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Barbell standing close grip curl
instructions: Stand up straight with Seus/Suas pés shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, mãos close together.
Keep Seus/Suas elbows close to Seus/Suas torso and Seus/Suas upper braços stationary throughout the movement.
Exhale as you curl the peso while contracting Seus/Suas bíceps. Continue to raise the bar until Seus/Suas bíceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze Seus/Suas bíceps.
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell costas to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
